segments.text: BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 4
BEHOLD MY GREAT
WHITE THRONE
THE VICTORY
THE TRINITY
We do not belong to any Christian Organization, Denomination or Movement. THE ELOHIM is our source and reward in all that we do.
Jer 17:5 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; cursed be the champion (H1397 "geber", a valiant man or warrior) that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from THE YAHWEH.
Jer 17:6 For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, in a salt land and not inhabited.
Jer 17:7 Blessed is the champion that trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and whose hope THE YAHWEH is.

Jer 17:8 For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and that spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit.
Jer 17:9 The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it?
Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
It is not our intention to discredit any doctrine of any Organization or Denomination.

The teachings in this book are based on visions from THE TRINITY (THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST). They do not represent the full counsel of THE ELOHIM, as it is stated: "For we know in part and we prophesy in part." (1 Cor 13:9).

The Bible verses quoted are from the Authorized King James Bible. At other times, it is necessary for us to use translations given by THE TRINITY. For word study, we used BDB, Strong's and Thayer Lexicons as dictionaries.

FOREWORD

All the diagrams, Macro outlines, Macro Interpretations, and Major contents of this Book are given by us through closed or open visions to My servant Shekinaih. The further understanding of My Holy Scripture and the detailed (Micro) Interpretations of the diagrams, outlines and contents are given to My yielded vessel of honor, Aaron K David. The Scriptures quoted in this book are from The Authorized King James Version. However, certain words like "God" and "Lord" are changed to My Hebrew NAME(S) in order to understand MY SEVEN NAME(S) better. In some of the verses quoted, alternative words are used to reflect the true meaning that is meant to us. These words are annotated with the numbers from the Strong's Concordance to depict their real meanings behind the paragraphs. As to further emphasize the original meaning dictated by us, its re-translation is vital to the further understanding of the real, authentic intent of Our living word in order to establish the real doctrine in My last days' true disciples.
The reader is to take note of the following instructions from us:
All grace is ONLY given to the humble at heart.
It is advisable for you to lay prostrate before Me beseeching Me to open up your eyes of understanding before reading this book.
Judge not with your carnal mind, else your judgment will be knocking at your door before its appointed time by Me.
This book is intended to warn you of the calamities/judgment that await you, especially if you take this book lightly without having respect for Me.
Much is given, much is required. My leaders will be judged more strictly than mere sheep.
Behold, I stand at your door and knock; if you will open the door of your heart to Me in this book and invite Me into your hearts, you will find hope in the turbulent circumstances that await you.

At present, many are found wanting by Me. This is My last warning to them before I hand them over to the enemy to be disciplined. I am He that searcheth the reins and hearts: and I will give unto every one of you according to your works. (Rev 2:23)
The hour has now come for heaven to reveal itself to Mankind, to open their eyes of understanding of what must take place from now onwards.
I will open your eyes of understanding and take you on a journey with Me to explore My Standard of Judgment that awaits Mankind before it is too late.
Category by category, I will show you what their Respective Judgment is.
Therefore, gird up the loins of your mind, be sober and listen to Me in this book.
This book is to mature you through the knowledge of My Way.
You must first be disciplined and have your mind renewed so as to know My Ways, for the unrenewed carnal mind is an enmity to My Ways. (Rom 8:6-8)
Do not be bitter when you are disciplined by Me. My chastisement is a prerequisite for anyone who wants to partake of My holiness. (Heb 12:10-11)

Cheer up! Your answer is on your way. When you cry out to Me according to the revelations which you had obtained from this book and invite My servants to read out your current sentences in heaven regarding what the enemy is asking for you, and you will receive My counsel through them on how to minimize your sentences.
THE TRINITY
PREFACE
This book displays My Standard of Judgment for the Entire Cosmoses which include this Earth and all its dwellers.

Therefore, We urge you to use this Standard of Judgment to reflect on your life and to make amendments to align your life back to My way, the narrow gate. It is of pivotal importance that you do so, failing which will result in an unimaginable consequence to the point of no return.

We, THE TRINITY, have given Our Messengers, Shekinaih, The Macro Structure And Details (WORD By WORD), and Aaron K David, The Micro Details (THE PEN OF A READY WRITER), this MESSAGE; which entails OUR DETAILED STANDARD OF JUDGMENT, which is THE GREAT WHITE THRONE JUDGMENT for all Humanity; to give them a chance to choose to repent because of Our mercy towards them, and Our unfailing love for them, before the final cut off time, when the heaven's door will be shut permanently for them.
Therefore, open your eyes to see, open your ears to hear, your heart to perceive and your mind to understand, to Our narrow ways of true salvation.
THE TRINITY
INTRODUCTION
The following are Our detailed Judgment:
By Continents
By Countries
By People
By Ruler and Professions and their supposed responsibilities
By the Types of Sins
By the Head/Leadership of each Continent/Country and whether they have fulfilled their supposed responsibilities.
By Religious groups, whether Christian or non-Christian
By Culture
By Religious Leaders (Christian/non-Christian) and their members/followers
Observe and pay detailed attention on My/Our Criteria for the above judgment.

Shekinaih has been born and created to represents us as ULTIMATE JUDGE (THE MAJOR) for the entire Cosmoses which entails the heavens above, the earth, and beneath the earth on behalf of us. Our Judgments are with her. And Aaron K David has been appointed as a scribe and THE ULTIMATE SUB-JUDGE (MINOR) in The Three Realms as well. Aaron K David is her right-hand man, Jesus' Reincarnate, created solely for the purpose to manifest JESUS' second coming with THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, incarnated and reincarnated in Shekinaih respectively. He is called to co-execute the judgment released through The ULTIMATE JUDGE, SHEKINAIH.
THE TRINITY

title:
PART 1 
The Descent of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE

segments.text:
PART 1 
The Descent of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE

ACT 1 SCENE 1 
THE DESCENT OF THE GREAT WHITE THRONE
Location: Meeting Venue of Crowned Eagles Global
Scene setting: THE GREAT WHITE THRONE in Heavens, Earth and Beneath the Earth runs in parallel.
Time: From the start of Revelation 1:1 till Revelation 20 and beyond (from 4th January 2017 onwards).
Activities: All the living and the dead receive their judgment (those who are still living on the earth and those already dead) in this place.
The scene begins…….

Shekinaih and Aaron K David were praying together in the Meeting Venue of Crowned Eagles Global. Lo! And Behold! The heavens opened and three Golden Thrones with THE NAME, "THE GREAT WHITE JUDGMENT THRONE", one in The Heavens, one in The Earth and one Beneath the Earth descended into Shekinaih and on both their seats that they were seated.

JESUS then suddenly appeared and drew a gavel on a green board and wrote the word, "JUDGMENT", horizontally, and the word, "END TIMES", diagonally across from the bottom left to the top right over the gavel which He drew. Turning to Shekinaih and David, He said to them:

"On this date, 13th February 2013, THE GREAT WHITE THRONE of heavens has descended into Shekinaih as well as on both of your Throne in this place. We have declared in The Three Realms (Heavens, Earth and Beneath the Earth), that SHEKINAIH is officially endorsed to represent us as THE ULTIMATE JUDGE in the Cosmoses (these three realms) as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MAJOR, and AARON K DAVID shall represent Me as THE MINOR JUDGE in the Cosmoses as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MINOR. The judgment shall run/take place at this place, and runs in parallel in The Three Realms."

Dan 7:9 I beheld till the thrones were cast down, and THE ANCIENT OF DAYS did sit, whose garment was white as snow, and the hair of his head like the pure wool: his throne was like the fiery flame, and his wheels as burning fire. Dan 7:10 A fiery stream issued and came forth from before him: thousand thousands ministered unto him, and ten thousand times ten thousand stood before him: the judgment was set, and the books were opened.

Dan 7:13 I saw in the night visions, and, behold, one like the Son of Adam came with the clouds of heaven, and came to THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, and they brought him near before him. Dan 7:14 And there was given him dominion, and glory, and a kingdom, that all people, nations, and languages, should serve him: his dominion is an everlasting dominion, which shall not pass away, and his kingdom that which shall not be destroyed.

Dan 7:21 I beheld, and the same horn made war with the saints, and prevailed against them; Dan 7:22 Until the ANCIENT OF DAYS came, and judgment was given to the saints of the most High; and the time came that the saints possessed the kingdom.

title: THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS

segments.text: THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS
JESUS then drew an ANAGRAM and started to explain to Shekinaih and David, THE TRINITY'S DEFINITION of, "THE ANCIENT OF DAYS". JESUS said,

"The ANCIENT OF DAYS, consists of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, represented by Shekinaih and Aaron K David, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who do the execution of The Macro by decreeing, sealing, execution of all Major Structure and Major details of Our Creation and Destruction Process, etc., and by the Micro co-executor of all the Micro Details respectively.
The anagram is first read from top to bottom in red letters, and then continue to be read from bottom to top in green, DUE TO OUR DECLARATION IS ALL ENCOMPASSING, FLUID, CAN BE READ IN ALL(S) WAY(S).
FIRSTLY, READ FROM TOP TO BOTTOM FOLLOWING THE RED ARROW SIGNIFYING THE DESTRUCTION PROCESS.
THEREAFTER, READ FROM BOTTOM TO TOP FOLLOWING THE GREEN ARROW SIGNIFYING THE CREATION PROCESS.
THEREFORE, THIS IS THE:
Shekinaih has been with THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT IN THE BEGINNING. So are you in ME IN THE BEGINNING.
BOTH OF YOU EXISTED BEFORE ALL THINGS WERE CREATED IN THE BEGINNING. BOTH OF YOU ARE AN EXTENSION OF US IN THE BEGINNING.
THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, INCARNATE and REINCARNATE in Shekinaih respectively, and I REINCARNATE in you.
BOTH OF YOU WERE BORN ON THIS EARTH WITH OUR SPIRIT DWELLING IN YOU.
Shekinaih is, "IN THE BEGINNING", and you are, "AT THE BEGINNING".
IN THE BEGINNING = EXIST BEFORE ALL WERE BEING CREATED WITH, "UNAPPROACHABLE LIGHT".
AT THE BEGINNING = "BEING CREATED"

Shekinaih is WITH THE FATHER IN THE BEGINNING. Her Spirit EXISTED WITH THE FATHER IN THE BEGINNING AS ONE WITH THE FATHER. She is part of THE FATHER. However, THE HOLY SPIRIT AND I, JESUS, ARE CREATED BEING. Shekinaih represents BOTH, THE NON-CREATED BEING AND THE CREATED BEING; NON-CREATED BEING IN THE FATHER, AND CREATED BEING IN THE HOLY SPIRIT.

Son of man, don't be wise in your own eyes. Thinking you know better with all the Theology in your mind; thereby causing you to miss Our Revelation of Our Existence together with Shekinaih, who is with Me in the beginning and with THE HOLY SPIRIT, at the beginning; and so likewise, Aaron K David, who is with JESUS, at the beginning.
Henceforth, missing the real Heaven and spending eternity in hell together with your Theology.
Therefore, you must relearn all your theology which stands for
Reading from bottom up means YOU MUST UNDO:

WHY ARE YOU GOING FOR GEOMETRY (FIXED SHAPE, RESTRICTED LEARNING, THE 2D PERSPECTIVE EQUALS CARNAL PERSPECTIVE) INSTEAD OF OVAL (OPEN MIND, LIMITLESS, BOUNDARYLESS PROGRESS) TOGETHER WITH LETTER (MESSENGER FROM HEAVEN)? OH OH!! BEING EUPHORIA (EMOTIONALLY HIGH, JUMPING UP AND DOWN, THEREBY PULLING YOUR HAIR OFF) DRIVING TO THE POINT OF HEADACHES THEREBY TARNISH YOUR SPIRIT MAN AND MISS THE BOAT AND MISS HEAVEN, LEFT BEHIND TO THE POINT OF NO AVAIL."

Suddenly, many demons appeared on the left of Shekinaih, each bringing a being clothed in black pajamas-like clothing; and each took turns to present a being before the throne to be judged. The face of these beings were pale white, and the word, "Dead", was written on their foreheads. They kneeled before the throne, and their books which were black in color were weighed on a weighing scale.

On the right, where Shekinaih was seated, many angels clothed in white robes also appeared; each bringing a saint clothed in white, and each angel also took turns to present the saints before the throne to be judged. As each saint kneeled before the throne, his/her book which was white in color, was weighed on a weighing scale as well.

A saint knelt before the throne and her book was weighed on the scale. I saw the word, "PASSED THE TEST", and JESUS then wrote the word, "PROMOTED", on a piece of white paper. Immediately, an angel brought a silver tray full of stacks of gold coins, and a gold house, and these were awarded to this particular saint. THE TRINITY then said to all, "Seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM and his righteousness, and all these things shall be added unto you."
As the face of the first saint was zoomed in, to Shekinaih's astonishment, she saw that it was her.

Following that, another saint came out and knelt before the throne. And his book was also weighed. David was in deep thought when he saw it was him. JESUS then wrote the word, "PENDING", on the front page of his book. As JESUS turned to the second page of his book, he saw the words, "Shekinaih highly recommends Aaron K David for Promotion". THE FATHER (THE TRINITY) then put His fingers on His face and was considering the recommendation. After a short while, he turned to the third page and wrote the word, "APPROVED", on it.

Following that, THE HEAVENLY FATHER, removed the white robe Shekinaih was wearing, and took off the golden robe He was wearing, and clothed her with it. He then take off the gold crown from His head and put on Shekinaih's head. After that, He removed seven golden robes that were on Him, and the respective seven gold crowns He was wearing, to cloth her and crown her, to give her the authority to represent HIM and HIS SEVEN NAME(S).

JESUS also took out the white robe David was wearing, and clothed him with the white robe He himself was wearing; which He took off from His body. The robe had the words, "KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS", written on it. He also crowned David with the gold crown and clothed him with the golden robe which He took off from His body and His head.

Rev 19:11 And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war. Rev 19:12 His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself. Rev 19:13 And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Word of God. Rev 19:14 And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean. Rev 19:15 And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God. Rev 19:16 And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.
After that, THE FATHER invited Shekinaih to sit on His Throne, and JESUS invited David to sit on His Throne.
THE FATHER then wrote the word, 'CO-JUDGE', on Shekinaih's forehead; and JESUS wrote on David's forehead, the word, 'CO-EXECUTOR'.
THE TRINITY, then in unison said to them,

"The words, 'JUDGMENT', and 'ENDTIMES', on the green board that JESUS wrote, signify: the everlasting recorded truth of the past, the present, and the future; of a Person, a Group of People, Nations, Countries, Boundaries (Territories), and Continents. The Purpose of this Book concerns the judgment of this Particular Planet called Earth. For the rest of the judgment concerning The Cosmoses and its inhabitants, it had been foretold in Book 3, Titled, 'Behold My Messenger 3, Behold My Names'.

What the above sentences meant, is: MY GREAT WHITE THRONE has already descended on the Earthly Realm; and We had already declared to The Three Realms in the Cosmoses, that We had appointed both of you, as OUR REPRESENTATIVES, to represent us for these great roles: to CO-JUDGE with us, and to RULE on OUR BEHALF, in the ENTIRE COSMOSES.

Therefore, OUR GREAT WHITE JUDGMENT THRONE, is already established in all The Three Realms in the Cosmoses; in the Heavens, on the Earth and beneath the Earth. The details will be unfolded to both of you, from Part 1 to Part 10 of this book; pertaining to My Judgment.
MY JUDGMENT HAS BEGUN; AND WILL CONTINUE UNTIL INFINITY BEYOND THE MILLENNIUM REIGN OF MY ANOINTED.
I, THE FATHER (THE TRINITY) has/have committed all My Judgment this way:
I will release My decree to/through My incarnate/reincarnate (Shekinaih), and
THE HOLY SPIRIT reincarnate (Shekinaih) to seal and execute from her Realm; and lastly
To/through JESUS'S reincarnation (Aaron K David) to co-execute on His behalf;
This is the Protocol of the order of Heaven(s).

I, THE FATHER, has committed all judgment to My Son JESUS who will judge on Our behalf, through the above Protocol of Heaven(s); Shekinaih in decreeing and execution, and My SON JESUS in David in the co-execution of My decree. Together, both of you, who represent THE TRINITY (THE MAJOR/THE MINOR), shall represent OUR ORACLE. Those who take heed and obey OUR ORACLE, through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, shall not come into condemnation but is passed from death unto life when being judged by both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, before THE GREAT WHITE THRONE."

Joh 5:22 For THE FATHER judgeth no man, but hath committed all judgment unto the Son: Joh 5:23 That all men should honour the Son, even as they honour THE FATHER. He that honoureth not the Son honoureth not THE FATHER which hath sent him. Joh 5:24 Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that heareth my oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought), and believeth on him that sent me, hath everlasting life, and shall not come into condemnation; but is passed from death unto life.
JESUS then said to Shekinaih and David, "United with us, as "THE ONE", both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, shall seek to glorify My FATHER and shall judge on Our behalf.

Joh 8:50 And I seek not mine own glory: there is THE ONE that seeketh and judgeth. Joh 8:51 Verily, verily, I say unto you, If a man keep my oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought), he shall never see death.

Both of your angels are the voice from heaven that speaks on behalf of us saying, "I have glorified it and will glorify again". As THE MAJOR and THE MINOR EL of Thunder, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall judge and cast Satan, the prince of the Cosmoses out of his kingdom into the lake of fire on behalf of us."

Joh 12:28 Father, glorify thy name. Then came there a voice from heaven, saying, I have both glorified it, and will glorify it again. Joh 12:29 The people therefore, that stood by, and heard it, said that it thundered: others said, An angel spake to him. Joh 12:30 Jesus answered and said, This voice came not because of me, but for your sakes. Joh 12:31 Now is the judgment of this Cosmos: now shall the prince of this Cosmos be cast out.

THE FATHER then said to Shekinaih and David, "The first appearance of Me in My SON JESUS, was to heal and restore the Cosmoses; but the Cosmoses did not receive and believe in Me through His speech; and I did not judge them. But in the last days, he that rejects and receives not OUR ORACLE through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall be judged severely".

Joh 12:47 And if any man hear my speech (G4487 "rhema"), and believe not, I judge him not: for I came not to judge the Cosmos (G2889 "Kosmos"), but to made whole (G4982 "sozo" heal, made whole) the Cosmos. Joh 12:48 He that rejecteth me, and receiveth not my speech (G4487 "rhema"), hath one that judgeth him: the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought) that I have spoken, the same shall judge him in the last day.

JESUS then explained to them, "Ye are OUR ADVOCATE sent by us to reprove the Cosmoses of sin, and of righteousness and judgment: of sin (missing the mark); to anyone who believe not My command through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, therefore coming short of entering into Our glory; and of righteousness; to those who put their trust in Me through both of you who represent THE TRINITY, thus worthy to be My Bride; of judgment; the judgment on Satan the Prince of the Cosmoses has already been activated by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, and he shall be casted into the lake of fire at the appointed time to be tormented from ages to ages.

As Our Spirit of Truth whom We have sent to guide My Bride(s) into all truth, ye shall only rehearse and interpret what I speak and warn My Bride of what is to come as the Book of Revelation unfolds through your decreeing and execution."

Joh 16:7 Nevertheless I tell you the truth; It is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Advocate (G3875 "parakletos") will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you. Joh 16:8 And when he is come, he will reprove the Cosmos (G2889 "Kosmos") of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment: Joh 16:9 Of sin, because they believe not on me; Joh 16:10 Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more; Joh 16:11 Of judgment, because the prince of this Cosmos is judged. Joh 16:12 I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now. Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come. Joh 16:14 He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:15 All things that THE FATHER hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
"ABBA FATHER, how would a carnal minded human being believe in what both You and JESUS have just declared into the Cosmoses about us?" David asked solemnly.

THE FATHER then said to David with authority and affirmation, "Shekinaih is OUR OFFENCE and OUR STUMBLING BLOCK that We use to sift all men; especially to those who are called to be part of the 144,000 Brides and Anointed. Those who failed her sifting, will be cast into Hell Level 2, Perdition or Tartarus. Their life shall be shortened due to the chopping of the unfruitful fig trees after the cut-off time, which is the fullness of time.
They will witness the spiritual collapse, followed by bizarre mental and emotional upheavals, which will be evident in their lifetime, much shorter lifetime.
Punishments will also be surfaced in all those that are under them, who failed in Our sifting through Shekinaih. This mean that they and their household will be cursed by us.

Exo 20:5 Thou shalt not bow down thyself to them, nor serve them: for I THE YAHWEH ELOHIM thy ELOHIM am a jealous EL, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children unto the third and fourth generation of them that hate me; Exo 20:6 And shewing mercy unto thousands of them that love me, and keep my commandments.

Exo 34:6 And the LORD passed by before him, and proclaimed, The LORD, The LORD God, merciful and gracious, longsuffering, and abundant in goodness and truth, Exo 34:7 Keeping mercy for thousands, forgiving iniquity and transgression and sin, and that will by no means clear the guilty; visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children, and upon the children's children, unto the third and to the fourth generation.

Therefore, you must not stop to admonish them not to be offended with the Wisdom of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE; but to receive OUR ORACLE through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY; with all readiness of mind like the gracious Bereans who search the scriptures daily to see whether what ye have transcribed and interpreted, are true or not; and not to be critical and judgmental in looking at Shekinaih and your imperfection; so that they will not be judged without mercy.
Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.

On the contrary, they should without prejudice and in lowliness, ask for My grace; as they purposed to do My will, and to know whether the doctrine is from both of you, or from Me; regarding this present truth which will establish them.

Joh 7:15 And the Jews marvelled, saying, How knoweth this man letters, having never learned? Joh 7:16 Jesus answered them, and said, My doctrine is not mine, but his that sent me. Joh 7:17 If any man will do his will, he shall know of the doctrine, whether it be of God, or whether I speak of myself. Joh 7:18 He that speaketh of himself seeketh his own glory: but he that seeketh his glory that sent him, the same is true, and no unrighteousness is in him.
2 Pe 1:12 Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth.

But if they ignore My admonitions through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, and wilfully insult both of you who are MY SPIRIT OF GRACE and OUR ARMS (left and right hand man), after they have received the knowledge of the truth which was hidden for almost six thousand years, but now revealed to them by both of you who represent THE TRINITY, there remains, no more sacrifice for their missing the mark to enter into the glory of My Kingdom, but a certain fearful looking for judgment and fiery indignation without mercy, for both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, are My hands, My sword of decree and sabre of execution of My vengeance on the ungodly and sinners.

Heb 10:26 For if we sin wilfully after that we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remaineth no more sacrifice for sins, Heb 10:27 But a certain fearful looking for of judgment and fiery indignation, which shall devour the adversaries. Heb 10:28 He that despised Moses' law died without mercy under two or three witnesses: Heb 10:29 Of how much sorer punishment, suppose ye, shall he be thought worthy, who hath trodden underfoot the Son of THE ELOHIM, and hath counted the blood of the covenant, wherewith he was sanctified, an unholy thing, and hath insulted (G1796 "enubrizo") the Spirit of grace? Heb 10:30 For we know him that hath said, Vengeance belongeth unto me, I will recompense, saith THE YAHWEH. And again, THE YAHWEH shall judge his people. Heb 10:31 It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living ELOHIM.
"ABBA FATHER, can you enlighten us concerning the robes and crowns, You and JESUS have imparted unto us?" David asked.

THE FATHER then said to David, "I have clothed Shekinaih with My own golden robe, and crowned her with My gold crown, as well as with My seven golden robes and crowned her with their respective gold crowns to give her the authority to represent ME and MY SEVEN NAMES(S). We will seal and execute Our decree to/through Shekinaih, My incarnate, and THE HOLY SPIRIT reincarnate; from her Realm; and to/through JESUS' reincarnation in Aaron K David, who shall co-execute Our decree on His behalf; This is the Protocol of the order of Heaven(s).
She has My authority to decree and execute all My judgment to you which My SON has authorized to represent Him as "KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS".

Shekinaih shall sit on My throne to co-judge with Me, and you shall sit on My SON JESUS' Throne to be the co-executor of My decrees. Both of you shall represent us as THE MAJOR AND THE MINOR YAHWEH EL SHADDAI respectively. For true and righteous are OUR JUDGMENT through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, whom We have given authority over all the plagues in the last days. The unrepentant people who are tormented by these plagues will blaspheme both of you who represent THE TRINITY, who bear OUR NAME(S) to decree and execute these plagues.

Rev 16:7 And I heard another out of the altar say, Even so, THE YAHWEH EL SHADDAI, true and righteous are thy judgments. Rev 16:8 And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and power was given unto him to scorch men with fire. Rev 16:9 And men were scorched with great heat, and blasphemed the name of THE ELOHIM, which hath authority (G1849 "exousia") over these plagues: and they repented not to give him glory. Rev 16:10 And the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of darkness; and they gnawed their tongues for pain, Rev 16:11 And blasphemed THE ELOHIM of heaven because of their pains and their sores, and repented not of their deeds.

Shekinaih, My incarnation and THE HOLY SPIRIT reincarnation, together with you, are Our arm; who shall bring salvation unto Me and uphold My fury; and those who rebel and vex both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, make themselves Our enemy and will drink OUR WRATH through OUR NAME(S), "THE EL SHADDAI", through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE.

Isa 63:4 For the day of vengeance is in mine heart, and the year of my redeemed is come. Isa 63:5 And I looked, and there was none to help; and I wondered that there was none to uphold: therefore mine own arm brought salvation unto me; and my fury, it upheld me. …….. Isa 63:9 In all their affliction he was afflicted, and the angel of his presence saved them: in his love and in his pity he redeemed them; and he bare them, and carried them all the days of old. Isa 63:10 But they rebelled, and vexed his holy Spirit: therefore he was turned to be their enemy, and he fought against them.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, are The Major and The Minor Angel that appeared to My servant John; are The Major and Minor Spirit of Prophecy, the Major and the Minor head of prophecy whom We have appointed to lead and co-lead My last days' two witnesses consisting of My prophets and prophetic intercessors.

Together, I and THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, and My SON JESUS through you, his spokesman and sabre, shall smite the nations and rule them with a rod of iron. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall tread the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of THE EL SHADDAI; Shekinaih in representing Me in decreeing, and THE HOLY SPIRIT in sealing the decree as well as to execute, and you, as Our co-executor as the KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS. The Beast from the Sea (Rev13:1, the Man of Perdition) and the Beast from the Earth (Rev 13:11, the False Prophet) will be cast alive into the lake of fire burning with brimstone by both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, after their defeat in the battle of that great day of EL SHADDAI.

Rev 19:10 And I fell at his feet to worship him. And he said unto me, See thou do it not: I am thy fellowservant and of thy brethren, that have the testimony of Jesus: worship THE ELOHIM: for the testimony of Jesus is The Spirit of Prophecy. Rev 19:11 And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war. Rev 19:12 His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself. Rev 19:13 And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought) of THE ELOHIM. Rev 19:14 And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean. Rev 19:15 And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sabre (G4501 "rhomphaia", that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of THE SHADDAI EL. Rev 19:16 And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS. Rev 19:17 And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God; Rev 19:18 That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great. Rev 19:19 And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army. Rev 19:20 And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone. Rev 19:21 And the remnant were slain with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.
"When will this happen?" David earnestly asked.

JESUS answered and said to him, "When Shekinaih and you stood on the spot facing the spiritual vortex of CERN on 15th June 2016. Had I not personally handed over the golden spiritual padlock and the golden key of CERN (Bottomless pit) to Shekinaih? Had not she passed the golden padlock to you to lock up the spiritual vortex of CERN?

In due time, she will release the decree and the golden key to you, and you will open the abyss at My appointed time as per My instruction to her. Lucifer, through the Beast from the Sea, shall try to change the times and decree of the opening of the portal, but will not succeed because there is no device that can be withheld from us, and nothing can come to pass when We, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, who bear OUR NAME, "THE ADONAI", the event over-turner who has the last laugh, commands it not. For all judgment of good and evil, proceeds from us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY.

Dan 7:25 And he shall speak great words against the most High, and shall wear out the saints of the most High, and think to change times and decrees (H1882 "dath"): and they shall be given into his hand until a time and times and the dividing of time. Dan 7:26 But the judgment shall sit, and they shall take away his dominion, to consume and to destroy it unto the end. Dan 7:27 And the kingdom and dominion, and the greatness of the kingdom under the whole heaven, shall be given to the people of the saints of the most High, whose kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and all dominions shall serve and obey him.
Job 42:2 I know that thou canst do everything, and that no device (H4209 "mezzimah") can be withholden from thee.
Lam 3:37 Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when THE ADONAI commandeth it not? Lam 3:38 Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good?

Abaddon and his Titans will not be released by CERN without Our permission through the decree and execution through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. They are permitted to be released only after My 144,000 Brides are sealed by both of you who represent THE TRINITY. Shekinaih shall give you the key to open the bottomless pit and you shall authorize Abaddon and his titans to torment those who do not have OUR seal for five months.

Rev 9:1 And the fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star fall from heaven unto the earth: and to him was given the key of the bottomless pit. Rev 9:2 And he opened the bottomless pit; and there arose a smoke out of the pit, as the smoke of a great furnace; and the sun and the air were darkened by reason of the smoke of the pit. Rev 9:3 And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power. Rev 9:4 And it was commanded them that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree; but only those men which have not the seal of THE ELOHIM in their foreheads.

Later, after Shekinaih and you have cast the Beast and the False Prophet alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone, ye shall laid hold of Satan and bound him with a great chain for a thousand years in the bottomless pit.

Rev 20:1 And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand. Rev 20:2 And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Diabolos/Accuser, and Satan/ Adversary, and bound him a thousand years, Rev 20:3 And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season.

Those who are beheaded for My witness, and for Our word, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands, shall live and reign with us through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, for a thousand years.

They shall be given thrones and authority to judge the Cosmoses, and the angels that inhabit it. They shall be Our priests, and shall reign with us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, for a thousand years.

1 Co 6:2 Do ye not know that the saints shall judge the world? and if the world shall be judged by you, are ye unworthy to judge the smallest matters? 1 Co 6:3 Know ye not that we shall judge angels? how much more things that pertain to this life?

Rev 20:4 And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of THE ELOHIM, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years. Rev 20:5 But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection. Rev 20:6 Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of THE ELOHIM and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.

ACT 1 SCENE 2 
HEAVEN
The Fourth Witness

Kneeling before the throne of grace, troubled and weary with tears in her eyes, Shekinaih groaned and travailed with pain before THE HEAVENLY FATHER, to vindicate her due to the unbelief of some who needed further assurance of who THE TRINITY proclaim she represents.

Her continuous tears and grief, moved THE HEAVENLY FATHER'S heart, resulting in THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS weeping with her. Sympathizing with her predicament, THE FATHER'S heart was moved to raise up a fourth witness, apart from THE TRINITY, who are the three witnesses, to authenticate with a final seal without dispute, of what THE TRINITY have shown to Shekinaih, is indeed final and true without dispute anymore in the entire Cosmoses.

1Jn 5:6 This is he that came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not by water only, but by water and blood. And it is the Spirit that beareth witness, because the Spirit is truth. 1Jn 5:7 For there are three that bear record in heaven, THE FATHER, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one. 1Jn 5:8 And there are three that bear witness in earth, the Spirit, and the water, and the blood: and these three agree in one. 1Jn 5:9 If we receive the witness of men, the witness of God is greater: for this is the witness of God which he hath testified of his Son.

THE TRINITY, then moved Shekinaih to lay hand over Abraham, one of her disciples, for the spiritual breakthrough for his mother, Jessie Jiang, as well as for THE HOLY SPIRIT to release a wider continuous prophetic river of revelation into her, to be the fourth witness.

After the prayer, Abraham traveled from Singapore to meet his mother Jessie in Hong Kong International Airport the following day. As the mother and son pray, Jessie's spiritual eyes were suddenly wide opened to behold the following testimony of who Shekinaih is through the continuous visions.
Here are the translations of two of her visions which were recorded in Mandarin and translated into the English Language by her son Abraham.

title: THE CONFIRMATION OF WHO SHEKINAIH IS

segments.text: THE CONFIRMATION OF WHO SHEKINAIH IS
The First Vision

"You should have released all your burdens a long time ago. There are thousands of angels encouraging you to release your burdens to Me. You are supposed to fly with so many angels around you", Jessie told Abraham, her son, what she just heard JESUS saying to her.

Jessie then continued to relate her vision to her son, "I saw many angels in the sky and a lot money was floating in the air for me to grab. There are Singapore Dollars, Hong Kong Dollars, Renminbi, Korean Won, Indian Rupee, even Bangladesh Taka ...
I was flying and taking you so that we can be relieved. I saw your aunt smiling and Jose was smiling as well.
I heard Jose saying to me, "Haven't I told you a long time ago? You just didn't listen!"
I saw Aaron K. David playing music and Shekinaih was nodding and smiling as well.

I saw Shekinaih giving me a crown and I was wearing a white gown. She brought me to JESUS and said: "JESUS, this is a child of God. I give her now to you because she is pure. She has let go of everything. I now return her to you."
I heard Shekinaih saying to me, "Your destiny is going to be fulfilled soon. At the same time, I shall give Abraham to you as well but I need to train him more to make you, his mother, proud of him".

Then I saw you turned into a bride wearing white walking toward a gate made of gems. As Shekinaih made a trumpet sound with her voice, I saw you being blew into the gate. I was already inside the gate and I looked like a phoenix. I also saw Jose. He was dressed like a warrior leading many more brides walking towards the gate.

After Shekinaih brought you in, she then sat on her throne which was behind JESUS' Throne on His right. Seated like an Empress, she was looking at all the Brides wearing white who were entering the gate.

I saw David leading many worshippers singing and praising God. I couldn't understand what they were singing. He was leading some strange creatures to sing. They were all covered with gold. I saw them all facing a big emerald throne. I saw that they were like ancient warriors carrying staffs. David was waving a staff conducting the heavenly choirs. The whole heavenly scene looked like a king inspecting his troops in a grand ceremony.
There were Brides everywhere wearing holy garments. The path they were treading on were paved with gems.
I was seated on the left of JESUS at the top of the triangular formation of the Brides. Shekinaih was seated on the right of JESUS but on a higher plane.
I then heard THE FATHER said to me, "You are the first among the ten thousand."
Initially, I was wearing white but now I'm wearing fiery red bridal gown and my crown was shining brightly. I then shouted, "Hallelujah! Hallelujah!"
I then led some angels and we started to dance for JESUS who was wearing a red gown.

All the people who were present were watching me as I danced difficult moves. JESUS was blowing His breath toward a certain spot as I was dancing. Wherever He blew His breath toward that spot, I danced towards that place.

Then, I saw THE FATHER. He was seated on His throne on the highest plane. As I looked upward from where I was, I saw JESUS seated on His throne on a plane lower than Shekinaih's throne which was lower than THE FATHER'S throne.

THE FATHER was reclining on His throne and His face was very big and His hairs were very white. I couldn't see the shape of His face but it was very big. Like a hologram, He hovered above everyone and looked at everyone.

Then, I heard Him said, "These are all My children. I thank you JESUS for you have done it. You are My proudest who honors Me the most. Your duty is fulfilled. I will bring these people into My kingdom to let them live for a thousand years on the planet. This is My kingdom and My place. You are all the undying spirits which will live forever".
Then I heard THE FATHER roared. As He roared, the place was filled with holy fire and everybody was speaking in tongues.
The Second Vision

I saw the number, "1000", and then, the place that contained Satan was opened; and the python Satan broke free of the chains, and jumped out of the crevice. I saw the opening of the pit closed again, and the souls in the bottomless pit remain locked up there.

I saw Satan stood with his big belly like a standing python. He shouted loudly: "Alpha and Omega! Do you still want to spar with me? I tell you, I cannot be defeated; because I'm made by you. Let all the people be tormented forever!"

Then, I saw THE FATHER appeared in the sky and blew fire, and it shattered the devil. The bits of its flesh flew everywhere. Although the flesh of Satan was gone, his broken and dejected spirit was still lingering near the border of Hell. He could still control the people in Hell.
Then I saw THE FATHER put Shekinaih on the throne again. She was carrying a staff on her hand; and THE FATHER said to her, "I will commence the last judgment."

David was at the right hand of Shekinaih, wearing smartly in white like a scribe. Jose was at her left, wearing a white wig like a lawyer. Shekinaih never spoke a word. She was holding a scepter like the scepter of a king, and wearing the tiara of an Empress.

The black spirits in hell came one by one, and kneeled before her. Shekinaih never spoke a word, and David was writing something on a book. As she pointed her scepter towards the black spirits, some became white and flew away. Some became a puddle of water.

David was simultaneously writing on a book about those that became white. Shekinaih was pointing and commanding with the scepter, and Jose was busy counting the numbers. Whenever Shekinaih used the scepter to point at the spirits, it seemed like the decision is final. I saw Jose slamming his gavel concluding the trial as he was recording it.
I saw these words: 3 days and 3 nights; 7x7=49 days; and 999.
(Interpreted by David, 3 days and 3 nights refers to those who are beheaded in Revelation 11, 7x7= 49 refers to wandering souls, 999 refers to innumerable souls)

There were murderers, rapists, teenagers, offenders, thieves, arsonists, evil judges, pastors, teachers, and etc. For those unrighteous and lawless pastors, as Shekinaih wielded her sword in her hand to swirl the spirit, the spirit of the pastor was shattered into nothingness.

Every spirit who committed different crimes came, and David seemed to be recording their crimes. As Shekinaih pointed her scepter, the spirits will go to the place they were allotted. I saw David drawing boxes and recording where they went. The boxes were like cages, a man here and another man there…

Satan was agitated as he witnessed the judgment. He had a black hideous face and was bodiless. He had become powerless. For every judgment passed, he desired to interfere but to no avail; because he had no more power.

Then, I saw Shekinaih judged the spirits that were floating in the air. They were not in our temple nor in Hell, and their numbers were numerous. As she waved her scepter, the spirit was dragged over like a puppet. They were scared as well and didn't know where to go. David drew another box on top of the previous one, and as Shekinaih pointed at them, the spirit became very small; and went inside the box which David drew.

They were judged one by one. Then I saw the word, "108", then it became "1008", then "10008", then "100008", and the pattern continues as the judgment continues. I don't know what this means. Anyways, when Shekinaih's scepter moved, one spirit will come after another after being judged; and David will put it into a box, and the spirit will disappear before THE GREAT WHITE THRONE.
On the side of the Kingdom of Heaven, I heard JESUS saying to us, "It is over, from the beginning to the last, it is finished".
We then asked Him, "What will happen after this thousand years?"

JESUS then replied, "I don't know. From the beginning till the end, I don't know. Only THE FATHER knows. It's over. I think I should go back to THE FATHER. What about you? Do you follow Me or not? I don't know. You are free to decide".

Satan also said that it was going to be over. His spirit was gone and became a tiny little ball; and David put his spirit into the box in his book at the lowest; most insignificant, and smallest place.

THE FATHER also left. The fire in Hell continued to burn but all the spirits were gone. There were still many white floating spirits who were alive. When Shekinaih pointed her scepter, some of them were allotted to be among us. Other just flew into the boxes that David drew.
The people among us could fly. They played and danced and worshipped in glorious halls. They also used computers and etc.… it's like we are living in a fantasy world.
Then I saw many planets moving in the expanse. Many of them had lights.
I saw the enormous head of THE FATHER controlling them. I heard Him said, "I'm the Beginning and the Last."
Everything is under the control of THE FATHER. The planets were in the black space and I also saw the Milky Way and comets. THE FATHER was in the background of the expanse.
I saw the Temple of God. The building is heavy on earth but light in the sky.

JESUS then said to me, "This is made of a heavenly material. When the time comes, I will put the sketches and plans into your son Abraham's head. Every nail and hole will I enlighten him. They can't be slanted or out of place. This is the temple that the saints of old (like David, Abraham and etc.) did not complete. Now I hand this to Abraham, your son, to design and build to bring My beloved children to follow Me".
Excitedly I asked Him, "Lord, when will the time be for him to build it?"
JESUS said to me, "Maybe many years later, I don't know, only THE FATHER knows. I will give revelation to him when the time comes, but he need to prepare for this temple".
I asked JESUS, "Is Hell really like this?"
JESUS replied, "Yes."
I said to Him, "Where will we go after the thousand years?"
JESUS replied, "I don't know; give everything to THE FATHER to handle."
I said to Him, "Is it true that all those who were dead will be resurrected then?"
JESUS replied, "That depends on My Kingdom and how pure their hearts are. I will choose some."
I then asked, "Lord, when the building is built, we will be very old by then, how can we follow you?"
JESUS then said to me, "All of you are young Brides. You will follow me. You will be strong like bulls in their prime."
I then asked Him, "Is there anything else you want to say to me?"

JESUS then replied, "You must trust Me. You must believe Me. I'll give you everything. Trust Me for there are very few who will really trust Me to see the Kingdom. So, you must trust Me. The purpose of this vision is to tell My children to have faith in My Kingdom; because there are so few who made it into My Kingdom. For those who are chosen, they are very precious to Me; as I am to THE FATHER. Jessie, you are a very kind woman. You are pure and innocent. You are just like a little girl. I trust you, but first you must trust Me."
Many days later, Abraham returned from Hong Kong and excitedly shared his mother's vision he had recorded with Shekinaih, Aaron K David, Jose and the rest of the disciples.

Upon hearing the visions, Shekinaih heard THE FATHER said, "I have heard your petition asking for a breakthrough in the thinking of all My beloved children, to believe that I have sent you, even Aaron K David and Jose as My last days' leaders, to lead them to Heavenly Mount Zion to fulfill their destiny in Me.
Therefore, I have given Jessie, Abraham's mother, the following vision while she was praying with her son in Hong Kong to:
Convict her and the rest of My struggling children of their belief in us, THE TRINITY, through you, and Aaron K David, OUR REPRESENTATIVES, and My general Jose.
Establish her and the rest of My children's faith in us through you and David, OUR REPRESENTATIVES, and Our general Jose.
Give her and the rest of My other children, a glimpse of their future in Me through you and Aaron K David, OUR REPRESENTATIVES, and My general Jose."

Upon hearing what THE FATHER said, Shekinaih was comforted. Upon hearing the visions, Aaron K David, Jose and the rest of their disciples' faith in Shekinaih were also established and their hope restored.

ACT 1 SCENE 3 
Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue, Singapore
FINAL JUDGMENT CRITERIA
Many unemployed individuals were queuing outside the Crowned Eagles Global Meeting Venue waiting to enter the premises.

Meanwhile, Shekinaih dressed in Golden Empress' robe with THE TRINITY (THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS CHRIST) in white robes walking behind her entered the Venue. Shekinaih then sat on her destined seat, which is, "THE GREAT WHITE THRONE", Judgment Seat.
Aaron K David, in Golden Emperor's robe was already seated on his destined seat titled, "The Scribe", on the right of Shekinaih's seat.
Jose, who was wearing a lawyer's white wig, stood in front of David's seat, began to slam the gavel and declared, "Call to Order…"
Paul then opened the door of this Heavenly Court Venue and everyone rushed to enter.

After everyone have seated, shortly, many demons wearing black carrying many books of accusation, began to walk in to place all the books in front of Shekinaih's Judge Table on her right. Concurrently, many angels wearing white, also carrying many books of commendation full of light, came to place these books on the Judge's table in front of Shekinaih on her left.
THE TRINITY, then stood in front of Shekinaih and released a full stack of white scrolls tied with red ribbons titled, "THE FINAL JUDGMENT DECREE" into her head.
Suddenly, the heaven opened and a giant book beaming brightly, Titled, "THE FINAL JUDGEMENT CRITERIA", descended from the heavens, and landed on Shekinaih's Judge Table.

She then moved to open this book that landed on her table. As she flipped open the pages of this book, scenes of their recent trip to Hell with JESUS began to unfold in front of her; like a 3D movie where JESUS expounded to them in detail(s), how the souls are being judged. She then took this book and whispered to David, and instructed him to make known, "THE FINAL JUDGEMENT CRITERIA", written in this book as a proclamation to The Three Realms, signified by the people, demons, and angels that are present.
And the story begins…......

ACT 1 SCENE 4
Level 4 of Hell/ Heaven

title: WHAT HAPPENS WHEN A MAN DIEs?

segments.text: WHAT HAPPENS WHEN A MAN DIEs?
Shekinaih and David, were transported to the Gate of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, where THE TRINITY was already at the gate waiting for them.

THE TRINITY, then stretched out their left hands to usher them to enter this gate. As Shekinaih was about to enter the gate, THE FATHER, suddenly waved His palm across her eyes to enable her to see deeper revelations in visions; hereafter, she related to David throughout their sojourn in the spirit world.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a man in a coffin, and superimposed on the coffin was a bridge. I saw a two-horned hell demon, with a trident on one hand, dragging a soul before the gate of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE. This soul stepped to enter the gate with THE TRINITY'S weighing scale located above the gate; and automatically, his Good Books or Books of Credit/Light, were placed on left side of the scale and his Bad Books or Black Books, were being placed on the right side of a scale; and the results were then measured against THE TRINITY'S JUDGEMENT STANDARD or the just weight of THE YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE. If the Bad/Black Books outweigh the Good/Credit/Full of Light Books, the difference will be that the soul is thereby, "Found Wanting". Henceforth, as the soul entered something like an infrared sensor door entry screen, the soul was automatically assessed and weighed. The soul was value at 40.5 %, which was then being imprinted in his spirit man; and was led to stand in his respective row among the multitude of souls that had earlier been assessed. And they all stood before THE GREAT WHITE THRONE. They were all in their respective rows according to the weight of their spirit man; from the lowest to the highest percentage, from left to right.

Rev 20:11 And I saw a THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them. Rev 20:12 And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before THE ELOHIM; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works. Rev 20:13 And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and Hades delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works. And death and Hades were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death. And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.
I then saw you and me inside a globe-like library, where the books of the deeds of all humanity were stored.

I then saw us seated on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE. On the left where we were seated, there was a shelf filled with the books of the dead, whose works were recorded. I saw THE FATHER released numerous decrees into me, and as I passed the decree by making a trumpet sound through my mouth, immediately the decrees flew from my mouth into the books which were in the shelf, and their fate were sealed.

I saw you co-executing judgment, according to the decree that was released to you by me on the Sons of Adam. The rich and the poor who were dead, were all standing in front of us. As you co-execute the decree by making a trumpet sound with your mouth, I saw the book of each dead, flew into your hand. You then threw the books of the dead with the decree that was inside, into the spirit man of him that was judged. Following that, I saw angels and demons came, and took the soul to his allotted dwelling, according to the judgment that has been written and executed, some to different levels of hell, and some to different levels of heavens.

Psa 62:9 Surely the sons of Adam (H120, H1121) are emptiness (H1892 "hebel" vanity), and men of high degree are a falsehood (H3577 "kazab" lie): to be laid in the balance (H3976 "mozen" a pair of scales), they are altogether lighter than emptiness (H1892 "hebel" vanity). Psa 62:10 Trust not in oppression, and become not vain in robbery: if riches increase, set not your heart upon them. Psa 62:11 THE ELOHIM hath spoken once; twice have I heard this; that power belongeth unto THE ELOHIM. Psa 62:12 Also unto thee, O THE ADONAI, belongeth mercy: for thou renderest to every man according to his work.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does the vision that Shekinaih saw signifies?
JESUS: The Bridge signifies the transition from life to death. When a man gives up his soul, he immediately enters into judgment.
Heb 9:27 And as it is appointed unto men once to die, but after this the judgment.
To the merciful, I will show myself merciful. Those who are perfect in mercy is on par with one of My just weight.
Pro 16:10 A divine sentence is in the lips of the king: his mouth transgresseth not in judgment. Pro 16:11 A just weight and balance are THE YAHWEH'S: all the weights of the bag are his work.

Admonish My children not to be deceived. I am not mocked. For whatsoever a man sows that shall he also reap. Anyone who sows to the flesh, shall of the flesh reap defilement, and great misery from the shit demons in Hell. But he that sows to the Spirit, shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting in heaven.

Gal 6:7 Be not deceived; God is not mocked: for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap. Gal 6:8 For he that soweth to his flesh shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the Spirit shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting.

There is a time, and judgment for whatever one did on Earth. Only those who keep our commandment, shall know no evil. Nobody knows when death will knock at his door. And nobody has the power to resist him or be discharged from the wickedness he sowed, when Satan asks for his soul.

Ecc 8:5 Whoso keepeth the commandment shall know no evil thing: and a wise man's heart discerneth both time and judgment. Ecc 8:6 Because to every purpose there is time and judgment, therefore the misery of man is great upon him. Ecc 8:7 For he knoweth not that which shall be: for who can tell him when it shall be? Ecc 8:8 There is no man that hath power over the spirit to retain the spirit; neither hath he power in the day of death: and there is no discharge in that war; neither shall wickedness deliver those that are given to it.

Tell My children, not to put Me to the test of My longsuffering; for there is a time and judgment. They must fear Me to live a pure and holy life in THE HOLY SPIRIT, and whatsoever I command them to do, they must do it with all their might; for in Sheol/Hell, there is nothing they can do to change their fate.

Ecc 8:11 Because sentence against an evil work is not executed speedily, therefore the heart of the sons of Adam is fully set in them to do evil. Ecc 8:12 Though a sinner do evil an hundred times, and his days be prolonged, yet surely I know that it shall be well with them that fear THE ELOHIM, which fear before him: Ecc 8:13 But it shall not be well with the wicked, neither shall he prolong his days, which are as a shadow; because he feareth not before THE ELOHIM.

Ecc 9:7 Go thy way, eat thy bread with joy, and drink thy wine with a merry heart; for THE ELOHIM now accepteth thy works. Ecc 9:8 Let thy garments be always white; and let thy head lack no ointment. Ecc 9:9 Live joyfully with the wife whom thou lovest all the days of the life of thy vanity, which he hath given thee under the sun, all the days of thy vanity: for that is thy portion in this life, and in thy labour which thou takest under the sun. Ecc 9:10 Whatsoever thy hand findeth to do, do it with thy might; for there is no work, nor device, nor knowledge, nor wisdom, in the Sheol (H7585 "sheol"), whither thou goest.
Tell them to flee from youthful lust; and not to defile their body for they are the Temple of THE HOLY GHOST. Sorrow awaits those who do not turn from these evil ways

Ecc 11:9 Rejoice, O young man, in thy youth; and let thy heart cheer thee in the days of thy youth, and walk in the ways of thine heart, and in the sight of thine eyes: but know thou that for all these things THE ELOHIM will bring thee into judgment. Ecc 11:10 Therefore remove sorrow from thy heart, and put away evil from thy flesh: for childhood and youth are vanity.

Warn them to fear Me, and keep My commands which I have given through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. For through both of you, We shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil before OUR GREAT WHITE THRONE.

Ecc 12:13 Let us hear the conclusion of the whole matter: Fear THE ELOHIM, and keep his commandments: for this is the whole duty of man. Ecc 12:14 For THE ELOHIM shall bring every work into judgment, with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil.
Caution them to take heed to My Judgment Criteria; so that they may not be found wanting against My just weight.
Dan 5:27 TEKEL; Thou art weighed in the balances, and art found wanting.
Above all, warn them not to judge one another, for they will be condemned by the Diabolos if they commit the same thing.

Rom 2:1 Therefore thou art inexcusable, O man, whosoever thou art that judgest: for wherein thou judgest another, thou condemnest thyself; for thou that judgest doest the same things. Rom 2:2 But we are sure that the judgment of God is according to truth against them which commit such things. Rom 2:3 And thinkest thou this, O man, that judgest them which do such things, and doest the same, that thou shalt escape the judgment of God?

PART 2
General Judgment Criteria
Criteria for Judgment
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you reveal to us in details your Judgment Criteria in which all souls are to be judged on?
JESUS: We will judge each one based on the following Criterias:
1) The Purity of Heart
2) Be Holy Like Me
3) Be Perfect Like Me
4) Walk of Faith
5) Heart of Gratitude
6) Be Sober
We will weigh all heart to test their purity, like silver and gold are assayed.
Pro 17:3 The fining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold: but THE YAHWEH trieth the hearts.
The heart is prone to evil if it is not guarded against; for evil communications corrupt good manners.

Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted (H6121 "aqab" From H6117; in the original sense, a knoll, as swelling up, polluted) from everything, and made frail (H605 "anash" A primitive root; to be frail, feeble: who can know it? Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
1 Co 15:33 Be not deceived: evil communications corrupt good manners.
Therefore, do not be mutated by the evil spirit that polluted Noah's generation; where every imagination of their thoughts of their heart, was only evil continually.
Gen 6:5 And THE ELOHIM saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.

Keep thy tongue from evil and do good; seek peace and pursue it. Our eyes are upon the righteous, and Our eyes are open to their cry when they are rewarded evil for the good (Psa 34:13-14). Cease from anger, and forsake wrath: fret not thyself in any wise to do evil. For evildoers shall be cut off: but those that wait upon us, THE YAHWEH, the righteous Judge, shall inherit the earth and dwell forever (Psa 37:8-9, 27). They that rewarded you evil for good, and hatred for your love, do not resist them with evil, but refrain your feet from every evil way and heed My warning (Psa 119:101). Set a watch on your mouth; keep the door of your lips. Do not be defiled by them (Psa 141:3-5). For whosoever rewardeth evil for good, evil shall not depart from his house (Pro 17:13). Blessed are ye, when men shall revile you, and persecute you, and shall say all manner of evil against you falsely, for My sake. Rejoice, and be exceeding glad: for great is your reward in heaven: for so persecuted they the prophets which were before you (Mat 5:11-12). Resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also. And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him have thy cloke also. And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain. Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away. Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which abuse you, and persecute you; That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust. Be ye therefore perfect in mercy, even as your FATHER which is in heaven is perfect. A good man out of the good treasure of the heart bringeth forth good things: and an evil man out of the evil treasure bringeth forth evil things. Every idle word that men shall speak, they shall give account thereof in the Day of Judgment. For by thy words thou shalt be justified, and by thy words thou shalt be condemned (Mat 12:35-37). Those things which proceed out of the mouth come forth from the heart; and they defile the man. For out of the heart proceeds evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, fornications, thefts, false witness, and blasphemies: these are the things which defile a man (Mat 15:18-20). Recompense to no man evil for evil. Provide things honest in the sight of all men. If it be possible, as much as lieth in you, live peaceably with all men. Avenge not yourselves, but rather give place unto wrath: for it is written, Vengeance is Mine; I will repay. Therefore if thine enemy hunger, feed him; if he thirst, give him drink: for in so doing thou shalt heap coals of fire on his head. Be not overcome of evil, but overcome evil with good (Rom 12:18-21). Walk in love, take no inventory of evil done to you (1 Co 13:4-8). Rejoice evermore. Pray uninterruptedly. In everything good or bad give thanks: for this is Our will concerning you for We are the scriptwriter of your life. Quench not your spirit man. Despise not My prophetic words given to you. Prove all things; hold fast that which is good. Abstain from all appearance of evil. And Our peace will sanctify you wholly; your whole spirit and soul and body will be preserved blameless unto My coming (1Th 5:15-23).

Therefore, let no evil suspicions (1Ti 6:4), evil conscience (Heb 10:22), respecter of persons (evil thoughts) (Jas 2:4), envying, strife (Jas 3:16-18), evil speaking (judging) (Jas 4:11-12) defile you.

Sanctify My FATHER in your hearts: and be ready always to give an answer to every unreasonable and wicked men (2Th 3:1-3) that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in you with meekness and fear: Having a good conscience; that, whereas they speak evil of you, as of evildoers, they may be ashamed that falsely accuse your good conversation in Me. For it is better, if is Our will, that ye suffer for well doing, than for evil doing (1 Pe 3:15-17).
DAVID: JESUS, all these are in the bible but not many have perfected it.

JESUS: Pursue it My friend, keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life (Pro 4:23). Whosoever loves pureness of heart and are gracious in his speech, I, JESUS, shall be their bridegroom/friend.
Pro 22:11 He that loveth pureness of heart, for the grace of his lips the king shall be his friend (H7453 "rea" companion, lover, husband).
He who guards his heart pure, shall indeed enter My kingdom, and behold My FATHER, and Me.
Mat 5:8 Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see THE ELOHIM.

My oracle which I have spoken through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall indeed purify them who believe and receive.
Joh 15:3 Now ye are pure (G2513 "katharos" pure) through the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said, including the thought)) which I have spoken unto you.
1. Purity of Heart
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how do you judge on the purity of hearts, and how can one keep himself pure?
JESUS: I judge the purity of hearts, based on the following areas; and one must reflect and be converted in the following area of his/her ways.
Singleness of Heart
Jealousy into Generosity of heart in giving to others as unto Me
Selfishness into Think on behalf of others
Spitefulness into Be happy for others, Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness.
Be comparable with My Spirit
Be discreet with My secret when I whisper to your ear
Honor one another and communicate with love
Be respectful to My representatives as unto Me. Be 100% Yielded
Sacrificial Love (Greatest Priority)
Attitude of the heart to one another as unto Me
Servant hood attitude (Prerequisite)
Do My will as commanded by us through Shekinaih and those I put above you
Singleness of Heart
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what do you mean by Singleness of Heart?

JESUS: To be single is to be 100% yielded to THE FATHER'S will. In every generation, only those who walk entire (H8549 "tamiym" entire, perfect) in their hearts before us are imputed to be righteous to walk with us. These are Our Noah.
Gen 6:9 These are the generations of Noah: Noah was a just man and perfect (H8549 "tamiym" entire, perfect) in his generations, and Noah walked with THE ELOHIM.
These shall abide in My tabernacle and dwell in Our holy mountain because he walketh entirely 100% yielded to My FATHER'S will.

Psa 15:1 A Psalm of David. LORD, who shall abide in thy tabernacle? who shall dwell in thy holy hill? Psa 15:2 He that walketh entire (H8549 "tamiym" entire, perfect), and worketh righteousness, and speaketh the truth in his heart.
These shall indeed receive their eternal inheritance in heaven and even during Our great judgment on earth; in famine, they shall be satisfied.

Psa 37:18 THE YAHWEH knoweth the days of the entire H8549 "tamiym"): and their inheritance shall be for ever. Psa 37:19 They shall not be ashamed in the evil time: and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.
Jealousy INTO Generosity of heart in giving to others as unto me
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is Jealousy a demon?
JESUS: Yes, it is an unclean spirit. Be on guard of this spirit of Jealousy lest you be overwhelmed and be provoked to jealousy and be defiled.

Num 5:14 And the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he be jealous of his wife, and she be defiled: or if the spirit of jealousy come upon him, and he be jealous of his wife, and she be not defiled:

Satan, because of his jealousy against Shekinaih and your counterpart angel, which We have given to preside over THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, was rejected by us and thrown out of Heavenly Zion. Again, it was because of jealousy, that Satan enticed and caused the spiritual death of Adam and Eve. He later impregnated Eve in a dream, and became THE FATHER of Cain, whose name means Jealousy. Cain, because of Jealousy, hated his brother Abel; and murdered him, and was rejected by us. Those who give in and live in Jealousy, shall likewise be rejected by us unto eternal damnation.
1Jn 3:15 Whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no murderer hath eternal life abiding in him.
Therefore, be not animated by this demon from hell for it stirs up strife and confusion and every evil work.

Jas 3:14 But if ye have bitter envying and strife in your hearts, glory not, and lie not against the truth. Jas 3:15 This wisdom descendeth not from above, but is earthly, sensual, devilish. Jas 3:16 For where envying and strife is, there is confusion and every evil work.
This demon torments the spirit, soul, and body unto the rottenness of the body and ultimately end up in hell.
Pro 14:30 A sound heart is the life of the flesh: but envy the rottenness of the bones.
Job 5:2 For wrath killeth the foolish man, and envy slayeth the silly one.
Eschew this demon or you be found wanting against Our standard weight of purity to be My Bride and inherit Our kingdom.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of God.
Selfishness INTO Think on behalf of others

To meet Our criteria of judgment as My Bride, one must purpose to be pure in heart in selflessness in My FATHER's love towards one another in truth; even laying their life for one another as I have done.
Then Our love shall be perfected in them; and in the Day of Judgment, they shall not fear nor be found wanting.

1Jn 4:17 Herein is our love made perfect, that we may have boldness in the Day of Judgment: because as he is, so are we in this world. 1Jn 4:18 There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear: because fear hath torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.

Love seeketh not her own. Therefore, let no man seek his own but Our children's salvation so that when their hearts are weighed before OUR THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, they shall be found worthy to enter into glory.
Co 13:5 Doth not behave itself unseemly, seeketh not her own, is not easily provoked, thinketh no evil;
Spitefulness INTO Be happy for others, Peaceable fruit of Righteousness.

Spitefulness is evil. Refrain your tongue from spiteful evil speaking. Be diligent to pursue peace and be found of Me in peace unto righteousness; so as to enter eternal life, and see good days in Our New Heavens and Earth.

1 Pe 3:10 For he that will love life, and see good days, let him refrain his tongue from evil, and his lips that they speak no guile: 1 Pe 3:11 Let him eschew evil, and do good; let him seek peace, and ensue it.
Be comparable with my Spirit
The spirit of a man is synonymous to his heart. Therefore, We will weigh the heart to see whether it is comparable with My Spirit.

WE, THE YAHWEH, delight in mercy, judgment, righteousness, and in them who are fully circumcised in trusting us with all their heart, and not leaning unto their own understanding; but in all their ways, acknowledge us in directing their paths.
