THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall surely come quickly as a Judge to testify against all these sorcerers which masqueraded themselves as Our ministers to take captive My children and led them into errors, and against the adulterers (apostate churches) who commit fornication with Mystery Babylon by having communion with the body of Antichrist (Anti-Anointed Organizations) instead of the real body of Christ/Anointed Ones, and against the false swearers who bear false witness against My 144,000 Anointed/Brides, and against those that oppress (persecute) the hireling (My ministers of righteousness) in his wages, the widow (Heavenly Mother Zion/Shekinaih), and the fatherless (144,000 children of THE ELOHIM), and those that turn aside the stranger from his right (7,000 children of resurrection who live like strangers in this age knowing that this evil age is not their home but the age to come and did not receive the Mark of the Beast, therefore they are deprived of their right to buy and sell).

Mal 3:5 And I will come near to you to judgment; and I will be a swift witness against the sorcerers, and against the adulterers, and against false swearers, and against those that oppress the hireling in his wages, the widow, and the fatherless, and that turn aside the stranger from his right, and fear not me, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.

In the fullness of time, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall come with our 7,000 resurrected messengers/holy angels, and shall gather out of My kingdom all these sorcerers, false swearers, persecutors which caused the Children of the Kingdom to fall from grace and to work lawlessness; and shall cast them into a furnace of fire; there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth. Then shall the righteous shine forth as the sun in the kingdom of their Father.

Mat 13:24 Another parable put he forth unto them, saying, The kingdom of heaven is likened unto a man which sowed good seed in his field: Mat 13:25 But while men slept, his enemy came and sowed tares among the wheat, and went his way. Mat 13:26 But when the blade was sprung up, and brought forth fruit, then appeared the tares also. Mat 13:27 So the servants of the householder came and said unto him, Sir, didst not thou sow good seed in thy field? from whence then hath it tares? Mat 13:28 He said unto them, An enemy hath done this. The servants said unto him, Wilt thou then that we go and gather them up? Mat 13:29 But he said, Nay; lest while ye gather up the tares, ye root up also the wheat with them. Mat 13:30 Let both grow together until the harvest: and in the time of harvest I will say to the reapers, Gather ye together first the tares, and bind them in bundles to burn them: but gather the wheat into my barn.

Matt 13:37 He that soweth the good seed is the Son of man; Mat 13:38 The field is the world; the good seed are the children of the kingdom; but the tares are the children of the wicked one; Mat 13:39 The enemy that sowed them is the devil; the harvest is the end of the world; and the reapers are the angels. Mat 13:40 As therefore the tares are gathered and burned in the fire; so shall it be in the end of this world. Mat 13:41 The Son of man shall send forth his angels, and they shall gather out of his kingdom all things that offend, and them which do iniquity; Mat 13:42 And shall cast them into a furnace of fire: there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth. Mat 13:43 Then shall the righteous shine forth as the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Who hath ears to hear, let him hear.

Yes, We swear by Our holiness; that Shekinaih and you are Our husbandman, representing OUR NAME(S) and OUR COMING, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE respectively, the Teacher of Righteousness, who shall nourish the potential barley Anointed one(s) and wheat Bride(s) with Our prophetic rain doctrine regarding Our Seven Names in the early and latter rain season respectively.

Deu 32:1 Give ear, O ye heavens, and I will speak; and hear, O earth, the words of my mouth. Deu 32:2 My doctrine shall drop as the rain, my speech shall distil as the dew, as the small rain upon the tender herb, and as the showers upon the grass: Deu 32:3 Because I will publish the name of THE YAHWEH: ascribe ye greatness unto our ELOHIM.

Upon their respective harvest time, they shall be brought into Our barn (Kingdom). THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall come as the Teacher of Righteousness, and through the release of THE FATHER'S decree and the sealing and execution of THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, and co-executed by Me through you, shall bring no rain for 1,260 days so that there is a famine during the 1,260 days of Great Tribulation to test all that dwell on the earth. Likewise, in the same manner, through the release of THE FATHER'S decree and the sealing and execution of THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, and co-executed by Me through you, the rain will be released to ripen/resurrect/rapture the barley/wheat; as Our COMING.

Jas 5:7 Be patient therefore, brethren, unto the coming of the Lord. Behold, the husbandman waiteth for the precious fruit of the earth, and hath long patience for it, until he receive the early and latter rain. Jas 5:17 Elias was a man subject to like passions as we are, and he prayed earnestly that it might not rain: and it rained not on the earth by the space of three years and six months. Jas 5:18 And he prayed again, and the heaven gave rain, and the earth brought forth her fruit. Jas 5:8 Be ye also patient; stablish your hearts: for the coming of the Lord draweth nigh.

Therefore, it is impossible for those who were once enlightened through both of you, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE respectively, and have tasted of the heavenly gifts imparted by you, and were made partners (trained and sent by CEG) of the Holy Ghost (Shekinaih), and have tasted (experience in) the good word (spokesman) of THE ELOHIM, and the powers of the age to come (power imparted by them), if they shall fall away, to renew them again unto repentance; seeing they crucify to themselves the Son of THE ELOHIM afresh, and put Him to an open shame. For the earth which drinketh in the rain (prophetic teaching) that cometh oft upon it, and bringeth forth herbs meet for them by whom it is dressed, receiveth blessing from THE ELOHIM: But that which beareth thorns and briers (sit under the covering of the ministry of the sons of Belial) is rejected, and is nigh unto cursing; whose end is to be burned.

2Sa 23:6 But the sons of Belial shall be all of them as thorns thrust away, because they cannot be taken with hands: 2Sa 23:7 But the man that shall touch them must be fenced with iron and the staff of a spear; and they shall be utterly burned with fire in the same place.
D) MOCK NOT

SHEKINAIH: I saw when a person shoot an arrow (with the word, "Mock") at another person, five other persons shot back the arrows (with the word, "Mock") back at him. When one person mocks at another, five more persons will mock back at him.

JESUS: In the last days, many ungodly apostate Christian Ministers and Christians who knew not My FATHER experientially, are more susceptible to unrighteous and lawless lips, and covetous tongues. They shall worship the beast, and mock at My true Prophets and righteous ones. These shall not go unpunished because they are mocking their Maker.

Pro 17:4 A wicked doer giveth heed to false lips; and a liar giveth ear to a naughty tongue. Pro 17:5 Whoso mocketh the poor reproacheth his Maker: and he that is glad at calamities shall not be unpunished

These shall stand with the Accuser of the brethren (devil) and betray their brothers/sisters and My true servants, the prophets. Therefore, We will curse them and they shall be found guilty. This is the last days' evil generation of apostate Christian ministers and Christians that despises their HEAVENLY FATHER, and does not bless THE HOLY SPIRIT, their HEAVENLY MOTHER, represented by Shekinaih.
This is the generation that is wise in their own eyes, uncircumcised in their heart, having confidence in their carnal mindedness, and yet is not washed from their filthiness.

This is the generation, O how lofty are their eyes! and their eyelids are lifted up. This is the generation, whose teeth are as swords, and their jaw teeth as knives, to devour My poor (7,000 afflicted) from off the earth, and the needy (144,000 Brides) from among men.

Sheol (Hades) with its prison, and Maveth (Death) with its unquenchable fire will never be satisfied; even if all these wicked Christian Ministers and Christians have filled their prisons and lake of fire.

For these apostates' eyes have mocked their Heavenly Father and despised to obey their Heavenly Mother, therefore they shall be despised by the great dragon and be rounded up by flood of Arabs in different Countries to be imprisoned in Concentration camps and put in gas chambers. This group of betrayers will have their sights taken from them and will die a terrible death permitted by us with their eyes melting and oozing out from their eye sockets due to toxic gas.
Therefore, the haughty will no longer be haughty, for I, THE YAHWEH, will bring an end to their haughtiness.

For other betrayers, thinking they were doing us a service in taking part in the slaughter of Our holy ones, in the supper of the Great EL, they shall be destroyed by Our 7,000 Martyred and Resurrected Glorified Eagle Prophets whom they have persecuted and helped to put to death.

Pro 30:10 Accuse not a servant unto his master, lest he curse thee, and thou be found guilty. Pro 30:11 There is a generation that curseth their father, and doth not bless their mother. Pro 30:12 There is a generation that are pure in their own eyes, and yet is not washed from their filthiness. Pro 30:13 There is a generation, O how lofty are their eyes! and their eyelids are lifted up. Pro 30:14 There is a generation, whose teeth are as swords, and their jaw teeth as knives, to devour the poor from off the earth, and the needy from among men. Pro 30:15 The horseleach hath two daughters, crying, Give, give. There are three things that are never satisfied, yea, four things say not, It is enough: Pro 30:16 The grave; and the barren womb; the earth that is not filled with water; and the fire that saith not, It is enough. Pro 30:17 The eye that mocketh at his father, and despiseth to obey his mother, the ravens (H6158 "oreb") of the valley shall pick it out, and the young eagles shall eat it.

My FATHER has bent his bow, and set all prophets who made a covenant with us unto death; as a mark for the arrow of mocking. He hath caused the arrows of his quiver to enter into their reins; to make them a derision to all humanity; and their song all the day.

Lam 3:12 He hath bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow. Lam 3:13 He hath caused the arrows of his quiver to enter into my reins. Lam 3:14 I was a derision to all my people; and their song all the day.
E) SERVITUDE
My children will be judged on their servitude in the following areas:
i) Subservient
Those who do not highly esteem and serve My faithful servant whom I have chosen and ordain, to labour, oversee, and admonish them, shall not escape Hell/Heaven Level 1, 2, and 3.

1Th 5:12 And we beseech you, brethren, to know them which labour in (G1722 "en") you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you; 1Th 5:13 And to esteem them very highly in love for their work's sake. And be at peace among yourselves.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), is THE MESSENGER ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, THE YAH, THE VEHEMENT ONE, shall establish Our house, and set Our poor Anointed ones and needy Bride(s) as princes of My people. Whosoever is non-subservient towards both of you will not escape Hell/Heaven Level 1, 2 and 3.

Psa 113:1 Praise ye THE YAH (H350 "YAH" most vehement one). Praise, O ye servants of THE YAHWEH, praise the name of THE YAHWEH. Psa 113:2 Blessed be the name of THE YAHWEH from this time forth and for evermore. Psa 113:3 From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same THE YAHWEH 'S name is to be praised. Psa 113:4 THE YAHWEH is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens. Psa 113:5 Who is like unto THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM, who dwelleth on high, Psa 113:6 Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth! Psa 113:7 He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill; Psa 113:8 That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people. Psa 113:9 He maketh the barren woman to keep (H3427 "yashab" establish) house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye THE YAH.
Gal 4:26 But Jerusalem which is above is free, which is the mother of us all.

My faithful servants whom one must be subservient include those who are called to be a christ, who are partakers of My SON'S suffering and glory, who nourish My children, taking care of them spiritually out of their love for Me whole heartedly; not out of greed but of a willing spirit; not lording over them but as an example to them.
Anyone who are not subservient to them as unto elders whom I have put over them is proud who I will resist and he shall not escape Hell/Heaven Level 1, 2 and 3.

Therefore, be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the Accuser, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same undergoing are to be fully fulfilled in your brethren that are in the world. But My FATHER of all grace, who hath called those into My eternal glory, after they have suffered a while, will make them pure and holy, steady, fortified, and graduate them.
Finally, those who are faithful in their subservient attitude towards My chosen and appointed overseers, will by no means be forgotten.

1 Pe 5:1 The elders which are among you I exhort, who am also an elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a partaker of the glory that shall be revealed: 1 Pe 5:2 Feed the flock of God which is among you, taking the oversight thereof, not by constraint, but willingly; not for filthy lucre, but of a ready mind; 1 Pe 5:3 Neither as being lords over God's heritage, but being ensamples to the flock. 1 Pe 5:4 And when the chief Shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away. 1 Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for God resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble. 1 Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time: 1 Pe 5:7 Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you. 1 Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1 Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world. 1 Pe 5:10 But the God of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you. 1 Pe 5:11 To him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen. 1 Pe 5:12 By Silvanus, a faithful brother unto you, as I suppose, I have written briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God wherein ye stand. 1 Pe 5:13 The church that is at Babylon, elected together with you, saluteth you; and so doth Marcus my son. 1 Pe 5:14 Greet ye one another with a kiss of charity. Peace be with you all that are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
ii) Humility/Debasement

Debasement is unescapable if one is to escape hell fire. Through debasement, We will break the stubborn stronghold of man in order to release them from being taken into captivity by Lucifer/Molech, the Queen/King of Pride/Rebellion. As a result, men will be dragged into hell fire by them.

Therefore, it is of pivotal importance, that one must be made broken and contrite through humiliation, before they will submit to us and do Our bidding, which is perceived by men as ridiculous, unreasonable, absurd, impossible, and completely out of this world, just like the things We command Ezekiel to obey.

Eze 4:1 Thou also, son of man, take thee a tile, and lay it before thee, and pourtray upon it the city, even Jerusalem: Eze 4:2 And lay siege against it, and build a fort against it, and cast a mount against it; set the camp also against it, and set battering rams against it round about. Eze 4:3 Moreover take thou unto thee an iron pan, and set it for a wall of iron between thee and the city: and set thy face against it, and it shall be besieged, and thou shalt lay siege against it. This shall be a sign to the house of Israel. Eze 4:4 Lie thou also upon thy left side, and lay the iniquity of the house of Israel upon it: according to the number of the days that thou shalt lie upon it thou shalt bear their iniquity. Eze 4:5 For I have laid upon thee the years of their iniquity, according to the number of the days, three hundred and ninety days: so shalt thou bear the iniquity of the house of Israel. Eze 4:6 And when thou hast accomplished them, lie again on thy right side, and thou shalt bear the iniquity of the house of Judah forty days: I have appointed thee each day for a year. Eze 4:7 Therefore thou shalt set thy face toward the siege of Jerusalem, and thine arm shall be uncovered, and thou shalt prophesy against it. Eze 4:8 And, behold, I will lay bands upon thee, and thou shalt not turn thee from one side to another, till thou hast ended the days of thy siege. Eze 4:9 Take thou also unto thee wheat, and barley, and beans, and lentiles, and millet, and fitches, and put them in one vessel, and make thee bread thereof, according to the number of the days that thou shalt lie upon thy side, three hundred and ninety days shalt thou eat thereof. Eze 4:10 And thy meat which thou shalt eat shall be by weight, twenty shekels a day: from time to time shalt thou eat it. Eze 4:11 Thou shalt drink also water by measure, the sixth part of an hin: from time to time shalt thou drink. Eze 4:12 And thou shalt eat it as barley cakes, and thou shalt bake it with dung that cometh out of man, in their sight. Eze 4:13 And THE YAHWEH said, Even thus shall the children of Israel eat their defiled bread among the Gentiles, whither I will drive them. Eze 4:14 Then said I, Ah THE ADONAI YAHVIH! behold, my soul hath not been polluted: for from my youth up even till now have I not eaten of that which dieth of itself, or is torn in pieces; neither came there abominable flesh into my mouth. Eze 4:15 Then he said unto me, Lo, I have given thee cow's dung for man's dung, and thou shalt prepare thy bread therewith. Eze 4:16 Moreover he said unto me, Son of man, behold, I will break the staff of bread in Jerusalem: and they shall eat bread by weight, and with care; and they shall drink water by measure, and with astonishment: Eze 4:17 That they may want bread and water, and be astonied one with another, and consume away for their iniquity.
iii) Be A Servant To Those Whom I Put Above You To Serve

Elisha was called to serve Elijah as unto us, and he called him master; by doing so, upon completion of Elisha's training under Elijah, he was given a double portion because Elisha was deemed ready to be used by us as a vessel of honor. Those who do not humble themselves as a servant to serve faithfully those We have put above them, in order to train and perfect them, to enter into their destiny in us, will be disqualified from the race; and end up in perdition or Gehenna (Tartarus).

1Ki 19:19 So he departed thence, and found Elisha the son of Shaphat, who was plowing with twelve yoke of oxen before him, and he with the twelfth: and Elijah passed by him, and cast his mantle upon him. 1Ki 19:20 And he left the oxen, and ran after Elijah, and said, Let me, I pray thee, kiss my father and my mother, and then I will follow thee. And he said unto him, Go back again: for what have I done to thee? 1Ki 19:21 And he returned back from him, and took a yoke of oxen, and slew them, and boiled their flesh with the instruments of the oxen, and gave unto the people, and they did eat. Then he arose, and went after Elijah, and ministered unto him.

2Ki 2:3 And the sons of the prophets that were at Bethel came forth to Elisha, and said unto him, Knowest thou that THE YAHWEH will take away thy master from thy head to day? And he said, Yea, I know it; hold ye your peace.
iv) JESUS' Example
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of JESUS washing the feet of His twelve disciples and said, "Be like Me".
JESUS: Be like Me, you and all My children should serve one another as unto Me. Shekinaih is an exception; for she represents THE TRINITY, in testing, disciplining and perfecting Our children.

The ruler exercise their authority over whom they rule but it shall not be so for you all except Shekinaih, but whosoever will be great among you, let him be your attendant; And whosoever will be chief among you, let him be your servant. Even as I, the Son of Adam, came not to be served unto, but to serve, and to give My life a ransom for you all, even ye who are also Sons of Adam should follow Me likewise.

Therefore, be not like some who are likened to the scribes and Pharisees that sat in Moses' seat: having a form of godliness but without power, uncircumcised in their heart in the spirit, having confidence in the work of their flesh and carnal mindedness. Do not be leavened by them, for they say, and do not. All their works they do for to be seen of men: they wear their religious attire, and love uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in religious functions with reptilian masqueraded dignities, and merchants and kings of the earth that have committed fornication with Mystery Babylon because of the abundance of her luxury.

These Pharisees love to be seen in the public service, and be greeted. Do not follow their way for these draweth nigh unto Me with their mouth, and honoureth Me with their lips; but their hearts are far from Me. In vain they do worship My FATHER, teaching philosophy and vain deceit, after the traditions of men, after the rudiments of the world, and not after Our way of holiness in true repentance from dead works.

Mat 15:8 This people draweth nigh unto me with their mouth, and honoureth me with their lips; but their heart is far from me. Mat 15:9 But in vain they do worship me, teaching for doctrines the commandments of men.
But he that is greatest among you, shall be your servant. And whosoever shall exalt himself, shall be abased; and he that shall humble himself, shall be exalted.

In the coming persecution from the Anti-Christ authorities, many of My prophets shall be hungry, thirsty, homeless, naked, sick, and imprisoned; and anyone perchance could help them but seared their conscience not to do so, did it to Me; and then shall I say to them, 'Depart from Me ye cursed into everlasting fire prepared for the Accuser/devil and his messengers/angels!'

But for those who did serve them, My FATHER is not unrighteous to forget their work and labor of love, which they have shewed towards HIS NAME(S), Our Two Cherubim of Glory who represent Our Seven Names; in that they have ministered to these holy prophets sent by us through them. They shall indeed inherit the kingdom prepared for them from the foundation of the world.
2) ACTION
A) MAN OF THE WORD

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a man walking on a road and written on his back was the word, "WORD". JESUS then said to him, 'WALK OUT THE WORD'. Then, when this man reached and stood at the end of the road, I saw JESUS was already standing there waiting for him and I heard him saying to this man, 'Welcome Home, My good and faithful servant'.

JESUS: David, you shall expound to My elect what I meant by, "WALK OUT THE WORD". My Word Is Truth, and those who are true children of My FATHER must walk in love and truth to one another, and willing to die for one another as I have done. And that they should help each other who are in need if they are able; and not love in word, neither in tongue, but in deed and in truth.

To this end, was I born; and for this cause, came I into the world; that I should bear witness unto this truth to the children of heaven, who are incarnated into this world; that they may be perfected through suffering, and later enter into glory; that they are not of the world, even as I am not of the world; that they should walk in love and truth to one another.

Everyone that abides and walks in the word of this truth, heareth Our voice through Our spokesman, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. And if they continue in My word through them, then they are My disciples indeed; and they shall know the truth, and the truth shall make them free from missing the mark of being restored to Our glory.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, shall truly shall first come to restore all who are called into this hope.
Joh 8:31 Then said Jesus to those Jews which believed on him, If ye continue in my word, then are ye my disciples indeed; Joh 8:32 And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.
Mat 17:11 And Jesus answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore all things.

Col 1:26 Even the mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made manifest to his saints: Col 1:27 To whom God would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
B) IMAGINATION

JESUS: Rejoice in Me always: and again I say, rejoice. Let your soberness and self control be known unto all men. I am coming. Do not be anxious in all things; but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto My FATHER. And His peace which is more superior to all your carnal reasoning, shall keep your hearts and minds at peace in Me. Finally, My brethren, whatsoever things that are true, honest, righteous, pure, lovely,of good report, virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things. David, what you have of Me, teach Our children; and Our peace shall be with you and them.

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS put on a helmet on the mind of every soldier who was arrayed in a rectangular army formation and said to him, "BE ALERT FOR YOUR DEVOURER ALWAYS WHISPER TO YOUR EAR! DON'T BELIEVE HIM, BUT BELIEVE WHAT I HAVE SAID TO YOU THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID, AND SOMETIMES DIRECTLY TO YOU."
C) CONFLICT

JESUS: David, you must teach My children to be a Peacemaker while on earth; unless they are called and authorized to a position to judge, and to put the matters right. Otherwise, they should not judge but hold their peace. Thus, shall they be the children of My FATHER.
Mat 5:9 Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.
THE FATHER: Strife is immaturity, childish, demonic, and is of the Accuser/devil. You must not strive with one another; but in humility consider others better than yourself.

JESUS: Warn them not to dispute among themselves like My disciples, who once disputed who was greater. But if they bite and devour one another, they shall be consumed by the destroyer. For those who walk in hatred, debate, jealousy, wrath, strife, division, sectarian mentality, envyings, and murders, are energized by demons. These descend not from above, but are earthly, sensual, and demonic. For where envying and strife is, there are confusion and every evil work. But Our wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and easy to be intreated, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy. And the fruit of righteousness is sown in peace of them that pursue peace.

Jas 3:14 But if ye have bitter envying and strife in your hearts, glory not, and lie not against the truth. Jas 3:15 This wisdom descendeth not from above, but is earthly, sensual, devilish. Jas 3:16 For where envying and strife is, there is confusion and every evil work. Jas 3:17 But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and easy to be intreated, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy. Jas 3:18 And the fruit of righteousness is sown in peace of them that make peace.
So, teach My children to pursue peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see us.
Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see the Lord:
Encourage them to pursue this hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, even the ornament of a meek and peaceable spirit, which is in the sight of My Father is precious.
1 Pe 3:4 But let it be the hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, even the ornament of a meek and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of God of great price.

THE FATHER: Each is to preserve each other, through their gracious speech, spoken out of My grace, to give light to one another; and all your sacrifices for Me ought to be unconditional, as unto Me, without expectation from one another, and I will personally reward you instead.
JESUS: Every one shall be salted with fire of Our testing; to prove their walk of sacrifice, whether they be salted with salt of preservation unto one another.

Mar 9:49 For every one shall be salted with fire, and every sacrifice shall be salted with salt. Mar 9:50 Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his saltness, wherewith will ye season it? Have salt in yourselves, and have peace one with another.
D) YIELDEDNESS TO MY INSTRUCTIONS
Shekinaih: I saw JESUS wrote these on a green board:
JESUS: Those under A) to E) signify those who are yet 100% yielded to My will. There remains a limited time, for them to work out their salvation to yield 100% to My will.

At present, all humanity, including Our elect, are stiff-necked and uncircumcised in heart and ears; and do always resist My Holy Spirit, not 100% yielded to us. Our criteria of yieldedness, is 100% yieldedness to Our will from the heart in the spirit. Only My elect who yield 100% to Our will, meet Our criteria to enter Paradise. These are circumcised in heart in the spirit, and have purposed not to trust in their carnal-mindedness. We will therefore put Our seal of righteousness on them.

Rom 4:11 And he received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which he had yet being uncircumcised: that he might be THE FATHER of all them that believe, though they be not circumcised; that righteousness might be imputed unto them also: Rom 4:12 And THE FATHER of circumcision to them who are not of the circumcision only, but who also walk in the steps of that faith of our father Abraham, which he had being yet uncircumcised.

Like Abraham, they staggered not at Our promise despite the illogical and impossible situation We put them in; but believed and obeyed, giving glory to us, and being fully persuaded that what We had promised them, We are able also to perform. And therefore, My FATHER imputed to them for righteousness.

THE FATHER: Thereby, one should not only yield and obey, but without reservation and joy fulfil all that We have required of him/her to do, despite the fact that it squeezes his/her mind to understand, "THE WHYS", and it compresses his/her heart of being in turmoil emotionally, sending him/her to an upheaval state of being bizarre, if one will to ponder using logic.

JESUS: But for those who are uncircumcised, their souls shall be cut off from the Congregation of Heavenly Zion/Paradise; and shall be sent to Level 1, 2, or 3 of Hell. And those who are still not 100% yielded in the spirit, have but a limited time to work out their salvation with fear and trembling; in letting Me tear down their stronghold of carnal reasoning, and philosophy of men, which exalts itself against what We have taught through Our four books and more.

2 Co 10:2 But I beseech you, that I may not be bold when I am present with that confidence, wherewith I think to be bold against some, which think of us as if we walked according to the flesh. 2 Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2 Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through God to the pulling down of strongholds;) 2 Co 10:5 Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of God, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of Christ; 2 Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.

THE FATHER: Henceforth, consider thyself purely a mere vessel for Our use, like a bond slave with no rights, due to, you have already deny yourself, and have forsaken all your rights and already let us crucify you with all the works of your flesh on the cross.

JESUS: Henceforth, let not the wise man boast in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man boast in his might, let not the rich man boast in his riches: But let him that boasts, boast in this, that he understandeth and knoweth Me, that I am THE YAHWEH, THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE which exercise mercy, justice, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight. Behold, the days come, that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised (both Jews and gentiles); all that are in all nations who are uncircumcised (wise in their own eyes), and all My household of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart; and all shall be sent to Level 1, 2 or 3 of Hell/Heaven.

Jer 9:23 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, Let not the wise man glory in his wisdom, neither let the mighty man glory in his might, let not the rich man glory in his riches: Jer 9:24 But let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am THE YAHWEH which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight, saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 9:25 Behold, the days come, saith THE YAHWEH, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised; Jer 9:26 Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.

title: 3) BE YE HOLY, AS I AM HOLY: 9 FRUITS OF THE HOLY SPIRIT

segments.text: 3) BE YE HOLY, AS I AM HOLY: 9 FRUITS OF THE HOLY SPIRIT
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS wrote these words on a green board,
PEACE
JOY
PATIENCE
FAITHFULNESS
SELF RIGHTEOUSNESS (HE CROSSED OUT), BE MERCIFUL, BE KIND/GOOD, BE GENTLE)
HUMILITY, MEEKNESS
LOVE
SINGLENESS OF HEART TOWARDS ME AND THOSE I PUT ABOVE YOU (MY REPRESENTATIVES, SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID)
TEMPERANCE

JESUS: Be ye holy, for I am holy. Walk in the Spirit and be led by My spirit. Do not permit the spirit of adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, envyings, murders, drunkenness, and revellings influence your walk; for those who do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. But bear the fruit of the Spirit in love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness, and temperance by crucifying the flesh with the affections and lusts.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of God. Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ's have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
4) WHEEL ON WHEEL

SHEKINAIH: I saw the Ark of the Covenant with four priests carrying them. I then saw the four living creatures. Next, I saw JESUS knitting a garment. Following that, I saw soldiers arrayed in rectangular formation and it became a knitted garment. Then I heard JESUS said, "Find your role in Me through Shekinaih which I have ordained to have an overview and authority over My whole army as the Lord of The Hosts (THE YAHWEH SABAOTH); and David, My servant, who co-executes My decree as the Captain of The Host".

JESUS: The four priests carrying the Ark of the Covenant correspond to the four living creatures Ezekiel saw (Eze 1:1-28). They are called Shinan. They were the fourfold anointed ministers who are called to be christ(s), before they were glorified and changed into the four living creatures. The Lion signifies the Apostle, the Eagle signifies the Prophet, the Ox signifies the Evangelist, and the Man signifies the Pastor and Teacher. These are the four last days' camps of My 144,000 warrior Brides who will be 100% yielded to both of you, being The Two Cherubim of Glory representing us, as THE EL and THE ADONAI, MAJOR AND MINOR respectively. This is Spiritual Mount Zion, Our resting place.

Psa 68:16 Why leap ye, ye high mountains? this is the mountain which THE ELOHIM desireth to dwell in; yea, THE YAHWEH will dwell in it for ever. Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are twenty thousand, even thousands of angels (H8136 "shinan" alter, change): THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them. Psa 68:19 Blessed be THE ADONAI, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even THE EL of our salvation. Selah. Psa 68:20 He that is our EL is THE EL of salvation; and unto THE YAHVIH ADONAY belong the issues from death.

Eph 4:7 But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ. Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might complete ever one.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers;
5) RUN TO WIN A PRIZE

SHEKINAIH: I saw people running in a stadium. Following that, I saw Jesus writing these words, "Run the race as to win a prize, with a goal in mind to attain perfection in Me; through your yieldedness and repentance, when I expose you, through My servants Shekinaih and Aaron K David".

JESUS: Yes, to all My elect, I say, "Exercise restraint in all things, and crucify your flesh with its affections and lusts. Yield not to any work of adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, envyings, murders, drunkenness, and revellings; be subjected to Our chastisement through Our Two Representatives so that you might be partakers of Our holiness. Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterwards it yieldeth the Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness unto them which are trained in this manner. Therefore, do not give up but persevere to continue with Our training. Pursue peace within and without. Be a peacemaker, for this is holiness, and you shall see us. (Heb 12:9-15)

1 Co 9:24 Know ye not that they which run in a race run all, but one receiveth the prize? So run, that ye may obtain. 1 Co 9:25 And every man that striveth for the mastery is temperate in all things. Now they do it to obtain a corruptible crown; but we an incorruptible. 1 Co 9:26 I therefore so run, not as uncertainly; so fight I, not as one that beateth the air: 1 Co 9:27 But I keep under my body, and bring it into subjection: lest that by any means, when I have preached to others, I myself should be a castaway.

Be single therefore and lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset you, run with patience the race, looking unto Me as your example by enduring the cup of suffering shame from gainsaying of sinners (Heb 12:1-4), press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of being a Christ like Me by partaking of My suffering of shame and suffering of sinners so as to obtain the power of resurrection and be restored as Our fiery phoenix and seraphim in My FATHER's Kingdom.

Php 3:7 But what things were gain to me, those I counted loss for Christ. Php 3:8 Yea doubtless, and I count all things but loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord: for whom I have suffered the loss of all things, and do count them but dung, that I may win Christ, Php 3:9 And be found in him, not having mine own righteousness, which is of the law, but that which is through the faith of Christ, the righteousness which is of God by faith: Php 3:10 That I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, being made conformable unto his death; Php 3:11 If by any means I might attain unto the resurrection of the dead. Php 3:12 Not as though I had already attained, either were already perfect: but I follow after, if that I may apprehend that for which also I am apprehended of Christ Jesus. Php 3:13 Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but this one thing I do, forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before, Php 3:14 I press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.
FATHER: Run, thereby in My race without looking back, laying aside every weight that besieged you that seek to trap you into destruction together with their carnality reasonableness in doing so.

title: 6) JUDGE NOT, OR YOU WILL BE JUDGED

segments.text: 6) JUDGE NOT, OR YOU WILL BE JUDGED

SHEKINAIH: I saw people entering into the next phase of their testing, which is ten times more severe. I saw when a person released a judgment they were not authorized to do, they would be judged ten times more severely. I saw a demon putting ten black bricks on this person's back, and whipping him with a horse whip. I saw this person's face which is Jose, and he was wearing a white robe. As he climbed a staircase, he fell and hit on the steps. I saw his head was bleeding. I heard him said, "I am sorry, ABBA FATHER, I shouldn't have judged". With tears flowing from his eyes, I heard him said, "Have mercy on me, I sincerely repent this time." After that, I saw myself superimposed on THE FATHER on the throne telling the demon to take 5 bricks away from his back.
I then saw him got up and continue in his ascent. Slowly, his heart became purer and purer with each step he climbed. I then saw him kneeling down and prayed, "O FATHER, I totally surrender to you."

I then saw THE ELOHIM sitting on the throne wearing white with the word "Father" written on His forehead, and I saw myself wearing the golden empress robe with my face and my body superimposed inside THE FATHER'S face and body slamming a wooden block on the judge's table, commanding the devil to release him of the chastisement. And then, I heard these words "So, shall it be for the rest of the children who disobey Shekinaih who represents us as the Judge, and Aaron K David, as Our Co-Executor."

I then saw JESUS writing these words, "Be not wise in your own eyes". I then saw him bringing a person into a maze, the path went round and round and couldn't get out and he then wrote, "Forty years in the wilderness, or whole life unfruitful and then with a sudden death and be remembered no more."
7) FIFTEEN Backups

SHEKINAIH: I saw a few chess pieces in JESUS' hand; he was looking at a Chinese chessboard; and then he took up and put down the chess piece a few times, considering and hesitating which piece to put in a certain square. As He stared at the chessboard, I saw in His mind that one chess seat had ten to fifteen faces superimposed on it. He then showed me that in every chess seat, there are fifteen people which are represented. So, for every chess seat, He has fifteen people in His mind to select. Then, I saw stacks and stacks of books full of lights.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the interpretation of this vision?

JESUS: The stacks and stacks of books full of light, is the End-time Army Library, containing the books of the lives of My End-time Warrior Bride(s) that were prepared before the foundation of the world; to form the formation of My last days' 144,000 bridal warriors. Only 10% of those whom I have put My DNA in them, will make it. For every Archangel's Throne, My FATHER has prepared fifteen candidates, but only one shall be chosen.

Rev 1:19 Write the things which thou hast seen, and the things which are, and the things which shall be hereafter; Rev 1:20 The mystery of the seven stars which thou sawest in my right hand, and the seven golden candlesticks. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches: and the seven candlesticks which thou sawest are the seven churches.

The Book of Revelation signifies and depicts the events that are going to unfold in the fulfilment of the prophecy foretold in Genesis 3:15: of the enmity between the serpent Lucifer, and the woman Eve (Mother of all living, Heavenly Jerusalem with her children), and between Lucifer's seed and Heavenly Jerusalem's seed; they shall bruise Lucifer's kings, and Lucifer shalt bruise the last days children of promise (her heel).
Gen 3:15 And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; it shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.
The seven churches mentioned in Revelation 2 and 3 signify seven kinds of Congregation.

The Book of Revelation reveals the Mystery of the seven messengers/angels with their respective Congregation Worldwide led by Shekinaih and you, Our Two Cherubim of Glory, The Two Anointed One, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, is The Elijah, who was, and is, and is to come.

When you are severely wounded and taken to heaven, out of the 144,000 Brides, two parts therein shall be cut off and die; but the third shall be left therein. And I will bring the third part through the fire, and will refine them as silver is refined, and will try them as gold is tried: they shall call on MY NAME(S), and I will hear them: I will say, It is My people: and they shall say, THE YAHWEH is My ELOHIM.

Zec 13:7 Awake, O sword, against my shepherd, and against the man that is my fellow, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH: smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered: and I will turn mine hand upon the little ones. Zec 13:8 And it shall come to pass, that in all the land, saith THE YAHWEH, two parts therein shall be cut off and die; but the third shall be left therein. Zec 13:9
THE FATHER: Calculate your cost before deciding to pick up your cross to follow JESUS' footsteps: and thereby to suffer with Him in order that you will also reign and rule with Him.

title: 8) BE NOT ANGRY AND SIN NOT, CONTROL YOUR TONGUE

segments.text: 8) BE NOT ANGRY AND SIN NOT, CONTROL YOUR TONGUE

JESUS: Be not angry and sin not, control your tongue, for he that is soon angry dealeth foolishly, therefore make no friendship with an angry man; and with a furious man thou shalt not go: Lest thou learn his ways, and get a snare to thy soul.
Pro 22:24 Make no friendship with an angry man; and with a furious man thou shalt not go: Pro 22:25 Lest thou learn his ways, and get a snare to thy soul.

An angry man stirreth up strife, and a furious man aboundeth in transgression (Pro 29:22). Better is the end of a thing than the beginning thereof: and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit. Be not hasty in thy spirit to be angry: for anger resteth in the bosom of fools (Ecc 7:8-9). Be ye angry, and sin not: let not the sun go down upon your wrath: Neither give place to the accuser to cause you to evil speak and sin (Eph 4:26-27).

Whosoever is angry with his brother because he fell shall be in danger of the judgment; and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of hell fire (Mat 5:22). For in the multitude of words there wanteth not sin: but he that refraineth his lips is wise (Pro 10:19).

THE FATHER: An angry person is one that easily permeate into the ways of the foolish if left unchecked; will lead to uncontrollable rage that will resulted in brutal acts of violence, affecting others mentally, emotionally and spiritually and at times, physically, with deep scars of life that will marred the resulted victim(s) in severe wounds, that may cripple him/her in a deteriorate state of alertness in fulfilling his/her life's goal and/or destiny in Me (us).
9) FRUITFULNESS
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS wrote these words,
A) 30 FOLD
B) 60 FOLD
C) 100 FOLD
He then crossed out the word, "30 FOLD", "60 FOLD", but on the word, "100 FOLD", he wrote the word, "BINGO! STRIKE!"

JESUS: YES, THESE ARE MY BEST BET BATCH WHICH I HAVE CREATED WITH MY DNA. THEY ARE NOT SO CLEVER, BUT LESS REBELLIOUS, MORE YIELDING TO DO MY WILL, WILLING TO BE FOOLS FOR ME. I WILL GIVE THEM THE GREATEST HONOR.

title: 10) DIFFERENT CATEGORIES OF PEOPLE JUDGED DIFFERENTLY

segments.text: 10) DIFFERENT CATEGORIES OF PEOPLE JUDGED DIFFERENTLY
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS writing these words, A) GRASS B) LILIES C) FLOWERS D) BEAST.
A) GRASS
JESUS: Grass signifies unimportant people with no significant value. They are just bystanders. Many are ungodly people, evil doers who do not fear My FATHER.

Job 8:11 Can the rush grow up without mire? can the flag grow without water? Job 8:12 Whilst it is yet in his greenness, and not cut down, it withereth before any other grass (H2682 "chatsiyr" grass). Job 8:13 So are the paths of all that forget THE EL; and the hypocrite's hope shall perish.

Psa 37:1 To David. Fret not thyself because of evildoers, neither be thou envious against the workers of iniquity. Psa 37:2 For they shall soon be cut down like the grass, and wither as the green herb.

Some of these people will be serving the Antichrist's authorities, and will persecute My children; but THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, shall destroy them like the grasses that wither away (Psa 129:1-8).

Isa 40:6 The voice said, Cry. And he said, What shall I cry? All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: Isa 40:7 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because the spirit of THE YAHWEH bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. Isa 40:8 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word (spokesman) of our ELOHIM shall stand for ever.
B) LILIES

Lilies signify My 144,000 Brides. They are signified by the two pillars, Jachin and Boaz, and the five cubits tall by ten cubits round molten sea which stood on twelve oxen; whose brim thereof was wrought like the brim of a cup with flowers of lilies.

The two pillars, Jachin and Boaz, with the lily work on top of them symbolize; Our Two Cherubim of Glory with Our 7,000 Anointed Ones (The two Churches of Spiritual Smyrna and Thyatira Church in Revelation Chapter 2 and 3). These are Our top angels, the archangels.

The five cubits tall by ten cubits round molten sea which stood on twelve oxen whose brim thereof was wrought like the brim of a cup with flowers of lilies symbolize; Our four holy (Five symbolizes holiness) and perfect (Ten symbolizes perfection, completeness) camps of twelve spiritual tribe of Israel of 144,000 warrior Brides, symbolized by the twelve oxen; who will preach the true gospel of My Kingdom,

1Ki 7:21 And he set up the pillars in the porch of the temple: and he set up the right pillar, and called the name thereof Jachin: and he set up the left pillar, and called the name thereof Boaz. 1Ki 7:22 And upon the top of the pillars was lily work: so was the work of the pillars finished. 1Ki 7:23 And he made a molten sea, ten cubits from the one brim to the other: it was round all about, and his height was five cubits: and a line of thirty cubits did compass it round about. 1Ki 7:24 And under the brim of it round about there were knops compassing it, ten in a cubit, compassing the sea round about: the knops were cast in two rows, when it was cast. 1Ki 7:25 It stood upon twelve oxen, three looking toward the north, and three looking toward the west, and three looking toward the south, and three looking toward the east: and the sea was set above upon them, and all their hinder parts were inward. 1Ki 7:26 And it was an hand breadth thick, and the brim thereof was wrought like the brim of a cup, with flowers of lilies: it contained two thousand baths.

As My friend, I have put in you the burden to prepare My Bride for Me, to make them ready to unite with Me in one accord for My Wedding Day in heaven with them. Therefore, WE, TRINITY, have put both of you, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, Our zeal and urgency without relent but with gladness to gather, prepare, train and raise up the 144,000 for their holy matrimonial with Me at the appointed date. For We, THE TRINITY who is zealously pursuing them that none should perish.

Henceforth, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, are given the great task to complete this mission with this great love of Ours, for Our beloved Brides.
Son 2:16 My beloved (H1730 "dod" boil with love, friend, uncle) is mine, and I am his: he feedeth ( H7462 "raah" pastors) among the lilies.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall lead and co-lead Our 7,000 Two Witnesses corporately, and as are Our twin tower, Our glory, Our perfect ones, you shall pastor Our lilies to perfection.
Son 4:5 Thy two breasts are like two young roes (H6646 from H6643 "tsebiy" glory) that are perfect (H8380 from H8382 "taam complete), which feed ( H7462 "raah" pastors) among the lilies.
Indeed, how beautiful are the feet of these lilies that bring good tidings!

Son 7:1 How beautiful are thy feet with shoes, O prince's daughter! the joints of thy thighs are like jewels, the work of the hands of a cunning workman. Son 7:2 Thy navel is like a round goblet, which wanteth not liquor: thy belly is like an heap of wheat set about with lilies.

Verily, the glory of Solomon cannot be compared with one of these lilies when they are arrayed in My last days' army. For in the age to come, they will be exalted to have the best of everything; to be the head and not the tail; to share My inheritance; to have eternal joy and happiness that none can compare; being clothed in My glory garment tailored especially for them.

Mat 6:28 And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin: Mat 6:29 And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these. Mat 6:30 Wherefore, if God so clothe grass of the field, which to day is, and to morrow is cast into the oven, shall he not much more clothe you, O ye of little faith?
C) FLOWERS
Flowers signify those who are blessed to be honorable and rich in this world.

Jas 1:9 Let the brother of low degree rejoice in that he is exalted: Jas 1:10 But the rich, in that he is made low: because as the flower of the grass he shall pass away. Jas 1:11 For the sun is no sooner risen with a burning heat, but it withereth the grass, and the flower thereof falleth, and the grace of the fashion of it perisheth: so also shall the rich man fade away in his ways.

Many will be unfruitful in their walk with Me; and be found wanting because of the deceitfulness of their riches. Like the rich man, they shall not inherit eternal life, because they trust their riches more than eternal life. Some I have made rich to be My steward to provide meat for My household during the Great Tribulation, but are found to be unfaithful. These covetous stewards will fall into temptation, and be snared unto destruction and perdition.

In the last days, We shall judge the flowers on how they treated My 144,000 poor Anointed/needy Brides, when Our little ones would be hungry, thirsty, homeless, naked, and sick or imprisoned because of the persecution and tribulation from Anti-Christ. If these flowers made not us their strength; but trusted in the abundance of their riches, and strengthened themselves in their wickedness, (Psa 52:7) and hardened their hearts not to help any of these little ones who are My brethren, they are doing it to Me; and I will shorten their lives as they are of no use for My kingdom anymore. So will this also happen to he that layeth up treasure for himself, and is not rich towards us through Our householder in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, whom We have ordained to give meat to Our children (poor and needy) in the Great Tribulation during the 1,260 days.

1 Pe 1:24 For all flesh is as grass, and all the glory of man as the flower of grass. The grass withereth, and the flower thereof falleth away: 1 Pe 1:25 But the word of the Lord (spokesman) endureth for ever. And this is the word (spokesman) which by the gospel is preached unto you.
D) BEASTs

The Beast signifies the evil ones, the hooligans (violent or destructive people), and those who defame THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come. Beasts of the field are wayward nations. Beast of the earth are condemned nations.
In the last days, I shall bring plagues upon all these wayward and condemned nations that come against Shekinaih and you, and the children whom We have given both of you.
Job 18:3 Wherefore are we counted as beasts, and reputed vile in your sight?

Zec 14:15 And so shall be the plague of the horse, of the mule, of the camel, and of the ass, and of all the beasts that shall be in these tents, as this plague. Zec 14:16 And it shall come to pass, that every one that is left of all the nations which came against Jerusalem shall even go up from year to year to worship the King, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, and to keep the feast of tabernacles. Zec 14:17 And it shall be, that whoso will not come up of all the families of the earth unto Jerusalem to worship the King, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, even upon them shall be no rain. Zec 14:18 And if the family of Egypt go not up, and come not, that have no rain; there shall be the plague, wherewith THE YAHWEH will smite the heathen that come not up to keep the feast of tabernacles. Zec 14:19 This shall be the punishment of Egypt, and the punishment of all nations that come not up to keep the feast of tabernacles.
11) TRIAL OF FAITH

I will put all humanity including My elect through difficult times, testings, tribulation; to humble them, to prove them and to know what is in their hearts whether they would have faith in Me and keep Our commandments or not. I will expose their true nature to prove their hearts whether they are sincere towards Me or only for benefits sake.
Only the full-grown men in the full stature of a christ, will be fully approved by Me, whom I will invite to be part of My 144,000 warrior Brides.
Rev 3:10 Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth.
During this time of temptation, many hypocritical, ungodly, and wicked Christians, shall be flattered and corrupted, and fall away to break their covenant with us because of benefits and fear.
Luk 8:14 And that which fell among thorns are they, which, when they have heard, go forth, and are choked with cares and riches and pleasures of this life, and bring no fruit to perfection.

They shall pledge their allegiance to the Antichrist; but the people that do know that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come; shall strengthen themselves, and continue to be circumspect and instruct many to be patient to the end.

Jas 1:2 My brethren, count it all joy when ye fall into divers temptations; Jas 1:3 Knowing this, that the trying of your faith worketh patience. Jas 1:4 But let patience have her perfect work, that ye may be perfect and entire, wanting nothing.

THE FATHER: Thereby, be prepared that you will be brought before judges, being accused of things which you did not do or say; being framed or set up purposefully by the antichrist, some being tortured, and forced to deny their faith , in order to save their lives or lives of their loved ones.

Dan 11:32 And such as do wickedly against the covenant shall he corrupt by flatteries: but the people that do know their ELOHIM shall be strong, and do exploits. Dan 11:33 And they that understand among the people shall instruct many: yet they shall fall by the sword, and by flame, by captivity, and by spoil, many days. Dan 11:34 Now when they shall fall, they shall be holpen with a little help: but many shall cleave to them with flatteries. Dan 11:35 And some of them of understanding shall fall, to try them, and to purge, and to make them white, even to the time of the end: because it is yet for a time appointed.

Two parts of them shall die; but the third shall be left therein. And I will bring the third part through the fire, and will refine them as silver is refined, and will try them as gold is tried. They shall call on MY NAME(S) in THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who represent OUR NAME(S), and I will hear them. They shall be My 144,000 Anointed/Brides, and I shall be their ELOHIM

Zec 13:7 Awake, O sword, against my shepherd, and against the man that is my fellow, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH: smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered: and I will turn mine hand upon the little ones. Zec 13:8 And it shall come to pass, that in all the land, saith THE YAHWEH, two parts therein shall be cut off and die; but the third shall be left therein. Zec 13:9 And I will bring the third part through the fire, and will refine them as silver is refined, and will try them as gold is tried: they shall call on my name, and I will hear them: I will say, It is my people: and they shall say, THE YAHWEH is my ELOHIM.

title: 12) MY ELECT MUST BE CIRCUMCISED TO RECEIVE BOTH OF YOU, WHO REPRESENT THE TRINITY

segments.text: 12) MY ELECT MUST BE CIRCUMCISED TO RECEIVE BOTH OF YOU, WHO REPRESENT THE TRINITY

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of the scene where JESUS was entering into Jerusalem riding on a donkey. I also saw THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER in spirit form riding on the ass that was accompanying her colt with JESUS sitting on it.

In another vision, I saw you sitting on the colt that JESUS sat, and I was sitting on the ass that THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER sat; and we were wearing the Golden Emperor and Empress Robes respectively. I saw the words, "Take Over". I saw many people on the left and right of the path laying branches on the path which the ass and colt were treading, shouting, HOSANNA! HOSANNA!

JESUS: In the last days, I shall speak to My holy ones/holy Prophets and Apostles/Two Witnesses; that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, is indeed She/He that come in the NAME(S) of THE YAHWEH.

These holy ones/babes and infants, are symbolized by the children crying in the temple, who cried "Hosanna to the Son of David!" My holy ones/babes and infants, will know their destiny in THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE; and will welcome both of you who because they know that through both of you who represent THE TRINITY, they will be established with strength.
Through your restoration of true worship (perfected praise, in them, they shall silence Satan (the Adversary), the Anti-Christ, and his false Christ.
Mat 21:16 ... And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O YAHWEH our ADON, how great (H117 "addiyr" enlarge) is thy name in all the earth! who hast set thy glory above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength because of thine oppressors (H6887 "tsarar" to trouble), that thou mightest still the haters (H341 "oyeb" to hate) and the avenger (H5358 "naqam" to grudge).

They will indeed acknowledge that THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, who represent OUR NAME(S), are greater than all the angels that are in the Cosmoses (heavens).

Those who know this truth but with uncircumcised heart choose to ignore and reject both of you who represent THE TRINITY, shall be cast into the furnace of fire, where there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth.

Part 6 
Seven Levels of Hell

Act 2 Scene 3 
Paradise
Shekinaih, David and THE TRINITY were standing in a cloud in Paradise.

From this realm, they saw six planets arrayed before them. THE TRINITY then began to explain and show them how the Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven look like. JESUS revealed to them that they are planets in the Cosmoses. One by one, THE FATHER through JESUS, explained the Macro and Micro view and detailed explanation of each of these planets.
Simultaneously, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT stepped into Shekinaih, and she began to see further in-depth of what was shown to them.
At times, THE FATHER would speak through her from His in-depth perspective that was unleashed continuously before her, through open vision.
As THE FATHER revealed the Seven Levels of Hell/Heavens to them, each time when a level was explained, all of them will be instantly teleported to its respective planet.
Henceforth, the conversation began…….
The Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven

title: Vision of the Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven

segments.text: Vision of the Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS drew a diagram on the green board, and wrote, "Level 1 to Level 7 from the bottom to the top with their respective names:
Level 7: Paradise
Level 6: Abraham's Bosom/Creek
Level 5: Abaddon
Level 4: The Great White Judgment Throne
Level 3: Sheol/Hades
Level 2: Simeon/Perdition
Level 1: Gehenna (With Tartarus indented in the Center)
I saw him then drew another diagram, and He told me that each of the Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven is on a different planet.
I saw him drew yet another diagram showing the cross section of the seven levels and explained to me the Seven Levels of Hell/Heaven.
JESUS: Unquenchable fire continues to burn from Level 1 to certain lower part of Level 3 Sheol.
Deu 32:22 For a fire is kindled in mine anger, and shall burn unto the lowest Sheol (H7585 "Sheol"), and shall consume the earth with her increase, and set on fire the foundations of the mountains.

Level 1 is called Gehenna with Tartarus indented below it. Level 2 is called Simeon/Perdition, and Level 3 is called Sheol/Hades. Level 4 is where THE GREAT WHITE THRONE is situated, and it is where the dead are judged and determined in which level they will be placed. Level 5 is called Abaddon. Level 6 is called Abraham's Bosom, and Level 7 is the Garden of Eden/Paradise/Heavenly Mount Zion.
There is a spiritual lift from Level 4 that will teleport the soul to their allotted level of hell when judgment is passed on every soul.

Level 1, Gehenna/Tartarus 
(dAMNATION, ETERNAL FIRE, POINT OF NO RETURN)
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where is Gehenna?
JESUS: Gehenna/Tartarus is made up of Gehenna with Tartarus indented below it. It is situated in the planet Venus. This place is damned with eternal fire and it's a place of no return.

Venus is a sunset star only and not the morning star as it is sometimes called. This is Lucifer, the rebellious red dragon. She is none other than the goddess Diana whom all Asia and the world are still worshipping. Her Greek name is Artemis.

Act 19:27 So that not only this our craft is in danger to be set at nought; but also that the temple of the great goddess Diana should be despised, and her magnificence should be destroyed, whom all Asia and the world worshippeth.
She is also known as Aphrodite and the Queen of Heaven, and is known to carry a bow and arrow.

Jer 7:18 The children gather wood, and THE FATHERs kindle the fire, and the women knead their dough, to make cakes to the queen of heaven, and to pour out drink offerings unto other gods, that they may provoke me to anger.

Venus, Nibiru and Wormwood are related. The so-called planet Nibiru is in fact an alien rock like starship and there are many rock-like lethal weapons, and wormwood is one of them. Nibiru's mothership is Venus, which is the Mother of all comets which now became to be known as a planet. She is a storehouse of all comets. Like the rest of the stars and the planets, they are driven by an entity. In the last days, all the stars and planets will rebel and will not follow its ordained course and this will result in catastrophe.

Lucifer/Venus is the strange woman in Proverbs 5. Her offspring, the titans with wormwood, will plague the earth at its appointed time according to Revelation. Avoid her at all costs so as not to be tempted to commit fornication with her in this world and end up being locked up in Sheol.

Pro 5:3 For the lips of a strange woman drop as an honeycomb, and her mouth is smoother than oil: Pro 5:4 But her offspring (H319 "achariyth" posterity, remnant, residue) is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword. Pro 5:5 Her feet go down to death; her steps sustain (H8551 "tamak" maintain) Sheol (H7585 "sheol" hell). Pro 5:6 Lest thou shouldest ponder the path of life, her ways are moveable, that thou canst not know them.

In the last days, Nibiru (Planet X) will be sent out of Venus and it will pass by Earth and this will affect one another's magnetic field which will trigger severe earthquakes, weather abnormalities, and prolonged darkness on Earth. Nibiru will also release wormwood at the appointed time to Earth to destroy the source of water on Earth. The titans from Tartarus will be released, and through the satellite moon of Venus, they will come down on Earth to plague on those who have not the seal of THE NAME(S) of My FATHER on their foreheads. All these events will only happen at the release and execution of Our decree through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come.

Rev 8:10 And the third angel sounded, and there fell a great star from heaven, burning as it were a lamp, and it fell upon the third part of the rivers, and upon the fountains of waters; Rev 8:11 And the name of the star is called Wormwood: and the third part of the waters became wormwood; and many men died of the waters, because they were made bitter.
Gehenna is a place where it is burning with fire that cannot be quenched and the worm dies not.

Mar 9:45 And if thy foot offend thee, cut it off: it is better for thee to enter halt into life, than having two feet to be cast into Gehenna (G1067 "geenna"), into the fire that never shall be quenched: Mar 9:46 Where their worm dieth not, and the fire is not quenched.

At present, 0.5% of the spirit man of Christians who are alive on Earth are being tormented there. These are manifested in their sickness and disease whether mentally or physically or both. Gehenna is reserved for the Great Dragon (Diabolos), the Beast, the False Prophet and all those whose names are not written in the Book of life, and they shall be cast into this unquenchable lake of fire.

title: A) Who will be cast into Gehenna?

segments.text: A) Who will be cast into Gehenna?
The Diabolos, the beast and the false prophet and those whose name not found written in the book of life.

Rev 20:10 And the Diabolos/Accuser that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever. Rev 20:11 And I saw a THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them. Rev 20:12 And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before THE ELOHIM; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works. Rev 20:13 And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and hell delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works. Rev 20:14 And death and Hades were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death. Rev 20:15 And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are these "Whose name was not found in the Book of Life" that will be cast into Gehenna?

JESUS: They are the fearful, the unbelieving, the abominable, the murderers, the whoremongers, the sorcerers, the idolaters, and liars. They shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death (Rev 21:8).
1) The Fearful
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the fearful?
JESUS: Every Christians who denied Me, who did not overcome their fear when persecuted by the authorities that served Satan, during the Great Tribulation.

These are likened to those who have a stony heart. They joyfully received the good news of eternal life in Kingdom of Heaven; but have not rooted themselves in the truth, that they have to go through much tribulation to enter into it.
Act 14:22 Confirming the souls of the disciples, and exhorting them to continue in the faith, and that we must through much tribulation enter into the kingdom of God.

Even though, they have been warned by both of you, She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/ JESUS, they chose to harden their hearts in unbelief; holding on to the damnable doctrine of the false teachers of Satan, believing that they need not have to go through the Great Tribulation, but will be raptured before the Great Tribulation. Even though the scripture contradicts this lie, they with a stony heart would continue to believe in this lie, rather than the truth taught by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. Therefore, when the Great Tribulation or persecution arises, they would be offended; and their love for us would wax cold, and they would deny Me.

Mat 13:20 But he that received the seed into stony places, the same is he that heareth the word, and anon with joy receiveth it; Mat 13:21 Yet hath he not root in himself, but dureth for a while: for when tribulation or persecution ariseth because of the word, by and by he is offended.
These will compromise with the False Prophet to worship the image of the Beast, and receive a mark in their right hands, or in their foreheads, to avoid being unable to buy and sell.

Rev 14:9 And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive his mark in his forehead, or in his hand, Rev 14:10 The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out without mixture into the cup of his indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb: Rev 14:11 And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name. Rev 14:12 Here is the patience of the saints: here are they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of JESUS.
2) The Unbelieving
SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of JESUS writing these word on a green board.
"DOUBT = UNBELIEF = NO FAITH = LOSE ALL YOUR REWARDS = CURSES = GNASHING OF TEETH ETERNALLY = SKIP OVER"
Following that, I saw JESUS writing these words, "Take heed that you have none of this doubt in you."
I then saw THE FATHER standing with JESUS on an island located in the centre of the sea holding a big box called "PROMISED BLESSINGS FOR HIS CHILDREN".

However, they had to surf on a surfing board called "FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH" to cross the LAKE OF FIRE which is THE SPIRITUAL REALM, with the words "NEGATIVE CIRCUMSTANCES PERMITTED BY THE TRINITY Through SATAN TO TEST YOU, called THE FINAL QUALIFYING TEST Through FIERY CIRCUMSTANCES", to in order to obtain the Promised Reward(s) or Blessing(s).
Superimposed on the lake of fire were the words, "TEN TEST PAPERS OF PERFECTION."

JESUS: My children must with peace and joy go through the tribulations, in meekness of love go through the persecutions, in lowliness of mind go through the oppressions, and be prompt to yield and have faith in Shekinaih as unto Me so as to enter into the Promised Land. Those who waver in their faith must run to her so that they can find help in time of need.
