SHEKINAIH: I saw myself as the giant golden empress carrying those who put their trust in The TRINITY in me across this fiery lake and putting them on the island to receive The Promised Blessing(s), but for those who continue in unbelief without running to me, they all fell into the Lake of Fire in Tartarus or Hell Level 1, 2, or 3 and being taken captived by the devil and end up cannot received what was being promised by THE TRINITY. One spirit man must maintain his/her faith and remain pure so that the spirit man will remain in heaven and not fall down to the Lake of Fire in order to receive what is being promised by THE TRINITY.
3) The Abominable

Pro 6:1 These six things doth THE YAHWEH hate: yea, seven are an abomination unto him: Pro 6:17 A proud look, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood, Pro 6:18 An heart that deviseth wicked imaginations, feet that be swift in running to mischief, Pro 6:19 A false witness that speaketh lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the abominable?

JESUS: They are the proud, the liar, the murderer, the wicked, the evil doer, the false witness and they that sow discord among brethren. Those who do not sow peace among themselves by bridling their tongue but permit the demons of bitter envying and strife in their hearts to energize their tongue to curse our Anointed are defiling their soul and setting it on the fire of Gehenna.

Jas 3:6 And the tongue is a fire, a world of iniquity: so is the tongue among our members, that it defileth the whole body, and setteth on fire the course of nature; and it is set on fire of Gehenna (G1067 "geenna").

Mat 15:18 But those things which proceed out of the mouth come forth from the heart; and they defile the man. Mat 15:19 For out of the heart proceed evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, fornications, thefts, false witness, blasphemies: Mat 15:20 These are the things which defile a man: but to eat with unwashen hands defileth not a man.
4) The Murderers
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the murderers?
JESUS: Whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no murderer hath eternal life abiding in him (1Jn 3:1).

Those who commit merciless killing, Gehenna is waiting for them. Thereby their entire family tree is cursed with diseases and sickness and tragic death will return in full swing towards them at the least expected time without warning. Therefore in the same principle it will be a life for a life taken for whatsoever a man soweth that shall he reap also.
Exo 21:24 Eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot,
5) THE Whoremongers
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the whoremongers?

JESUS: Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not commit adultery: But I say unto you, that whosoever looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart. And if thy right eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna. And if thy right hand offend thee, cut it off, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna (Mat 5:27-30).
Marriage is honourable in all, and the bed undefiled: but whoremongers and adulterers THE ELOHIM will judge (Heb 13:4).
Whoremonger equals to joining oneself with the unfaithful which leads to spiritual mutation which will result in souls being taken captive and eternally lost in hell fire for most of them.
6) Sorcerers, Satanist, Witches and False Ministers
Sorcerers, Satanist, Witches, and False Ministers are the offspring of Lucifer. These are the trees My FATHER have not planted, and they shall be chopped down and cast into Gehenna fire.

Mat 3:10 And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: therefore every tree which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire. Mat 3:11 I indeed baptize you with water unto repentance: but he that cometh after me is mightier than I, whose shoes I am not worthy to bear: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost, and with fire: Mat 3:12 Whose fan is in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and gather his wheat into the garner; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire.

These are tares which Satan have sown among My children, masquerading as My ministers to have them in captivity and lead them astray. In the end of this age, I shall gather all these stumbling blocks out of My kingdom and cast them into the furnace of fire; there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth.

Mat 13:40 As therefore the tares are gathered and burned in the fire; so shall it be in the end of this world. Mat 13:41 The Son of man shall send forth his angels, and they shall gather out of his kingdom all things that offend, and them which do iniquity; Mat 13:42 And shall cast them into a furnace of fire: there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth. Mat 13:43 Then shall the righteous shine forth as the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Who hath ears to hear, let him hear.

These are religious hypocritical teachers in Christendom, offspring of vipers, leavening those who follow their damnable doctrine with the spirit of hypocrisy to be twofold more the children of Gehenna than themselves. These are goats and not My sheep.

Mat 23:14 Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayer: therefore ye shall receive the greater damnation. Mat 23:15 Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye compass sea and land to make one proselyte, and when he is made, ye make him twofold more the child of Gehenna (G1067 "geenna"). than yourselves. Mat 23:32 Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers. Mat 23:33 Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of Gehenna (G1067 "geenna")?
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are these goats?

JESUS: These goats are messengers of Satan, the seed of the serpent, the spiritual Edomite who disguise as Christian ministers so that through their falsely justified doctrine, they shall accuse violently My true messengers of heresies, and will show no pity to them because of the enmity, and in their anger tear them perpetually, keeping their wrath forever against them with an eternal hatred.

Amo 1:11 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; For three transgressions of Edom, and for four, I will not turn away the punishment thereof; because he did pursue his brother with the sword, and did cast off all pity, and his anger did tear perpetually, and he kept his wrath for ever:

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, in you, as The Elijah who was, who is, and is to come, shall come with My holy angels (7,000 resurrected cloud of martyrs whom these goats have afflicted in their life time), and shall judge these goats. They shall be found guilty and cursed and send into Gehenna into everlasting fire, prepared for the Diabolos and his messengers/angels.

Mat 25:31 When the Son of Adam shall come in his glory (through his two Cherubim of glory), and all the holy angels (7000 resurrected messengers) with him, then shall he sit upon the throne of his glory: Mat 25:32 And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth his sheep from the goats: Mat 25:33 And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left.

Mat 25:41 Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels. Mat 25:42 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink: Mat 25:43 I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not. Mat 25:44 Then shall they also answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee? Mat 25:45 Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did it not to one of the least of these, ye did it not to me. Mat 25:46 And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.
7) THE Idolaters
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the idolaters?

JESUS: Idolaters are children of disobedience; those who love the world in the lusts of the flesh, the lusts of the eyes, and the pride of life and whose hearts have departed from us. They have made themselves an enemy of us.

1 Co 10:6 Now these things were our examples, to the intent we should not lust after evil things, as they also lusted. 1 Co 10:7 Neither be ye idolaters, as were some of them; as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play. 1 Co 10:8 Neither let us commit fornication, as some of them committed, and fell in one day three and twenty thousand.
Idolaters are also those who are lustful and covetous. Our wrath will come on them as these are children of disobedience.

Col 3:5 Mortify therefore your members which are upon the earth; fornication, uncleanness, inordinate affection, evil concupiscence, and covetousness, which is idolatry: Col 3:6 For which things' sake the wrath of God cometh on the children of disobedience.
Last but not least, idolaters are those who are led astray by the woman Jezebel (who is Lucifer, the wife of Baal, the woman Mystery Babylon) to eat things sacrificed unto idols.

Rev 2:20 Notwithstanding I have a few things against thee, because thou sufferest that woman Jezebel (H348 "iyzebel" Baal is husband), which calleth herself a prophetess, to teach and to seduce my servants to commit fornication, and to eat things sacrificed unto idols. Rev 2:21 And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented not.
8) the Liars
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the liars?
JESUS: They are the ungodly false prophets, apostles, teachers and ministers who said that they love us but actually hate Our children.
1Jn 4:20 If a man say, I love God, and hateth his brother, he is a liar: for he that loveth not his brother whom he hath seen, how can he love God whom he hath not seen?

Through their lying, politically correct doctrine, they will contend against Our true messengers who have the way of truth. These liars are the children of the Diabolos (accuser), THE FATHER of all lies. They will continue to do the lust of their father. As their father had lied to Adam and Eve and caused them to lose their glorified body, these will continue to lie to the sons of Spiritual Adam (Our children) so that they will not be able to be restored to Our glory.
All these liars shall have their part in the lake of fire which burneth with fire and brimstone, which is the second death.

Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the devil (G1228 "diabolos" accuser), and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was a murderer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and THE FATHER of it.

Rev 21:8 But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.
Those who lied will have their tongue cut off eternally.
9) Those who Judge without mercy
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is it true that many who continue to judge their brother are in danger of Gehenna fire?

JESUS: Yes, those who wilfully agree with the spirit of self-righteousness and pride to stir them up to be angry with their brother who yielded to temptation by condemning and judging them without mercy shall be cast to Gehenna if they repent not.

Mat 5:22 But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother when he yields (G1500 "eike" from G1502 "eiko" to yield) shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of Gehenna (G1067 "geenna") fire. Mat 5:29 And if thy right eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna (G1067 "geenna"). Mat 5:30 And if thy right hand offend thee, cut it off, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna (G1067 "geenna").
In Gehenna, their souls and the spiritual body will be burned and enter into nonexistence.
Mat 10:28 And fear not them which kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul: but rather fear him which is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna (G1067 "geenna").
10) Those who practice Sedition
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, why is it so serious that those who practice sedition will end up in Gehenna fire?

JESUS: Sedition is sowing discord, causing division. It is an abomination unto My FATHER. Such is a Belial, a lawless and unrighteous man who with distorted speech and a fraudulent heart devise evil continually, sowing discord among My children.

Pro 6:12 A belial (H1100 "beliyaal" no profit) Adam, a wicked (H205 "aven" lawless and unrighteous) man, walketh with a distorted (H6143 "iqqeshuth" twisted, distorted, crooked, pervert) mouth. Pro 6:13 He winketh with his eyes, he speaketh with his feet, he teacheth with his fingers; Pro 6:14 Fraud (H8419 "tahpukah") is in his heart, he deviseth evil continually; he soweth discord. Pro :15 Therefore shall his calamity come suddenly; suddenly shall he be broken without remedy. Pro 6:16 These six things doth THE YAHWEH hate: yea, seven are an abomination unto him: Pro 6:17 A proud look, a lying tongue, and hands that shed innocent blood, Pro 6:18 An heart that deviseth wicked imaginations, feet that be swift in running to mischief, Pro 6:19 A false witness that speaketh lies, and he that soweth discord among brethren.
These Belials are defiled by the spirit of hatred.
Pro 10:12 Hatred stirreth up strifes: but love covereth all sins.

They, with good words and fair speeches deceive the hearts of the simple and cause divisions and snare My children to oppose My true doctrine which are taught by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, the spirit of truth; thus depriving them of the true restoration.

Rom 16:17 Now I beseech you, brethren, mark them which cause divisions and offences contrary to the doctrine which ye have learned; and avoid them. Rom 16:18 For they that are such serve not our Lord Jesus Christ, but their own belly; and by good words and fair speeches deceive the hearts of the simple.
My children who are deceived and practice sedition like them have already received the demonic spirit of confusion which energize them to envy and strife against Our truth.
Jas 3:15 This wisdom descendeth not from above, but is earthly, sensual, demonic. Jas 3:16 For where envying and strife is, there is confusion and every evil work.
Those who practice sedition shall in no way inherit the Kingdom of Heaven but Gehenna fire awaits them. It is wisdom that these Belials be marked and avoided like the lake of fire and brimstone.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of God.

Therefore, teach Our children not to dispute among themselves who should be greater or right but rather have salt in themselves to preserve one another, and make peace to be worthy to be called the Children of THE ELOHIM.
Mat 5:9 Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.

Mar 9:49 For every one shall be salted with fire, and every sacrifice shall be salted with salt. Mar 9:50 Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his saltness, wherewith will ye season it? Have salt in yourselves, and have peace one with another.
B) Tartarus
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where is Tartarus?

JESUS: Tartarus is the place where the archangels who came down from Heaven to cohabit with the daughters of men against the will of heaven are chained under darkness. These are the titans mentioned in Greek mythology.
2 Pe 2:4 For if THE ELOHIM spared not the angels that sinned, but cast them down to Tartarus (G5020 "tartaroo"), and delivered them into chains of darkness, to be reserved unto judgment;
Another name for Tartarus is called, "Abussos the Deep", where evil demons are supposed to be locked up. The demon that talked to Me in Luke 8:29 was very afraid to go to this place.
Luk 8:31 And they besought him that he would not command them to go out into the deep (G12 "abussos").

It is called the bottomless pit where Abaddon is locked up at present, until he and his titans are released by the decreed by THE FATHER through Shekinaih. Then, you, My mighty angel Victory, shall release them, so as to fulfil the will of THE FATHER in tormenting all that received the Mark of the Beast.
Rev 9:11 And they had a king over them, which is the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in the Hebrew tongue is Abaddon, but in the Greek tongue hath his name Apollyon.
In Tartarus, Satan will be locked up later for a thousand years so as not to deceive the nations until his release for his final destruction in the lake of fire in Gehenna.

Rev 20:1 And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand. Rev 20:2 And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Devil, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years, Rev 20:3 And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season.
C) VisItation to Gehenna
1) Section for the Licentious (Lust)
JESUS: Shekinaih, why don't you share with David what you saw when I brought you to Gehenna a few years ago?

SHEKINAIH: Many years ago, while I was praying, JESUS appeared to me and took 50% of My spirit which was in the form of light, and we flew across many planets on our right, and landed in front of the door of Gehenna, which was guarded by two horned demons. JESUS then opened my eyes, and I saw an open vision of a man and woman naked in lust making love. I saw another group of people having an orgy party. Follow that, I realized I was standing in a filthy and gruesome place filled with shit and urine, and I saw the faces and bodies of demons there dripping with shit. I then saw one of these demons cutting the private part of a man and another demon was using a rotating iron rod with many spikes mutilating the private part of a woman and her breast.
Leaning towards me where I was dressed up in the golden empress robe, JESUS said to me, "This is the first section of Gehenna, the torment place for those who lived in lust".
I then followed behind Him walking to the next section of Gehenna.
2) Section for Robbers, Liars, Criminal and etc.

Upon entering the next section of Gehenna, I saw a demon using an axe chopping off the hands of those who stole. For those who lied, I saw their tongue were being cut off by demons using a pair of scissors. Whichever part of the body had sinned, I saw that particular part were being punished. Then after that, I saw their necks were being chained with iron chains and then hung on a merry-go-round type of apparatus with fire burning them from below.
JESUS then led me to another section of Gehenna.
3) Section FOR Sexual Perverts

In this section, I saw visions of men making love with horses, cows, dogs, cats and etc. While these men were copulating, I saw a snake was superimposed on their private parts, making love with these animals through the men's private part.

Then, JESUS said to me, "Homosexuals, gays, and those who do unnatural sex DEFAME AND CORRUPT OUR IMAGE. These are heavily punished. All those who scorned Our eternal power and divinity to practice in unnatural sex, will end in Level 1 Gehenna. Whichever part of the body is used in the unclean acts, this part of the spiritual body shall be cut off."

I then saw a male kissed another male's body, and then I saw that man's tongue was cut off. I saw the other man's private part that was being kissed was also being cut off, and the male whose hand touched another male's body, and private part had his hand cut off as well. These maimed men and women with their tongue, private organs, hands, legs, and etc. being cut off, were deformed with eternal deformation and their bodies were hung up above a flame and pierced by many demons with burning spears from below. These spears were burning red hot and as they pierced into a certain part of the body, that area would be charred. So, the deformed bodies had many charred holes on them. JESUS then said to me, "This torment will continue unto the ages. Let us go to another section."
Exo 22:19 Whosoever lieth with a beast shall surely be put to death.

Mat 5:28 But I say unto you, That whosoever looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart. Mat 5:29 And if thy right eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna (G1067 "geenna"). Mat 5:30 And if thy right hand offend thee, cut it off, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into Gehenna (G1067 "geenna").
4) Section for Liars, Untruthful Servants, Wicked Ministers, Unfaithful Disciples
In this section, I saw liars, unfaithful servants, wicked ministers and untruthful disciples, all locked up inside iron cages with fire scorching them from below.
JESUS then said to me, "This is AN ETERNAL CURSE".
A) The Wicked Minister

Wicked Ministers equal to evil hearted ministers who neglected their duty to take care of starving children, thus causing malnutrition and low immunity vulnerable to enemy's attack resulted in lost sheep being kidnapped/ captured by the enemy, and thereby being destroyed due to deliberate negligence.

Henceforth, the same will happen to their own loved ones; being kidnapped/captured by the enemy to their destruction. These wicked ministers will be tormented in this part of hell eternally, if they do not bring fruits meet for repentance before its cut-off time.

Mat 24:45 Who then is a faithful and wise servant, whom his lord hath made ruler over his household, to give them meat in due season? Mat 24:46 Blessed is that servant, whom his lord when he cometh shall find so doing. Mat 24:47 Verily I say unto you, That he shall make him ruler over all his goods. Mat 24:48 But and if that evil servant shall say in his heart, My lord delayeth his coming; Mat 24:49 And shall begin to smite his fellowservants, and to eat and drink with the drunken; Mat 24:50 The lord of that servant shall come in a day when he looketh not for him, and in an hour that he is not aware of, Mat 24:51 And shall cut him asunder, and appoint him his portion with the hypocrites: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
B) Unfaithful Child of THE ELOHIM/ Disciple/ Minister/ Servant
These group of people fall into the category of those who give up easily half way, who did not calculate the/ their costs of following Me.

Unless one is willing to deny themselves to carry their crosses, and let Me crucify their works of the flesh by following My footstep, in total obedience unto My FATHER even unto death, they are thereby not worthy of Me. This includes those who dropped out from Our testing, squeezing, tough training for the fittest through Our representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, in Our last days Ministry in Crowned Eagles Global. These will thereby have their life shortened before their time, and they will spend eternity in Perdition or Gehenna (Tartarus) eternally.

Mat 25:14 For the kingdom of heaven is as a man travelling into a far country, who called his own servants, and delivered unto them his goods. Mat 25:15 And unto one he gave five talents, to another two, and to another one; to every man according to his several ability; and straightway took his journey. Mat 25:16 Then he that had received the five talents went and traded with the same, and made them other five talents. Mat 25:17 And likewise he that had received two, he also gained other two. Mat 25:18 But he that had received one went and digged in the earth, and hid his lord's money. Mat 25:19 After a long time the lord of those servants cometh, and reckoneth with them. Mat 25:20 And so he that had received five talents came and brought other five talents, saying, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me five talents: behold, I have gained beside them five talents more. Mat 25:21 His lord said unto him, Well done, thou good and faithful servant: thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord. Mat 25:22 He also that had received two talents came and said, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me two talents: behold, I have gained two other talents beside them. Mat 25:23 His lord said unto him, Well done, good and faithful servant; thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord. Mat 25:24 Then he which had received the one talent came and said, Lord, I knew thee that thou art an hard man, reaping where thou hast not sown, and gathering where thou hast not strawed: Mat 25:25 And I was afraid, and went and hid thy talent in the earth: lo, there thou hast that is thine. Mat 25:26 His lord answered and said unto him, Thou wicked and slothful servant, thou knewest that I reap where I sowed not, and gather where I have not strawed: Mat 25:27 Thou oughtest therefore to have put my money to the exchangers, and then at my coming I should have received mine own with usury. Mat 25:28 Take therefore the talent from him, and give it unto him which hath ten talents. Mat 25:29 For unto every one that hath shall be given, and he shall have abundance: but from him that hath not shall be taken away even that which he hath. Mat 25:30 And cast ye the unprofitable servant into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth. Mat 25:31 When the Son of man shall come in his glory, and all the holy angels with him, then shall he sit upon the throne of his glory: Mat 25:32 And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth his sheep from the goats: Mat 25:33 And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left. Mat 25:34 Then shall the King say unto them on his right hand, Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world: Mat 25:35 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me drink: I was a stranger, and ye took me in: Mat 25:36 Naked, and ye clothed me: I was sick, and ye visited me: I was in prison, and ye came unto me. Mat 25:37 Then shall the righteous answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, and fed thee? or thirsty, and gave thee drink? Mat 25:38 When saw we thee a stranger, and took thee in? or naked, and clothed thee? Mat 25:39 Or when saw we thee sick, or in prison, and came unto thee? Mat 25:40 And the King shall answer and say unto them, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye have done it unto one of the least of these my brethren, ye have done it unto me. Mat 25:41 Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels: Mat 25:42 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink: Mat 25:43 I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not. Mat 25:44 Then shall they also answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee? Mat 25:45 Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did it not to one of the least of these, ye did it not to me. Mat 25:46 And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.
We then went to another section.
5) Section for Murderers, Adulterers, Blasphemers, and Greater Perversion
In this section, I saw a vision of men after raping their victims, mutilated them into many pieces.
JESUS then said to me, "These have no more conscience, and had become beasts."
I then saw a lot of creeping black bugs covering the whole body from head to toes of these perverts. The black bugs were eating and sucking their flesh and blood until they became a black skeleton.

JESUS then said to me, "These are also being burned in the lake of fire for eternity. There are many more torments in Gehenna in different section but you have seen enough, let's continue our journey".

Rev 21:8 But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.
Level 2, Perdition

title: 1) Members of Secret Societies that do evil

segments.text: 1) Members of Secret Societies that do evil
Immediately, I was teleported to Level 2 of Hell called Perdition. There I saw people from different secret societies who did evil and had sworn unto death with their blood unto their gods.

JESUS then said to them, "All members of secret societies, and those who go against and persecute My true ministers, Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists, Pastors/Teachers and My true little ones; will end up in Perdition". JESUS then said to Shekinaih and David…

2 Pe 2:11 Whereas angels, which are greater in power and might, bring not railing accusation against them before THE YAHWEH. 2 Pe 2:12 But these, as natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly perish in their own corruption;

title: 2) The Extremely Violent, Wife Abuser, Child Abusers, Profaner of OUR NAME(S)

segments.text: 2) The Extremely Violent, Wife Abuser, Child Abusers, Profaner of OUR NAME(S)

JESUS: Those that are extremely violent, the wife abusers, the children abusers, and those who profane MY NAME(S), will end up here. The fire that burnt in Level 1, also burns in Level 2 and Level 3. However, the intensity of the fire in Level 2, is lesser than Level 1 and the fire in Level 3, burn only at half its level".

SHEKINAIH: In Perdition, I saw there were people being hung naked on an apparatus, which looked like a merry-go-round with fire burning below. It rotated from left to right with many demons scraping the naked person with broken glass on their face, back, breast, hands, and different parts of the body. Other demons also used very long nails to pierce the body of those naked bodies. Whichever part of the body that sinned, that part will be inflicted.
Exo 21:24 Eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot, Exo 21:25 Burning for burning, wound for wound, stripe for stripe.
3) The Lawless and Ungodly Ministers

JESUS: The lawless and unrighteous ministers and Christians whose hearts are not right in Our sight, will end up in Perdition. This is also called the Outer Darkness. At present, 2% of the spirit man of Christians are in Level 2, Perdition.

These are they who choose to follow the false prophets who teach doctrine that is pleasing to their ears instead of heeding the warning of My true prophets who preach sin, righteousness and judgment. Following those uncircumcised lawless ministers who do their own will, they wilfully choose the broad way of unsanctified grace, rather than Our way of true holiness, through Our refining fire of trial in tribulation unto holiness.

Mat 7:13 Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to perdition (G684 "apoleia"), and many there be which go in thereat: Mat 7:14 Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it. Mat 7:15 Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves. Mat 7:16 Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles? Mat 7:17 Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit. Mat 7:18 A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit. Mat 7:19 Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire. Mat 7:20 Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them. Mat 7:21 Not every one that saith unto me, Lord, Lord, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out demons? and in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work lawlessness (G458 "anomia").

title: 4) Those who do not submit to Divine Ordained Authority

segments.text: 4) Those who do not submit to Divine Ordained Authority

Those who broke the Protocol of Heaven, shall be cast out into Perdition/Outer Darkness where there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth when judge before OUR GREAT WHITE THRONE, because they wilfully refuse to submit to the authority I have placed over them.

In the last days, only those who abide in the obedience of faith, and did not break rank, but are subservient with unquestionable obedience to Shekinaih, THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, and Aaron K David, the Captain of the Hosts, and Jose, the General of Our Army, and followed their respective ranks, will sit with Me in My Kingdom; while the non-subservient will be cast into this Outer Darkness where they shall weep and gnash with their teeth.

Mat 8:9 For I am a man under authority, having soldiers under me: and I say to this man, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth it. Mat 8:10 When Jesus heard it, he marvelled, and said to them that followed, Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel. Mat 8:11 And I say unto you, That many shall come from the east and west, and shall sit down with Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob, in the kingdom of heaven. Mat 8:12 But the children of the kingdom shall be cast out into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
5) Worldly Ministers
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the worldly ministers?

JESUS: They are those who made light of their calling, and are not interested to climb the steps of holiness, to prepare themselves with a wedding garment of holiness for My wedding. They have been deceived by the idols in their hearts, and the deceitfulness of riches, and are not willing to surrender their ministry to us, as it has become commercialized and indirectly became their property and business. When confronted, some would be offended, even evil-treat My prophets that are sent to them. These will be bound hand and foot, taken and cast into Perdition/Outer Darkness, where there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth. For many are called, but few are chosen.

Mat 22:1 And Jesus answered and spake unto them again by parables, and said, Mat 22:2 The kingdom of heaven is like unto a certain king, which made a marriage for his son, Mat 22:3 And sent forth his servants to call them that were bidden to the wedding: and they would not come. Mat 22:4 Again, he sent forth other servants, saying, Tell them which are bidden, Behold, I have prepared my dinner: my oxen and my fatlings are killed, and all things are ready: come unto the marriage. Mat 22:5 But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his farm, another to his merchandise: Mat 22:6 And the remnant took his servants, and entreated them spitefully, and slew them. Mat 22:7 But when the king heard thereof, he was wroth: and he sent forth his armies, and destroyed those murderers, and burned up their city. Mat 22:8 Then saith he to his servants, The wedding is ready, but they which were bidden were not worthy. Mat 22:9 Go ye therefore into the highways, and as many as ye shall find, bid to the marriage. Mat 22:10 So those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together all as many as they found, both bad and good: and the wedding was furnished with guests. Mat 22:11 And w hen the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man which had not on a wedding garment: Mat 22:12 And he saith unto him, Friend, how camest thou in hither not having a wedding garment? And he was speechless. Mat 22:13 Then said the king to the servants, Bind him hand and foot, and take him away, and cast him into outer darkness; there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth. Mat 22:14 For many are called, but few are chosen.
6) Unfaithful Brides
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who are the unfaithful Brides?

JESUS: They are those who do not take oil with them (receive THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, Our Two Cherubim of the Two Olive Trees).

Mat 25:1 Then shall the kingdom of heaven be likened unto ten virgins, which took their lamps, and went forth to meet the bridegroom. Mat 25:2 And five of them were wise, and five were foolish. Mat 25:3 They that were foolish took their lamps, and took no oil (the two) with them: Mat 25:4 But the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps. Mat 25:5 While the bridegroom tarried, they all slumbered and slept. Mat 25:6 And at midnight there was a cry made, Behold, the bridegroom cometh; go ye out to meet him. Mat 25:7 Then all those virgins arose, and trimmed their lamps. Mat 25:8 And the foolish said unto the wise, Give us of your oil; for our lamps are gone out. Mat 25:9 But the wise answered, saying, Not so; lest there be not enough for us and you: but go ye rather to them that sell, and buy for yourselves. Mat 25:10 And while they went to buy, the bridegroom came; and they that were ready went in with him to the marriage: and the door was shut. Mat 25:11 Afterward came also the other virgins, saying, Lord, Lord, open to us. Mat 25:12 But he answered and said, Verily I say unto you, I know you not. Mat 25:13 Watch therefore, for ye know neither the day nor the hour wherein the Son of man cometh.
1Ki 6:23 And within the oracle he made two cherubims of olive tree, each ten cubits high.

These are those who know who both of you are, and yet chose not to humble themselves to come under Our training and discipline unto perfection and holiness through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, Our two Anointed.
Zec 4:12 And I answered again, and said unto him, What be these two olive branches which through the two golden pipes empty the golden oil out of themselves?

Rev 11:3 And I will give power unto my two witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred and threescore days, clothed in sackcloth. Rev 11:4 These are the two olive trees, and the two lampstands standing before the God of the earth.

We have indeed sent both of you, as the Two Olive trees to pour Our spirit into the spirit man of Our last days two lampstands (Pro 20:27), so that they may be 100% yielded and led by My spirit to be entire towards Me, the bridegroom.
Pro 20:27 The spirit of man is the lamp of THE YAHWEH, searching all the inward parts of the belly.
These unfaithful have deprived themselves to be restored by the washing of regeneration by My word in Aaron K David, and the renovation of their mind through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih.
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost;
7) Unprofitable and Slothful Servants

Perdition is also reserved for the unprofitable servant, who are unfaithful to what they are given to do. These are not single in heart toward us, and abhor Our offensive way of testing. These have evil imaginations and are wise in their own eyes.

Mat 25:24 Then he which had received the one talent came and said, Lord, I knew thee that thou art an hard man, reaping where thou hast not sown, and gathering where thou hast not strawed: Mat 25:25 And I was afraid, and went and hid thy talent in the earth: lo, there thou hast that is thine. Mat 25:26 His lord answered and said unto him, Thou wicked and slothful servant, thou knewest that I reap where I sowed not, and gather where I have not strawed: Mat 25:27 Thou oughtest therefore to have put my money to the exchangers, and then at my coming I should have received mine own with usury. Mat 25:28 Take therefore the talent from him, and give it unto him which hath ten talents. Mat 25:29 For unto every one that hath shall be given, and he shall have abundance: but from him that hath not shall be taken away even that which he hath. Mat 25:30 And cast ye the unprofitable servant into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

title: 8) Those Who Persecute and Trouble Our True Ministers and Little Ones

segments.text: 8) Those Who Persecute and Trouble Our True Ministers and Little Ones

All those who persecute and go against My true ministers, My true Apostles, true Prophets, true Evangelists, true Pastors/Teachers, and true little ones will end up here in this everlasting perdition.

Without exception, and on the contrary, for those who dissuade those from persecuting My true ministers or little ones (the true children of the kingdom), will be given credit and will be lifted up by Me through Our Two Representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David, in Crowned Eagles Global.

2Th 1:4 So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of THE ELOHIM for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure: 2Th 1:5 Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, for which ye also suffer: 2Th 1:6 Seeing it is a righteous thing with THE ELOHIM to recompense tribulation to them that trouble you; 2Th 1:7 And to you who are troubled rest with us, when THE YAHWEH Jesus shall be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels, 2Th 1:8 In flaming fire taking vengeance on them that know not THE ELOHIM, and that obey not the gospel of our YAHWEH Jesus Christ: 2Th 1:9 Who shall be punished with everlasting perdition (G684 "apoleia") from the presence of THE YAHWEH and from the glory of his power; 2Th 1:10 When he shall come to be glorified in his saints, and to be admired in all them that believe (because our testimony among you was believed) in that day.

Php 1:27 Only let your conversation be as it becometh the gospel of Christ: that whether I come and see you, or else be absent, I may hear of your affairs, that ye stand fast in one spirit, with one mind striving together for the faith of the gospel; Php 1:28 And in nothing terrified by your adversaries: which is to them an evident token of perdition (G684 "apoleia"), but to you of salvation, and that of THE ELOHIM.
Those who are persecutors of the children of the Kingdom, are called vessels of wrath fitted for perdition.

Rom 9:22 What if THE ELOHIM, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to perdition (G684 "apoleia"). Rom 9:23 And that he might make known the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy, which he had afore prepared unto glory,

title: 9) They who love not the truth

segments.text: 9) They who love not the truth

They who love not the truth preached by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, being the Spirit of Truth, but have pleasure in unrighteousness and chose to follow and serve Molech/the false prophet who is the beast from the bottomless pit because of his power, signs, and lying wonders will all go into perdition with him.

2Th 2:1 Now we beseech you, brethren, by the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, and by our gathering together unto him, 2Th 2:2 That ye be not soon shaken in mind, or be troubled, neither by spirit, nor by word, nor by letter as from us, as that the day of Christ is at hand. 2Th 2:3 Let no man deceive you by any means: for that day shall not come, except there come a falling away first, and that man of sin be revealed, the son of perdition (G684 "apoleia"); 2Th 2:4 Who opposeth and exalteth himself above all that is called THE ELOHIM, or that is worshipped; so that he as THE ELOHIM sitteth in the temple of THE ELOHIM, shewing himself that he is THE ELOHIM. 2Th 2:5 Remember ye not, that, when I was yet with you, I told you these things? 2Th 2:6 And now ye know what withholdeth that he might be revealed in his time. 2Th 2:7 For the mystery of lawlessness doth already energize: only he who now letteth will let, until he be taken out of the way. 2Th 2:8 And then shall that Wicked be revealed, whom THE YAHWEH shall consume with the spirit of his mouth, and shall destroy with the brightness of his coming: 2Th 2:9 Even him, whose coming is after the energizing of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders, 2Th 2:10 And with all deceivableness of unrighteousness in them that perish; because they received not the love of the truth, that they might be saved. 2Th 2:11 And for this cause THE ELOHIM shall send them strong delusion, that they should believe a lie: 2Th 2:12 That they all might be damned who believed not the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.
10) Covetous False Prophets

Perdition is also reserved for the covetous false prophets and teachers that exploit and introduce heresies, leading others astray even denying Me, and speaking evil of the messengers who teach the way of truth.

2 Pe 2:1 But there were false prophets also among the people, even as there shall be false teachers among you, who privily shall bring in perdition (G684 "apoleia") heresies, even denying THE YAHWEH that bought them, and bring upon themselves swift perdition (G684 "apoleia"). 2 Pe 2:2 And many shall follow their perdition ways; by reason of whom the way of truth shall be evil spoken of. 2 Pe 2:3 And through covetousness shall they with feigned words make merchandise of you: whose judgment now of a long time lingereth not, and their damnation slumbereth not.
11) ScofferS
Perdition is reserved for the scoffers who walk after their own lusts, and who are willingly ignorant, deriding My coming righteous judgment.

2 Pe 3:3 Knowing this first, that there shall come in the last days scoffers, walking after their own lusts, 2 Pe 3:4 And saying, Where is the promise of his coming? for since THE FATHERs fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation. 2 Pe 3:5 For this they willingly are ignorant of, that by the word of THE ELOHIM the heavens were of old, and the earth standing out of the water and in the water: 2 Pe 3:6 Whereby the world that then was, being overflowed with water, perished: 2 Pe 3:7 But the heavens and the earth, which are now, by the same word are kept in store, reserved unto fire against the Day of Judgment and perdition (G684 "apoleia") of ungodly men.
12) Covetous
Perdition is also reserved for those who are covetous, which is idolatry, which causes them to err from the faith and drown them into destruction.
Covetous means greed in its subtlety. It implies the hoarding of finance, valuable items, belonging, that belong to others, etc.

1 Ti 6:9 But they that will be rich fall into temptation and a snare, and into many foolish and hurtful lusts, which drown men in destruction and perdition (G684 "apoleia"). 1 Ti 6:10 For the love of money is the root of all evil: which while some coveted after, they have erred from the faith, and pierced themselves through with many sorrows.
13) The Worldly

Perdition is reserved for those who are called into glory, but despise it and mind earthly things; and treasure them in high regard more than the things of My Kingdom. There are thereby trapped by the deceitfulness of riches, the pride of life, the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, and all the things of this world. They will thereby, be plunged into Perdition and utter destruction together with this world and with all his/her possession.

Php 3:18 (For many walk, of whom I have told you often, and now tell you even weeping, that they are the enemies of the cross of Christ: Php 3:19 Whose end is perdition (G684 "apoleia"), whose god is their belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who mind earthly things.) Php 3:20 For our conversation is in heaven; from whence also we look for the Saviour, THE YAHWEH JESUS Christ: Php 3:21 Who shall change our vile body, that it may be fashioned like unto his glorious body, according to the working whereby he is able even to subdue all things unto himself.
14) Apostates

Perdition is also reserved for those who have been illuminated with the true gospel, gone through a great affliction both in reproach and affliction, but later withdrew from this fight of faith and went into apostasy.

Heb 10:26 For if we sin wilfully after that we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remaineth no more sacrifice for sins, Heb 10:27 But a certain fearful looking for of judgment and fiery indignation, which shall devour the adversaries. Heb 10:28 He that despised Moses' law died without mercy under two or three witnesses: Heb 10:29 Of how much sorer punishment, suppose ye, shall he be thought worthy, who hath trodden under foot the Son of THE ELOHIM, and hath counted the blood of the covenant, wherewith he was sanctified, an unholy thing, and hath insulted the Spirit of grace? Heb 10:30 For we know him that hath said, Vengeance belongeth unto me, I will recompense, saith THE YAHWEH. And again, THE YAHWEH shall judge his people. Heb 10:31 It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living ELOHIM. Heb 10:32 But call to remembrance the former days, in which, after ye were illuminated, ye endured a great fight of afflictions; Heb 10:33 Partly, whilst ye were made a gazingstock both by reproaches and afflictions; and partly, whilst ye became companions of them that were so used. Heb 10:34 For ye had compassion of me in my bonds, and took joyfully the spoiling of your goods, knowing in yourselves that ye have in heaven a better and an enduring substance. Heb 10:35 Cast not away therefore your confidence, which hath great recompence of reward. Heb 10:36 For ye have need of patience, that, after ye have done the will of THE ELOHIM, ye might receive the promise. Heb 10:37 For yet a little while, and he that shall come will come, and will not tarry. Heb 10:38 Now the just shall live by faith: but if he draw back, my soul shall have no pleasure in him. Heb 10:39 But we are not of them who draw back unto perdition (G684 "apoleia"); but of them that believe to the saving of the soul.
Between Level 2 and 3: Basanos

After finishing the exposition in Perdition, they were immediately teleported to a place between Level 2 and 3. Standing before them was an iron jail. The name written on the top of the iron jail was the word, "Basanos". JESUS then continued to explain to them about this place as they sojourned inside this place...
A) WHO GOES TO BASANOS
1) The Frivolous and the Uncompassionate
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where is this place and who are placed here?

JESUS: This section is meant for people who lived frivolous lives in their lifetime; being preoccupied only with themselves, self-indulgently carefree; unconcerned about or lacking any serious purpose in life, self-centered, selfish, unmerciful, etc…

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of JESUS coming in the form of a poor man crying out to a rich man, but the rich man covered his ears with both his hands and turned a deaf ear to him. I then saw a vision of Lazarus and the rich man. The rich man was tormented in the flame.
JESUS: The rich man was tormented in the fire in Basanos. So are they who live frivolously in self-indulgence.

Those who are stingy to us, but spend excessively on themselves thereby crossing the line to numb their feeling on Our needy children, will reap the same fate for themselves, when they cross over from life to death, and will thereby be tormented in this place. When they cry to us, We will also numb our feeling, and cover both of ears with Our hand and not hear their cry as well.
Pro 21:13 Whoso stoppeth his ears at the cry of the poor, he also shall cry himself, but shall not be heard.

Luk 16:19 There was a certain rich man, which was clothed in purple and fine linen, and fared sumptuously every day: Luk 16:20 And there was a certain beggar named Lazarus, which was laid at his gate, full of sores, Luk 16:21 And desiring to be fed with the crumbs which fell from the rich man's table: moreover the dogs came and licked his sores. Luk 16:22 And it came to pass, that the beggar died, and was carried by the angels into Abraham's bosom: the rich man also died, and was buried; Luk 16:23 And in hell he lift up his eyes, being in Basanos (G931 "basanos" torment), and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his bosom. Luk 16:24 And he cried and said, Father Abraham, have mercy on me, and send Lazarus, that he may dip the tip of his finger in water, and cool my tongue; for I am tormented in this flame.
2) The unforgiving ones
The purpose of torment in Basanos is My justice in operation. He who forgives not men their trespasses from their heart seventy times seven, neither will My FATHER forgives his trespasses.
Mat 6:14 For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you: Mat 6:15 But if ye forgive not men their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.

Those who cannot forgive those who transgressed against them are swallowed up by the spirit of bitterness; and are in gall of bitterness, and in the bond of iniquity. While they live, they are tormented in different parts of the body, by the demons in different places in Basanos.

Act 8:22 Repent therefore of this thy wickedness, and pray God, if perhaps the thought of thine heart may be forgiven thee. Act 8:23 For I perceive that thou art in the gall of bitterness, and in the bond of iniquity.
3) Against My Instruction in the Scripture

Those who rebel against My instructions, warnings, and commandments through My true representatives, especially Shekinaih and Aaron K David and My true servants, are abominations in My sight; and Basanos, the place of torment, and Level 1 and 2 and the lower part of Level 3, with their violent demons of torment await them. However, when there are conflicts in the commandments, instructions or warnings, My words through Shekinaih will have the LAST and FINAL SAY, followed by Aaron K David.

Most of humanity are in slavery under the elements/planets of the Cosmoses. So, it is not surprising that certain portions of the spirit man of Christians are locked up either in one of the levels of Hell on these planets. About 90% of certain portions of the spirit man of Christians who are alive and still living in sins, are locked up in Hades/Pluto at present.

Gal 4:3 Even so we, when we were children, were in slavery (G1402 "douloo") under the elements (planets) of the Cosmos: Gal 4:4 But when the fulness of the time was come, THE ELOHIM sent forth his Son, made of a woman, made under the law, Gal 4:5 To redeem them that were under the law, that we might receive the adoption of sons.

If they are overcome by the demons who control and manifest the works of the flesh through them while they are alive, they are still slaves to these evil spirits who have authority over them. These will be locked up with them in one of the levels of Hell, according to their spiritual condition when they die. As the demons have tormented and vexed them in the form of corruption in disease of the body and mind while they were alive on Earth, they will continue to do this in Level 1, Level 2, or Basanos.

2 Pe 2:19 While they promise them liberty, they themselves are the slaves (G1401 "doulos") of corruption (G5356 "phthora" from G5351 "phtheiro" to shrivel or wither, to spoil, to ruin): for of whom a man is overcome, of the same is he brought in slavery (G1402 "douloo").
DAVID: JESUS, what do you mean by a certain of the portion of the spirit man being locked up there while they are still alive?
Psa 86:13 For great is thy mercy toward me: and thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest Sheol (H7585).
JESUS: King David of old knew what it was like to have a certain portion of his spirit man locked up, and tormented in the lowest Sheol, Basanos, which is between Level 2 and 3 of Hell/Heaven.

Psa 30:2 O YAHWEH my ELOHIM, I cried unto thee, and thou hast healed me. Psa 30:3 O YAHWEH, thou hast brought up my soul from the Sheol (H7585): thou hast kept me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.

Because of the murder of Uriah, the husband of Bathsheba, King David gave Satan an occasion to scorn us, and ask for the death of the child of David and Bathsheba. In regard to his adultery with Bathsheba, Satan had demanded justice that certain portions of David's spirit should be locked up in Basanos, to be vexed by the demons there until he truly brings fruits meet for repentance.
Psa 51:8 Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which thou hast broken may rejoice.

SHEKINAIH: In Basanos, I saw a vision of certain portions of King David's spirit being tormented. His leg was being tied upside down, and hung over a station which looked like a merry-go-round with fire below roasting him. At the same time, several demons stood around the station, and used red hot spears to pierce into every part of his body. His private part was pierced more often than the other parts. This vexation in the spirit was manifested in his physical loins as a loathsome disease. I saw King David having boils all over his loins, the size of 1.5 inches in diameter.

Psa 38:1 A Psalm of David, to bring to remembrance. O YAHWEH, rebuke me not in thy wrath: neither chasten me in thy hot displeasure. Psa 38:2 For thine spears (H2671 "chets" a piercer) sink into me, and thy hand presseth me sore. Psa 38:3 There is no soundness in my flesh because of thine anger; neither is there any rest in my bones because of my sin. Psa 38:4 For mine iniquities are gone over mine head: as an heavy burden they are too heavy for me. Psa 38:5 My wounds stink and are corrupt because of my foolishness. Psa 38:6 I am troubled; I am bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day long. Psa 38:7 For my loins are completely (H7390 "male") scorched (H7033 "qalah" to toast, roast): and there is no soundness in my flesh. Psa 38:8 I am feeble and sore broken: I have roared by reason of the disquietness of my heart.
JESUS: Yes, the sick people that were taken with diseases and torments whom I have healed, had certain portions of their spirit tormented in Basanos by demons because of their sins.

Mat 4:24 And his fame went throughout all Syria: and they brought unto him all sick people that were taken with divers diseases, and torments (G931 "basanos" touchstone) and those which were vexed by demons (G1139 "daimonizomai"), and those which were lunatick, and those that had the palsy; and he healed them.

The man with an unclean spirit in the country of Gadarenes, also had certain portions of his spirit tormented by demons from Basanos. His spirit man was continuously cut in hell, which was manifested in the physical. The demons that were from Basanos, which were permitted to roam on Earth to vex human, were very afraid to be sent back to Basanos or even to Tartarus before their time. This is because, in there, were even more violent demons than them which would bully and torment them as well. This is the reason why they begged Me not to send them to these places of torment before their time.

Mar 5:5 And always, night and day, he was in the mountains, and in the tombs, crying, and cutting himself with stones. Mar 5:6 But when he saw Jesus afar off, he ran and worshipped him, Mar 5:7 And cried with a loud voice, and said, What have I to do with thee, Jesus, thou Son of the most high God? I adjure thee by THE ELOHIM, basanos me not (G928 "basanizo") . Mar 5:8 For he said unto him, Come out of the man, thou unclean spirit. Mar 5:9 And he asked him, What is thy name? And he answered, saying, My name is Legion: for we are many. Mar 5:10 And he besought him much that he would not send them away out of the country.

In the last days, the more vicious demons from Tartarus will be released to torment those who are not sealed with My FATHER'S NAME(S). Certain portions of their spirit man will be tormented with unbearable boils for five months because of their ungodliness.

Rev 9:3 And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power. Rev 9:4 And it was commanded them that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree; but only those men which have not the seal of THE ELOHIM in their foreheads. Rev 9:5 And to them it was given that they should not kill them, but that they should be tormented (G929 "basanismos" from G928 ") five months: and their torment was as the torment of a scorpion, when he striketh a man. Rev 9:6 And in those days shall men seek death, and shall not find it; and shall desire to die, and death shall flee from them.

Basanos is the Greek word for, "touchstone". Touchstone is a hard, black stone, used to test the quality of gold or silver by comparing the streaks left on the stone by one of these metals with that of a standard alloy. Synonymously, touchstone is a criterion or standard by which judgment is made, or an excellent quality or example that is used to test the excellence or genuineness of others.
Part of the purpose of torment in Basanos, is to test whether the one who is tormented, is willing to genuinely repent, and bring fruit meet for repentance before they can be released.

King David fully understood the reason and the purpose why he was tormented in Basanos. That is why, he acknowledged his sins and cried for Our mercy and compassion, to purge him from his sinful nature, and to be given a clean heart and an upright spirit, so that he in turn would voluntarily teach transgressors Our way, regarding Our true sacrifices which is a broken and remorseful heart.

Psa 51:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David, when Nathan the prophet came unto him, after he had gone in to Bathsheba. Have mercy upon me, O THE ELOHIM, according to thy lovingkindness: according unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions. Psa 51:2 Wash me throughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin. Psa 51:3 For I acknowledge my transgressions: and my sin is ever before me. Psa 51:4 Against thee, thee only, have I sinned, and done this evil in thy sight: that thou mightest be justified when thou speakest, and be clear when thou judgest. Psa 51:5 Behold, I was shapen in iniquity; and in sin did my mother conceive me. Psa 51:6 Behold, thou desirest truth in the inward parts: and in the hidden part thou shalt make me to know wisdom. Psa 51:7 Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean: wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow. Psa 51:8 Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which thou hast broken may rejoice. Psa 51:9 Hide thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities. Psa 51:10 Create in me a clean heart, O THE ELOHIM; and renew a right spirit within me. Psa 51:11 Cast me not away from thy presence; and take not thy holy spirit from me. Psa 51:12 Restore unto me the joy of thy salvation; and uphold me with thy free spirit. Psa 51:13 Then will I teach transgressors thy ways; and sinners shall be converted unto thee.
David, why don't you share My FATHER's dealing with you in Basanos when you sinned?
B) Experience in Basanos

DAVID: Few years ago, I met a pastor by divine appointment in London. After praying together and seeking THE YAHWEH, we were led by THE HOLY SPIRIT to work together in his village in Africa on an appointed date. Prior to my visit to his village, I had been in Africa many times working with a pastor and in other villages, but this time, I only worked with this particular pastor in his village. As led by THE HOLY SPIRIT, he with another pastor planned an evangelical rally for me in an open field in their village, and I was impressed by THE HOLY SPIRIT to stay there for a month for this mission.
In the first two weeks, I was teaching daily in his church the way of THE YAHWEH.

One day, he told me that he needed some money to pay for the examination fee for his three children. In prompt response to his plight, I joyfully helped. But the following day, I was upset that he had used the money for other luxurious purposes and I felt betrayed. After this incident, I lost my peace to continue to work with him.

After inquiring from THE YAHWEH whether I should continue to stay there, I have an impression that I should not continue with him. So, after telling him of my decision, he sent me off the next day and I took a bus and headed to the city which was many hours of ride. During the long ride, I was tired and did not feel well.

Upon reaching, a Christian sister who was an owner of a boutique shop in the city hosted me in her house. While staying there waiting for the actual date of my pre-arranged flight back to Singapore, I fell sick.
The reason was because of mosquitoes which were everywhere in that village, and when I was sleeping under a mosquito's net, some managed to get to me and I was stung many times and became weak.

As to my usual routine when I am not feeling well, I fasted for many days, and only drank water during that time. The mother of my host was getting worried and seeing that I was weak and always resting, she insisted that I should be admitted to the hospital as she was afraid that I would die in her house.

After failing to convince her that I would be well soon, I was sent to the hospital on the tenth day and was given drips of glucose daily because I was not eating at all due to frequent vomiting after eating the food there. To make things worse, the hospital room was infested with innumerous mosquitoes. After having failed to keep them out of the mosquito net, I resigned my fate to be a bloody feast for them. Throughout my admission, I did not take any of their medicine but was daily praying for my healing. All these times, my family was praying for me at home.

On the fourth night, my spirit was seized by two demons that were covered with shit. They forced my face into a bath tub like container full of shit many times. After that, they took me down a hole. As we were plunging down, I cried out to JESUS pleading that my time was not up yet, for the works My FATHER had for me to do on Earth were not finished yet.

Immediately, two angels with sword appeared out of nowhere and the two demons immediately released me in terror, and I found myself awake in the still of the night on the hospital bed with swarm of mosquitoes all hanging on the inside of the net after fully feasted to their hearts' content on my blood. This incident happened to me repeatedly for three consecutive nights and each time I would be lifted up back to the hospital bed accompanied with a swarm of fattened mosquitoes inside the mosquito net.

By then, I was getting very weak and the following day, THE ELOHIM released the word of healing through one of His children and I was quickened in my spirit man and thereby I requested to be discharged. My request was rejected by the doctor. Upon my persistency, they asked me to sign a paper of disclamation and at the same time videoed me while I was signing the paper, and told me that if I die outside, they were not to be blamed. I gladly agreed to their request.

To make the story short, after travelling many hours to Heathrow airport in London, sustained only by many cans of soda water on the plane, I reached the London apartment of the sister of the Christian sister who hosted me in Africa and rested there for a night. The next day, I went on the plane from Heathrow heading home.

Upon reaching Singapore Airport, my wife was unable to recognize me but was fully shocked with horror when she finally recognized me. By that time, I look like a prisoner of war with skin covering my bones state of appearance.
It took me 3 months before I was fully recovered.

After this incident, for many years, I was still convinced that leaving the pastor in Africa was a righteous decision; and my casualty was part and parcel of those who enter warfare in Mission works, until I co-worked with Shekinaih eight years ago.

I was told by Shekinaih that the whole incident was scripted by THE FATHER, who is the script writer of the event of the Cosmoses. THE FATHER had permitted me to experience Basanos, so that I could now relate regarding His discipline.

I was disciplined because of my self-righteousness, lack of mercy and critical spirit, because I was angry with the pastor for sinning against me. I have judged him without mercy, and was also found wanting in lack of meekness of love and wisdom, in covering his transgression and have denied the villagers from knowing the mercy and saving grace of JESUS, by prematurely leaving the village.

Now, I can really relate to what JESUS meant, when he said that anyone who is angry with his brother, when he is weak and yielded to temptation, is in the danger of the judgment. I was indeed judged because of my self-righteousness. I have judged this pastor before his time. Consequently, I was therefore judged before the council in heaven before Satan and found wanting. I had treated the pastor as an unworthy one for giving in to covetousness for earthly things, and had judged him without mercy, and because of that, Satan asked for me to sift me and dragged my spirit down to Basanos to be tormented. If not for the faithfulness of JESUS who heard my pleading, and sending His two angels to deliver me, I would have died and be locked up in Basanos eternally. I had sown unforgiveness and reaped unforgiveness. I had lost my court case to Satan, the adversary, and THE RIGHTEOUS JUDGE JESUS, had delivered me to the officer/tormenting demons to be tormented in Basanos to purge me of my self-righteousness. I truly believe that if not for the mercy of JESUS, and the prayer of my family and the intercessor's prayer and word, I would have to pay the last farthing to get out of the torment in Basanos.

Thereby, I sincerely hope that my experience above, will enlighten and also, serve as a warning to those who are self-righteous, and who are quick to judge without mercy and unforgiveness, just like me in the above incident.

Mat 5:21 Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger of the judgment: Mat 5:22 But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother who is weak ( G1500 "eike" through the idea of failure, from G1502: Eiko" to be weak, that is yield: give place)) shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca (G4469 "rhaka" worthless), shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool ( G3474 "moros" stupid), shall be in danger of the Gehenna (G1067 "geena") fire. Mat 5:23 Therefore if thou bring thy gift to the altar, and there rememberest that thy brother hath ought against thee; Mat 5:24 Leave there thy gift before the altar, and go thy way; first be reconciled to thy brother, and then come and offer thy gift. Mat 5:25 Agree with thine adversary quickly, whiles thou art in the way with him; lest at any time the adversary deliver thee to the judge, and the judge deliver thee to the officer, and thou be cast into prison. Mat 5:26 Verily I say unto thee, Thou shalt by no means come out thence, till thou hast paid the uttermost farthing.

THE TRINITY clapping their hands to applaud David said in unison, "You are much wiser now having a real encounter in the spiritual world, which will propel you to have a quantum leap jump in understanding of Our ways, in dealing and disciplining those whom We love. Bravo! David."
Level 3, Hades/Sheol

Instantly, they were all teleported to Level 3 called Sheol/Hades. Upon arrival, a large crowd of dead souls with pale lifeless faces dressed up in Black Death garments were queuing up to be allotted in their predestined torturing allotment unit; while others were already in their tormenting hell fire iron prison cells. Some being tormented with the piercing of multiple fiery spears charring their different parts of their body in accordance to the area they have given in to the enemy in sin. Some of these torments are similar to Level 1 and 2 of Hell/Heaven but with less intense fire. The fire in Level 1 is the most intense followed by medium intensity in Level 2, and half the intensity of Level 2 fire in Level 3.

JESUS: This is the lower part of Sheol. There is an upper and a lower part in Sheol. In the upper Sheol, there is no fire, while in the lower Sheol, there is still fire of torment. The rich man in Luke 16:24 was in the lower part of Sheol which is inflamed with fire, while Lazarus was in Abraham's creek which I will expound to you later when We are there.

Luk 16:19 There was a certain rich man, which was clothed in purple and fine linen, and fared sumptuously every day: Luk 16:20 And there was a certain beggar named Lazarus, which was laid at his gate, full of sores, Luk 16:21 And desiring to be fed with the crumbs which fell from the rich man's table: moreover the dogs came and licked his sores. Luk 16:22 And it came to pass, that the beggar died, and was carried by the angels into Abraham's creek (G2859 "kolpos"): the rich man also died, and was buried; Luk 16:23 And in hades (G68) he lift up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his bosom. Luk 16:24 And he cried and said, Father Abraham, have mercy on me, and send Lazarus, that he may dip the tip of his finger in water, and cool my tongue; for I am tormented in this flame. Luk 16:25 But Abraham said, Son, remember that thou in thy lifetime receivedst thy good things, and likewise Lazarus evil things: but now he is comforted, and thou art tormented. Luk 16:26 And beside all this, between us and you there is a great gulf fixed: so that they which would pass from hence to you cannot; neither can they pass to us that would come from thence.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, where is Sheol?
JESUS: Sheol/Hades is situated on the planet Pluto.
In this place, the whole sky is covered with evil spirits, and like black clouds they cover the land. In there, there is no order.

Job 10:18 Wherefore then hast thou brought me forth out of the womb? Oh that I had given up the ghost, and no eye had seen me! Job 10:19 I should have been as though I had not been; I should have been carried from the womb to the grave. Job 10:20 Are not my days few? cease then, and let me alone, that I may take comfort a little, Job 10:21 Before I go whence I shall not return, even to the land of darkness and the shadow of death; Job 10:22 A land of obscurity, as darkness itself; and of the shadow of death, without any order, and where the light is as darkness.
It is also called the land of darkness or shadow of death.
Psa 23:4 Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me.

Our Throne covers (encompasses) every level of the heavens and hell. Therefore, there is no place the workers of lawlessness and unrighteousness can hide themselves from us through Shekinaih and you, The She/He, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, THE ULTIMATE JUDGE, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE ELOAH, OUR EYES, JUDGING ON OUR BEHALF as THE EL SHADDAI before THE GREAT WHITE THRONE.

Job 11:7 Canst thou by searching find out THE ELOAH? canst thou find out THE SHADDAI unto perfection? Job 11:8 It is as high as heaven; what canst thou do? deeper than Sheol (H7585); what canst thou know?
Job 34:21 For his eyes are upon the ways of man, and he seeth all his goings. Job 34:22 There is no darkness, nor shadow of death, where the workers of iniquity may hide themselves.

Psa 139:7 Whither shall I go from thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from thy presence? Psa 139:8 If I ascend up into heaven, thou art there: if I make my bed in Sheol (H7585), behold, thou art there. Psa 139:9 If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea; Psa 139:10 Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me. Psa 139:11 If I say, Surely the darkness shall cover me; even the night shall be light about me. Psa 139:12 Yea, the darkness hideth not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light are both alike to thee.
Even though the majority of the world's population, past, present, and future would be there, Sheol would never be satisfied.

Pro 30:15 The horseleach hath two daughters, crying, Give, give. There are three things that are never satisfied, yea, four things say not, It is enough: Pro 30:16 The Sheol (H7585); and the barren womb; the earth that is not filled with water; and the fire that saith not, It is enough.
Lucifer, the strange woman mentioned in Proverbs 5 sustains Sheol and wishes that all humans end up there.

Pro 5:3 For the lips of a strange woman drop as an honeycomb, and her mouth is smoother than oil: Pro 5:4 But her end is bitter as wormwood, sharp as a two-edged sword. Pro 5:5 Her feet go down to death; her steps sustain sheol (H7585).
Therefore, she seduces humanity with lust and leads them astray and causes them to end up in Sheol.

Pro 7:24 Hearken unto me now therefore, O ye children, and attend to the words of my mouth. Pro 7:25 Let not thine heart decline to her ways, go not astray in her paths. Pro 7:26 For she hath cast down many wounded: yea, many strong men have been slain by her. Pro 7:27 Her house is the way to Sheol (H7585), going down to the chambers of death.

Have I not spoken that whosoever looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart? So is every evil intent and thought. Even it is not committed, according to My just weight against man's heart, they would be found wanting and in the danger of being sent to Sheol when they pass away.
