In Sheol, the dead cannot return to the living unless I who have the keys of Death and Hades intervene through My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, whom represented us as Our Ultimate Cosmos Judge (The Major) and Me and Victory Angel represented by David (The Minor), both, in whom We have given the "Main Keys" and the "Sub-Keys" of both Hades and Death respectively.

Job 16:15 I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin, and defiled my horn in the dust. Job 16:16 My face is foul with weeping, and on my eyelids is the shadow of death; Job 16:17 Not for any injustice in mine hands: also my prayer is pure. Job 16:18 O earth, cover not thou my blood, and let my cry have no place. Job 16:19 Also now, behold, my witness is in heaven, and my record is on high. Job 16:20 My friends scorn me: but mine eye poureth out tears unto THE ELOAH. Job 16:21 O that one might plead for a man with THE ELOAH, as a man pleadeth for his neighbour! Job 16:22 When a few years are come, then I shall go the way whence I shall not return.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, who shall be sent there when they pass away?

title: Who shall be sent to Sheol?

segments.text: Who shall be sent to Sheol?
1) All Humanity Except Our Holy Ones

JESUS: After they passed away, all souls of humanity will be locked up in Sheol. They who have evil intents and evil thoughts but did not commit the sin in the flesh will be in the upper part of Sheol. They that committed sin in the flesh will be tormented with fire in the lower part of Sheol.

Psa 89:47 Remember how short my time is: wherefore hast thou made all men in vain? Psa 89:48 What man is he that liveth, and shall not see death? shall he deliver his soul from the hand of Sheol (H7585)? Selah.
Jacob and Joseph were in the upper part of Sheol after they died.

Gen 37:35 And all his sons and all his daughters rose up to comfort him; but he refused to be comforted; and he said, For I will go down into Sheol (H7585) unto my son mourning. Thus his father wept for him.
The Prophet Samuel, King Saul and Jonathan were also in Sheol.

1Sa 28:19 Moreover THE YAHWEH will also deliver Israel with thee into the hand of the Philistines: and to morrow shalt thou and thy sons be with me: THE YAHWEH also shall deliver the host of Israel into the hand of the Philistines.
Job was also there after he passed away.

Job 17:13 If I wait, Sheol (H7585) is mine house: I have made my bed in the darkness. Job 17:14 I have said to corruption, Thou art my father: to the worm, Thou art my mother, and my sister. Job 17:15 And where is now my hope? As for my hope, who shall see it? Job 17:16 They shall go down to the bars of sheol (H7585) when our rest together is in the dust.
2) All sinners sent to lower Sheol
All sinners who continue in sin would be sent to lower Sheol where they would be tormented with fire for their sins.
Job 24:19 Drought and heat consume the snow waters: so doth Sheol (H7585) those which have sinned.
3) All the Ungodly Nations
All the ungodly nations who did not put My FATHER in their eyes will also be there.

Psa 9:16 THE YAHWEH is known by the judgment which he executeth: the wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah. Psa 9:17 The wicked shall be turned into Sheol (H7585), and all the nations that forget THE ELOHIM.
4) All the Children of Rebellion
All the children of rebellion's spirit men are there when they are still alive, and will continue to be tormented there when they pass away.
Pro 23:13 Withhold not correction from the child: for if thou beatest him with the rod, he shall not die. Pro 23:14 Thou shalt beat him with the rod, and shalt deliver his soul from Sheol.
5) All Ungodly Kings, Even Lucifer
All ungodly kings are locked up there, and Lucifer is no exception until his destruction in the lake of fire with her false prophet Molech.

Isa 14:9 Sheol (H7585) from beneath is moved for thee to meet thee at thy coming: it stirreth up the dead for thee, even all the chief ones of the earth; it hath raised up from their thrones all the kings of the nations. Isa 14:10 All they shall speak and say unto thee, Art thou also become weak as we? art thou become like unto us? Isa 14:11 Thy pomp is brought down to the grave, and the noise of thy viols: the worm is spread under thee, and the worms cover thee. Isa 14:12 How art thou fallen from heaven, O Lucifer, son of the morning! how art thou cut down to the ground, which didst weaken the nations! Isa 14:13 For thou hast said in thine heart, I will ascend into heaven, I will exalt my throne above the stars of THE EL: I will sit also upon the mount of the congregation, in the sides of the north: Isa 14:14 I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will be like the most High. Isa 14:15 Yet thou shalt be brought down to sheol (H7585), to the sides of the pit. Isa 14:16 They that see thee shall narrowly look upon thee, and consider thee, saying, Is this the man that made the earth to tremble, that did shake kingdoms;
6) Carnal-Minded Christians

Most Christians are taken captive by the devil at his will (2Ti 2:25) due to the lack of knowledge of Our way of holiness. They are still walking according to the course of this age, according to the prince of the authority of the air, the spirit that are still energizing them in their daily conversation in the lusts of their flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind. Therefore, Sheol has enlarged herself, and opened her mouth without measure.

Isa 5:13 Therefore my people are gone into captivity, because they have no knowledge: and their honorable men are famished, and their multitude dried up with thirst. Isa 5:14 Therefore Sheol (H7585) hath enlarged herself, and opened her mouth without measure: and their glory, and their multitude, and their pomp, and he that rejoiceth, shall descend into.
Carnal Mindedness is equal to enmity to Our mind, and cannot please us nor can it be allowed to enter into Our Kingdom of Heavens, which are meant for the Spiritual Mindedness, just like us.

Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:5 For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit. Rom 8:6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace. Rom 8:7 Because the carnal mind is enmity against God: for it is not subject to the law of God, neither indeed can be. Rom 8:8 So then they that are in the flesh cannot please God. Rom 8:9 But ye are not in the flesh, but in the Spirit, if so be that the Spirit of God dwell in you. Now if any man have not the Spirit of Christ, he is none of his.

At present, 90% of the Christians' souls both the living and the dead, are being locked up in Sheol/Shadow of Death Worldwide. Therefore, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, represented by Shekinaih; and I, represented by you; is THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), THE ELIJAH (THE MAJOR and THE MINOR), who was, and is, and is to come, shall give light to these that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death; to guide their feet into the way of peace so that they can be translated into Our kingdom of light.

Luk 1:76 And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of THE YAHWEH to prepare his ways; Luk 1:77 To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins, Luk 1:78 Through the tender mercy of our ELOHIM; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us, Luk 1:79 To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace. Luk 1:80 And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.
But not all men have faith. The majority of the people in the world will choose to be influenced, and energized by the companies of Death and Sheol to hate and persecute My real church.

Psa 18:4 The companies (H2256 "chebel") of death (H4194 "maveth") compassed me, and the floods of ungodly men made me afraid. Psa 18:5 The companies of Sheol (H7585) compassed me about: the snares of death prevented me.
They shall not prevail, but will be sent to the lowest Sheol for torment.
Mat 16:18 And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hades (G68) shall not prevail against it.
Level 4, THE GREAT WHITE THRONE
After visiting Sheol, both Shekinaih and David were again teleported to Level 4, THE GREAT WHITE THRONE.

JESUS: THE GREAT WHITE THRONE is in the center of the Earth. When someone dies, his soul will be lifted up as if in an elevator, and he will cross the bridge across the river which is a vortex, a crossover from life to death. He will be placed in Level 4 and stand before THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, where We, THE TRINITY sit as THE ULTIMATE COSMOS JUDGE or THE ANCIENT OF DAYS through Shekinaih (THE MAJOR) will release THE FATHER'S decree, seal and execute it; and you (THE MINOR) will co-execute it, to send each soul to the level that he/she will be placed.

Rev 20:11 And I saw a GREAT WHITE THRONE, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them. Rev 20:12 And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before God; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works. Rev 20:13 And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and hades (G68) delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works. Rev 20:14 And death and hades (G68) were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death. Rev 20:15 And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.
Level 5, Abaddon (The Brighter Side, First Level of Heaven)
After JESUS had finished explaining THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, they were teleported to Level 5, Abaddon.

JESUS: Abaddon is a confined and restricted area, but it is in a much nicer environment. Everyone is still restricted within their compounds with an Iron Gate and iron fence. Each having a compound of the size of Singapore and The River of Life flow through here. There are flowers, and fruit trees in each of the compounds.
From this level onwards, Level 5 (Abaddon), Level 6 (Abraham's Bosom) and Level 7 (Paradise), Christians with different degrees of purity will go to these places.

My real children who have kept themselves pure and have passed My 7 Squeezes/Offences Tests, will be given divine robes to wear and be qualified as Our real sons and daughters. Their spirit man will be placed in accordance to their different spiritual level of purity, yieldedness, and obedience unto us when they were alive. They will continue to dwell there even after they have passed away as their spirit man will be in a permanent state once they passed on.

Only Shekinaih, representing THE FATHER as THE ULTIMATE JUDGE, is given the authority to change a person's spirit man after he/she had passed away. On selected and limited occasions, you, David, will be given this authority to do so as well.
Abaddon and Sheol are the names of the angels that are in charge of these planets, and they are subjected to Me.
Job 26:6 Sheol (H7585) is naked before him, and Abaddon hath no covering. Pro 15:11 Sheol (H7585) and Abaddon are before THE YAHWEH: how much more then the hearts of the children of men?

Job 28:20 Whence then cometh wisdom? and where is the place of understanding? Job 28:21 Seeing it is hid from the eyes of all living, and kept close from the fowls of the air. Job 28:22 Abaddon and death say, We have heard the fame thereof with our ears.
This is a land of forgetfulness/oblivion.

Psa 88:11 Shall thy lovingkindness be declared in the grave? or thy faithfulness in Abaddon (H11)? Psa 88:12 Shall thy wonders be known in the dark? and thy righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?

This is an unknown planet in which the left half section is full of light and right half section is full of darkness. The part that is full of darkness is filled with fire and is overlapping with Level 3 Sheol. 3% of the spirit man of Christians are in there since the beginning of creation until now.
Job 31:12 For it is a fire that consumeth to Abaddon (H11), and would root out all mine increase.
The half which is full of darkness, is also called the mist of darkness. It consists of half of Level 2 and half of Level 3.

Beware; the ungodly vessel of Satan being raised up like Judas; like Pharaoh; like the Pharisees; like those who dare to voice out in contrary against Our revealed oracle through Our last group of people chosen and appointed to usher in Our beloved in the last days through Our Two Representatives, Shekinaih and Aaron K David in Crowned Eagles Global, will thereby be judged by us through them and be cast into Outer Darkness and beyond without second chance into oblivion when their fullness time are up and numbered by us.

2 Pe 2:9 THE YAHWEH knoweth how to deliver the godly out of temptations, and to reserve the unjust unto the Day of Judgment to be punished: 2 Pe 2:10 But chiefly them that walk after the flesh in the lust of uncleanness, and despise government. Presumptuous are they, selfwilled, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignities. 2 Pe 2:11 Whereas angels, which are greater in power and might, bring not railing accusation against them before THE YAHWEH. 2 Pe 2:12 But these, as natural brute beasts, made to be taken and destroyed, speak evil of the things that they understand not; and shall utterly perish in their own corruption; 2 Pe 2:13 And shall receive the reward of unrighteousness, as they that count it pleasure to riot in the day time. Spots they are and blemishes, sporting themselves with their own deceivings while they feast with you; 2 Pe 2:14 Having eyes full of adultery, and that cannot cease from sin; beguiling unstable souls: an heart they have exercised with covetous practices; cursed children: 2 Pe 2:15 Which have forsaken the right way, and are gone astray, following the way of Balaam the son of Bosor, who loved the wages of unrighteousness; 2 Pe 2:16 But was rebuked for his iniquity: the dumb ass speaking with man's voice forbad the madness of the prophet. 2 Pe 2:17 These are wells without water, clouds that are carried with a tempest; to whom the mist of darkness is reserved for ever. 2 Pe 2:18 For when they speak great swelling words of vanity, they allure through the lusts of the flesh, through much wantonness, those that were clean escaped from them who live in error. 2 Pe 2:19 While they promise them liberty, they themselves are the servants of corruption: for of whom a man is overcome, of the same is he brought in bondage. 2 Pe 2:20 For if after they have escaped the pollutions of the world through the knowledge of THE YAHWEH and Saviour Jesus Christ, they are again entangled therein, and overcome, the latter end is worse with them than the beginning. 2 Pe 2:21 For it had been better for them not to have known the way of righteousness, than, after they have known it, to turn from the holy commandment delivered unto them. 2 Pe 2:22 But it is happened unto them according to the true proverb, The dog is turned to his own vomit again; and the sow that was washed to her wallowing in the mire.
Level 6, Abraham's Creek (Bosom)
JESUS then said to them, "Now We shall go to Abraham's Creek". In a twinkling of an eye, they were teleported to Level 6, Abraham's Creek.

JESUS: Abraham's Creek (Bosom) is also a protected area in another planet. The compounds are bigger than Level 5. Each person is given a lot ten times the size of Singapore. There are trees and the River of Life flows beside them. The inhabitants are also not permitted to tread beyond their allotted area. This is in an unknown planet. 2% of the spirit man of Christians are in there since the beginning of creation until now.

Luk 16:19 There was a certain rich man, which was clothed in purple and fine linen, and fared sumptuously every day: Luk 16:20 And there was a certain beggar named Lazarus, which was laid at his gate, full of sores, Luk 16:21 And desiring to be fed with the crumbs which fell from the rich man's table: moreover the dogs came and licked his sores. Luk 16:22 And it came to pass, that the beggar died, and was carried by the angels into Abraham's creek ( G2859 "kolpos" bay): the rich man also died, and was buried; Luk 16:23 And in hades (G86) he lift up his eyes, being in torments, and seeth Abraham afar off, and Lazarus in his ( G2859 "kolpos" bay). Luk 16:24 And he cried and said, Father Abraham, have mercy on me, and send Lazarus, that he may dip the tip of his finger in water, and cool my tongue; for I am tormented in this flame. Luk 16:25 But Abraham said, Son, remember that thou in thy lifetime receivedst thy good things, and likewise Lazarus evil things: but now he is comforted, and thou art tormented. Luk 16:26 And beside all this, between us and you there is a great gulf fixed: so that they which would pass from hence to you cannot; neither can they pass to us that would come from thence.
Level 7, THE Third Heaven/Paradise
JESUS then turned to David and said to him, "Now We shall go to Level 7, Paradise". Immediately, they were all in Paradise.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, is Paradise the third heaven that Paul mentioned?

2 Co 12:1 It is not expedient for me doubtless to glory. I will come to visions and revelations of THE YAHWEH. 2 Co 12:2 I knew a man in Christ above fourteen years ago, (whether in the body, I cannot tell; or whether out of the body, I cannot tell: THE ELOHIM knoweth;) such an one caught up to the third heaven. 2 Co 12:3 And I knew such a man, (whether in the body, or out of the body, I cannot tell: THE ELOHIM knoweth;) 2 Co 12:4 How that he was caught up into paradise, and heard unspeakable words, which it is not lawful for a man to utter.

JESUS: Yes, it is. This is the Garden of Eden, the Mount Zion. It is an unknown planet to humanity. The inhabitants can freely roam about the place. There is the River of Eden that is filled with light.

Psa 36:8 They shall be abundantly satisfied with the fatness of thy house; and thou shalt make them drink of the river of thy pleasures (H5730 "eden"). Psa 36:9 For with thee is the fountain of life: in thy light shall we see light.
This river of light proceeds out of the throne of My FATHER and My throne, and flows to Heavenly Jerusalem.

Rev 22:1 And he shewed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of THE ELOHIM and of the Lamb. Rev 22:2 In the midst of the street of it, and on either side of the river, was there the tree of life, which bare twelve manner of fruits, and yielded her fruit every month: and the leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
It then flows from Heavenly Jerusalem to the great and high mountain, Mount Zion. Mount Zion/Paradise and Heavenly Jerusalem are two different places.

Heb 12:22 But ye are come unto mount Sion, and unto the city of the living ELOHIM, the heavenly Jerusalem, and to an innumerable company of angels, Heb 12:23 To the general assembly and church of the firstborn, which are written in heaven, and to THE ELOHIM the Judge of all, and to the spirits of just men made perfect,
In the beginning, Adam was placed there where the Tree of Life and the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil were placed.

Gen 2:8 And THE YAHWEH ELOHIM planted a garden eastward in Eden; and there he put the Adam whom he had formed. Gen 2:9 And out of the ground made to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight, and good for food; the tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and the tree of knowledge of good and evil.

Instead of eating the fruits from the Tree of Life, Adam and Eve ate the fruit of the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil, and became wise in their own eyes and no more kept and obeyed all Our commands, and Our glory left them and death came.

Gen 2:15 And THE YAHWEH ELOHIM took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it. Gen 2:16 And THE YAHWEH ELOHIM commanded the man, saying, Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat: Gen 2:17 But of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it: for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.

Adam and Eve were expelled from the planet Eden and given a body of flesh signified by the coats of skins to live in Adamah, which is a portal to spiritual Eden. Only those who eat of the fruits of the Tree of Life will be able to enter Eden, the Mount Zion.

Gen 3:21 Unto Adam also and to his wife did THE YAHWEH ELOHIM make coats of skins, and clothed them. Gen 3:22 And THE YAHWEH ELOHIM said, Behold, the man is become as one of us, to know good and evil: and now, lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever: Gen 3:23 Therefore THE YAHWEH ELOHIM sent him forth from the garden of Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken. Gen 3:24 So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubims, and a flaming sword which turned every way, to keep the way of the tree of life.

The Tree of Life refers to THE HOLY SPIRIT, whom is represented by Shekinaih in the Last Days. It is only through the chastening and the correction of THE YAHWEH through her, that one finds the wisdom back to eternal life, the ways of delight and path of peace that is found in Eden/Mount Zion.
Pro 3:18 She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her: and happy is every one that retaineth her.
Paradise is also called the land of the living. It is reserved for My elect, those who came out of the Great Tribulations and Persecutions, will be there. Paradise is their rest and their portion.

Psa 27:13 I had fainted, unless I had believed to see the goodness of THE YAHWEH in the land of the living. Psa 27:14 Wait on THE YAHWEH: be of good courage, and he shall strengthen thine heart: wait, I say, on THE YAHWEH.

Psa 116:7 Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for THE YAHWEH hath dealt bountifully with thee. Psa 116:8 For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from falling. Psa 116:9 I will walk before THE YAHWEH in the land of the living.
Psa 142:5 I cried unto thee, O THE YAHWEH: I said, Thou art my refuge and my portion in the land of the living.

Paradise is the destination of My overcomers, who had not submitted to the Antichrist and his false apostles, but had continued in their work of faith, labor of love and patience in hope in Me, and had gone back to their first love in feeding My lamb and keeping My sheep, from wolves/false prophets.
Rev 2:7 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of THE ELOHIM.

In the last days, We shall comfort Spiritual Zion, My rest; and restore them to be like Eden again; filling them with joy, gladness, and thanksgiving, through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, The She/He, who shall show them the way back to Eden, the Holy Mountain Zion.

Isa 51:3 For THE YAHWEH shall comfort Zion: he will comfort all her waste places; and he will make her wilderness like Eden, and her desert like the garden of THE YAHWEH; joy and gladness shall be found therein, thanksgiving, and the voice of melody. Isa 51:4 Hearken unto me, my people; and give ear unto me, O my nation: for a law shall proceed from me, and I will make my judgment to rest for a light of the people. Isa 51:5 My righteousness is near; my salvation is gone forth, and mine arms shall judge the people; the isles shall wait upon me, and on mine arm shall they trust.
Rahab/Babylon/Philistia/Tyre/Ethiopia is Lucifer with her mate Molech, and they were from Eden with My children Heavenly Zion in the beginning before their fall.

Lo and Behold! Paradise is the planet where Mankind can ascend to the highest, which is the third Heaven which Apostle Paul mentioned in the Bible. Only those who have attained the full mark of 100/100 in Our 10 perfect character tests without missing the mark at all, and fully clothed with the nine garments of light of the fruit of Our Spirit, will be chosen by us and be given a golden Throne to rule in this heavenly plane, whereby the angels from above, the beings from the earth, and the demons from hell/beneath the earth, will be subjected to them.
Each of these precious souls who have strive to perfect themselves, will be given different planets and stars to rule over them.

Psa 87:1 A Psalm or Song for the sons of Korah. His foundation is in the holy mountains. Psa 87:2 THE YAHWEH loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob. Psa 87:3 Glorious things are spoken of thee, O city of THE ELOHIM. Selah. Psa 87:4 I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to them that know me: behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this man was born there. Psa 87:5 And of Zion it shall be said, This and that man was born in her: and the highest himself shall establish her. Psa 87:6 THE YAHWEH shall count, when he writeth up the people, that this man was born there. Selah. Psa 87:7 As well the singers as the players on instruments shall be there: all my springs are in thee.
Lucifer was the Anointed Cherub who was in charge of the Holy Mountain/Zion/Eden among the stones of fire/stars/ angels before she was cast out from there.

Eze 28:12 Son of man, take up a lamentation upon the king of Tyrus, and say unto him, Thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH; Thou sealest up the sum, full of wisdom, and perfect in beauty. Eze 28:13 Thou hast been in Eden the garden of THE ELOHIM; every precious stone was thy covering, the sardius, topaz, and the diamond, the beryl, the onyx, and the jasper, the sapphire, the emerald, and the carbuncle, and gold: the workmanship of thy tabrets and of thy pipes was prepared in thee in the day that thou wast created. Eze 28:14 Thou art the anointed cherub that covereth; and I have set thee so: thou wast upon the holy mountain of THE ELOHIM; thou hast walked up and down in the midst of the stones of fire. Eze 28:15 Thou wast perfect in thy ways from the day that thou wast created, till iniquity was found in thee. Eze 28:16 By the multitude of thy merchandise they have filled the midst of thee with violence, and thou hast sinned: therefore I will cast thee as profane out of the mountain of THE ELOHIM: and I will destroy thee, O covering cherub, from the midst of the stones of fire.

In the last days, through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, (MAJOR/MINOR) respectively, The She/He, We will cut and wound her and desolate the nations/sea that are serving her so as to make a way for Our redeemed to return. They shall come back with singing unto Mount Zion with everlasting joy and gladness where sorrow and mourning shall flee from them forever.

Isa 51:9 Awake, awake, put on strength, O arm of THE YAHWEH; awake, as in the ancient days, in the generations of old. Art thou not it that hath cut Rahab (H7293), and wounded the dragon? Isa 51:10 Art thou not it which hath dried (H2717 "charab" desolate) the sea, the waters of the great deep; that hath made the depths of the sea a way for the ransomed to pass over? Isa 51:11 Therefore the redeemed of THE YAHWEH shall return, and come with singing unto Zion; and everlasting joy shall be upon their head: they shall obtain gladness and joy; and sorrow and mourning shall flee away.

title:
Part 7 
Scientists, Doctors, Pharmacists, and LAWYERS

segments.text:
Part 7 
Scientists, Doctors, Pharmacists, and LAWYERS
INTERVIEW WITH THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH
"IN THE NAME OF JESUS"

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you enlighten us as mortal human beings looking at the bible from our two-dimensional (carnal mindedness) perspective regarding the statement that JESUS said, that it is He who sent THE HOLY SPIRIT, or in His name is THE HOLY SPIRIT sent from THE FATHER (Joh 14:26, Joh 15:26, Joh 16:7). He also said that the one who is sent is not greater than He that sent Him (Joh 13:16), then why through your Oracle through Shekinaih in these books you have instructed us to dictate, that THE HOLY SPIRIT is greater than JESUS?

THE TRINITY through SHEKINAIH: I see and hear THE TRINITY standing here speaking these words, "The four books and beyond, are written from Our 7D (Dimension) perspective. Now, I see THE TRINITY standing in front of me speaking in a unison voice in harmony, 'WHEN JESUS SAID, I WILL SEND IN MY NAME……'
Next, I saw THE TRINITY in one, wearing white, wrote on a green board, these words:

"MY (OUR, THE TRINITY) NAME, WHICH THE PEOPLE ON EARTH ONLY KNOW, IS JESUS, THE MANIFESTATION OF OUR SON ON EARTH, WHO HAD OVERCOME/OVERCAME THE POWER OF DARKNESS, THEREBY, WE AUTHORIZE HIM TO SPEAK ON OUR BEHALF, REPRESENTING US.
SO, WHEN THEY INVOKE HIS NAME (JESUS), INDIRECTLY, they are INVOKING OUR 7 NAMES IN HIM (THE MINOR).
BY THE NAME OF JESUS, WHOM IT HAS BEEN APPOINTED, THAT THE ENTIRE COSMOS WILL BOW DOWN, NO EXCEPTION.

NEVERTHELESS, SHEKINAIH, BEING THE FATHER (INCARNATE) AND THE HOLY SPIRIT (REINCARNATE), WHICH MEANS, SHE HAS BEEN GIVEN THE FULL AUTHORITY OF THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT AND JESUS, WITHOUT RESERVATION AND WITHOUT HOLDING BACK ANYMORE.

THEREFORE, WE, THE TRINITY, WILL FULLY 100% BACK HER WORDS UP REGARDLESS OF WHAT ONE WILL THINK/SAY/ACCUSE BECAUSE, THIS HAS BEEN DECLARED IN THE ENTIRE COSMOS ALREADY, OF WHICH, JESUS, WE, IS IN HER, DOING IT THROUGH HER 100%, INCLUDING JESUS, WHO DWELLS IN HER WOMB.

Act 2, Scene 4 
In Midair

THE TRINITY (THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS), Shekinaih and David were standing in the cloud in midair scrutinizing humanity of their doings below board. THE FATHER, who was standing between JESUS on His left and THE HOLY SPIRIT on His right, began to open the Heaven's Judgment Book, and elaborate their actions and consequences from heaven's perspective. Then THE FATHER read their judgment sentence and where these people will be heading after they pass away.
Intermittently, the book was read by JESUS and Shekinaih. As Shekinaih read the book, she saw open vision of humanity actions and consequences superimposed on the book.
1) Scientists
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS writing on a green board these words, "Are they building the Tower of Babel to reach out to the highest heaven? SPACE MASTERY, DOMINION OVER THE UNIVERSE."
Gen 11:4 And they said, Go to, let us build us a city and a tower, whose top may reach unto heaven; and let us make us a name, lest we be scattered abroad upon the face of the whole earth.
I then saw a vision of many people on the globe with their hands reaching out to touch the planets in the other galaxies.

JESUS: These scientists were raised by us to fulfil Biblical Prophecies; but they shall be punished, because they have created weapons of mass destruction, to end the world I have created. They will be disciplined for their role, just like I have raised Pharaoh. These are My vessels of wrath.

Rom 9:16 So then it is not of him that willeth, nor of him that runneth, but of God that sheweth mercy. Rom 9:17 For the scripture saith unto Pharaoh, Even for this same purpose have I raised thee up, that I might shew my power in thee, and that my name might be declared throughout all the earth. Rom 9:18 Therefore hath he mercy on whom he will have mercy, and whom he will he hardeneth.
2) Doctors

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of a doctor injecting a needle on a patient to lay them to rest to terminate their lives. I then saw another doctor pulling out an oxygen mask from a patient in the ICU who had been certified brain dead. In another vision, I saw another doctor prescribing medicine which slowly killed his patient.

JESUS: All these doctors will be punished and sent to Gehenna fire in Level 1. Only I have the right to end a person's life. No human has the right to take another person's life without being punished. All those who do that will not go unpunished.
Exo 20:13 Thou shalt not kill.
3) Pharmacists

SHEKINAIH: I saw a pill making machine manufacturing pills. I saw the word, "DEATH", written on the pills. I then saw a lady popping many of these pills into her mouth in her office. After that, I saw her dose off with her head on the table and was dead. I saw the words, "Overdose, wrong concoction, slow poison, erupted eventually". Then, I saw a black witch standing superimposed on the word, "PHARMARCIST".

JESUS: All those who practice witchcraft and sorcery (Pharmakeus, drug intoxication) will never go unpunished. Their judgment in the worst-case scenario will be in Gehenna/Tartarus, and their best-case scenario will be in Hades.

Rev 21:8 But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers (G5332 "pharmakeus"), and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.
4) LawyerS

The ungodly lawyer who takes bribe to pervert the ways of judgment to defend the cause of the guilty, shall not go unpunished because they scoff at My righteous judgment. I demand JUST LAW. Justice is a part of the foundation of My throne. All those who do this will go to Level 2, Perdition.
Pro 17:23 A wicked man taketh a gift out of the bosom to pervert the ways of judgment.

title:

Judgment on the Seven Continents

segments.text:
Part 8 
Judgment on the Seven Continents
THE SEVEN CONTINENTS
JESUS: Now, I will show you how We will judge the seven continents according to the people, the culture, the political arena and the influence sector.
1) AFRICA

Africa is a corrupted continent and also the most bullied. There are many vices to spice life. In the last days, while most parts of the world will be under the water due to earthquakes, volcano eruptions, asteroids and tsunamis, Uganda and its neighboring countries where My remnant is shall be spared, for I will vindicate My remnant there.
PEOPLE
In many rural areas in these countries, there are a handful of sincere people who are truthful to Me. These are My few Brides. Some shall be martyred and some shall be preserved and raptured.
CULTURE
As for others, I shall judge them on their culture according to My Ten Commandments.
POLITICAL ARENA
We will bring every work of all political leaders into judgment with every secret thing, whether it be good, or whether it be evil according to My Ten Commandments.
INFLUENCE SECTOR

I will also severely judge the European controllers of the leaders of Africa countries. Their days are numbered. Those who did evil will not be able to get away forever. My FATHER had been very longsuffering towards them, closing His eyes from all their evil deeds. However, it's no longer so as We have opened both Our eyes and pressed Our stop-watch signifying Our cut off time.
2) THE United Kingdom

SHEKINAIH: I saw the map of the United Kingdom. Only the Scottish Highlands remained and the rest went under water after mega earthquakes, volcano eruptions and tsunamis hit them. I saw most low-rise buildings were completely covered with water for days and months. A lot of high-rise buildings were also covered with water as high as 80% to 90 % of their height.
JESUS: The Antichrist has 12 headquarters/thrones in 12 different countries, England is one of them.
PEOPLE

There are only a handful of Bride(s) in the whole of the United Kingdom. I will warn them through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE; to seek refuge in the Scottish Highland at the appointed time.

SHEKINAIH: I saw a vision of the red dragon superimposed on a Queen. I saw the word, "Lucifer's Representative", written on her forehead. After that, I saw a vision of the portraits of the earliest Europe's aristocracy Next, I saw a Queen, holding a remote control that was attached to invisible strings that were then attached to the aristocracy in a royal court.
JESUS: Their remnant will die on the Judgment Day. Not a single one will be spared.

Isa 14:12 How art thou fallen from heaven, O Lucifer, son of the morning! how art thou cut down to the ground, which didst weaken the nations! Isa 14:13 For thou hast said in thine heart, I will ascend into heaven, I will exalt my throne above the stars of THE EL (H410): I will sit also upon the mount of the congregation, in the sides of the north: Isa 14:14 I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will be like the most High. Isa 14:15 Yet thou shalt be brought down to hell, to the sides of the pit. Isa 14:16 They that see thee shall narrowly look upon thee, and consider thee, saying, Is this the man that made the earth to tremble, that did shake kingdoms; Isa 14:17 That made the world as a wilderness, and destroyed the cities thereof; that opened not the house of his prisoners? Isa 14:18 All the kings of the nations, even all of them, lie in glory, every one in his own house. Isa 14:19 But thou art cast out of thy grave like an abominable branch, and as the raiment of those that are slain, thrust through with a sword, that go down to the stones of the pit; as a carcase trodden under feet. Isa 14:20 Thou shalt not be joined with them in burial, because thou hast destroyed thy land, and slain thy people: the seed of evildoers shall never be renowned. Isa 14:21 Prepare slaughter for his children for the iniquity of their fathers; that they do not rise, nor possess the land, nor fill the face of the world with cities. Isa 14:22 For I will rise up against them, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, and cut off from Babylon the name, and remnant, and son, and nephew, saith THE YAHWEH. Isa 14:23 I will also make it a possession for the bittern, and pools of water: and I will sweep it with the besom of destruction, saith THE YAHWEH SABAOTH.
POLITICAL ARENA

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS writing these words, "ANTICHRIST SYSTEM. ALL WILL BE RUINED". I then saw a rectangular wooden plank with the words, "COMMONWEALTH CONTROL" written on it, which JESUS later broke it into many pieces.
JESUS: The rectangular piece of plank signifies, SOVEREIGN INDIRECT RULE. I will disband their indirect rulership in these countries.

Dan 4:17 This matter is by the decree of the watchers, and the demand by the word of the holy ones: to the intent that the living may know that the most High ruleth in the kingdom of men, and giveth it to whomsoever he will, and setteth up over it the basest of men.
SHEKINAIH: I then saw JESUS lifting up the words, "United Kingdom", with His palm and then lowering it down. Next, He lifted up the word, "Russia", with His palm.
JESUS: As We have lifted the United Kingdom over Commonwealth Countries, now We shall put it down and will instead lift up Russia's Sovereign Rulership over some of these countries.

Job 12:12 With the ancient is wisdom; and in length of days understanding. Job 12:13 With him is wisdom and strength, he hath counsel and understanding. Job 12:14 Behold, he breaketh down, and it cannot be built again: he shutteth up a man, and there can be no opening. Job 12:15 Behold, he withholdeth the waters, and they dry up: also he sendeth them out, and they overturn the earth. Job 12:16 With him is strength and wisdom: the deceived and the deceiver are his. Job 12:17 He leadeth counsellors away spoiled, and maketh the judges fools. Job 12:18 He looseth the bond of kings, and girdeth their loins with a girdle. Job 12:19 He leadeth princes away spoiled, and overthroweth the mighty. Job 12:20 He removeth away the speech of the trusty, and taketh away the understanding of the aged. Job 12:21 He poureth contempt upon princes, and weakeneth the strength of the mighty. Job 12:22 He discovereth deep things out of darkness, and bringeth out to light the shadow of death. Job 12:23 He increaseth the nations, and destroyeth them: he enlargeth the nations, and straiteneth them again.
CULTURE
We shall judge whether they are for Me or against Me. I will judge them based on My Ten Commandments which is My Judgment Standard.
3) Singapore, Malaysia, South East Asia, Asia Minor
PEOPLE

SHEKINAIH: I saw the map of Singapore was very bright but some parts of the South East Asia Countries went below water because of tsunamis. I saw Terengganu and the left part of Penang Island were below water for a long time. I saw that the coasts of Singapore and Malaysia were also flooded.
I also saw that many areas in Java, Sumatra, Mindanao, and most of the Philippines were hit by earthquakes and went under water.
JESUS: Most of Singapore and most of West Malaysia will be preserved because of Shekinaih's prayer.
POLITICAL ARENA
SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS wrote, "Singapore, Clean System. The rest of the Countries, mainly corrupted. Judged based on the Ten Commandments".
JESUS: Most parts of Singapore, and most parts of West Malaysia, will be judged differently due to Shekinaih's pleading. Some of their transgressions can be overlooked due to her petition.
CULTURE
Metropolitan. Do they accept Me or hate/go against Me and My ways?
4) usa-North America and South America continent, CANADA AND NORTHERN HEMISPHERE
PEOPLE

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS writing these words, "BADLY RUINED, BY COMET". I then saw a vision of comets coming down. I saw the words, "ICE MELT DOWN, BY TSUNAMI". Next, I saw a vision of tsunami coming in. Then, and He wrote the word, "CONSEQUENCES OF ASTEROID STRIKE:
ACID RAIN AND DARK CLOUDS WILL ENVELOP MAJOR NORTH HEMISPHERE FOR A FEW MONTHS,
ALL FOOD PRICES WILL RISE UP
MAJOR STOCK MARKET CRASH, GET RID OF ALL STOCKS
ATM MACHINE NO MORE POWER, KEEP CASH AT HOME
WATER CONTAMINATION
TSUNAMIS RISES TO ABOUT 500 FEET IN HEIGHT, ALL COUNTRIES IN THE NORTHERN HEMISPHERE WILL BE AFFECTED, ETC…" HE WROTE THE WORDS, "SOLAR FLARE", HE THEN WROTE THE WORD, "70% DIED".
POLITICAL ARENA
I saw JESUS wrote, "ANTICHRIST'S DOMAIN".
JESUS: That's why I will destroy without mercy.

SHEKINAIH: I saw JESUS pointing to the bible and flipped through the whole book from Genesis to Revelations, then He referred to every point in the Bible and then wrote these words, "PAY TO THE LAST PENNY".

A Vision on Book 4 cover 29-12-2017 BY JESSIE JIANG
(Translated Version from Mandarin)

Hi Shekinaih, just now I did for myself a cleansing from head to toes, a cleansing prayer. Then, I took a look at the front cover of Book 4, "Behold! My Messenger, Behold! My Great White Throne". The moment I opened the front cover picture, I saw the whole book cover picture like splattered with fresh blood. The blood splattered on this entire picture.
I saw The ABBA FATHER is weighing the human hearts with the divine balance.

I saw Shekinaih brandishing her sword/sabre. She was brandishing her sword/sabre. This sword/sabre was… it was because the blood was splattering upon the book cover picture. After that Shekinaih was brandishing her sword and the sword was blocking the splattered blood. It seemed like Shekinaih was using the sword to chop the blood. Each time when she was chopping the blood, the blood seemed to be like souls wailing and crying, wailing and crying. Everywhere were blood.
Again, Shekinaih used her sword in her hand and the moment she chopped, the blood was chopped by the sword, it like they were broken and then followed by wailing and crying sound.

During that time, I saw Jose like….. holding a hammer, holding a hammer, like he is hammering…. When Shekinaih nodded her head, he would strike the hammer once. It seemed that he wanted to flatten someone's head.

I saw Aaron K. David blowing a horn. David was blowing a horn, on Shekinaih's slightly lower right corner, I saw… David was blowing the horn. When he blew the horn, multitude of angels would come over to wash away the blood. Once he blew the horn, the angels would come and the blood would be gone. The blood was cleared.

JESUS….ah... Like….in this picture, JESUS'S expression was very peaceful. It was like his whole person…like… inside Shekinaih. JESUS'S head was at the chest of Shekinah. Yes, it was like the positioning of this picture. JESUS was very quiet and peaceful. He said one sentence, "The time has come, the time has come, I will make people tear no more; have no more diseases and have no pain and sorrow; everything must come to an end; My days are near; everything has come to an end".

Then I saw no more fresh blood but those war flags fluttering; among these war flags, sometimes I saw red flags fluttering, sometimes white flags fluttering, sometimes and black flags fluttering. It was like, after David blew his horn, whatever color of the flag he was holding in his hand, the thousands of thousands of soldiers and horsemen who were following him, would lift up the same color of flags. However, they were all white horses, warring horses, like thousands of horses galloping ahead and charging forward. The whole scene was very grandeur.

One of the warriors from among the throng of soldiers and horsemen came over. He wore blue armor and a red scarf. I did not know who he was, but he appeared to be Paul (a member of CEG). He came over and received the hammer from Jose, and came before David and kneeled in front of David. The hammer touched the ground, just like a general of old, kneeling down and waiting to receive order from David.

Then David said: "Let us set sail". Then Paul took the horn which David had blew, and began to face the crowd and started to blow; the same thousands and thousands of soldiers and horsemen; he began to blow. Starting from the horsemen with red banners on war horses; those horsemen holding white banners; those horsemen holding black banners. Then, towards different direction, he blew, different battalion would be summoned.
Next, I again saw, Shekinaih seated inside The ABBA FATHER's brain. It was as if whatever THE ABBA FATHER told her to do, she would do likewise.

Shekinaih this time, had no grief but was very peaceful; like JESUS, very calm. Although in this Book 4 cover picture, she smiled, but what I saw in this incident, her face was very solemn, no grief, and no sorrow, very peaceful, very calm. Moreover, from Shekinaih, I heard a word, "It's done". JESUS also said, "It's done".
Next, I saw The ABBA FATHER applauding, and then THE ABBA FATHER said:

"The great task has been accomplished; Oh! Humanity! Has ended! Oh! World! Has ended! Everything like ashes and smoke, were dispersed! Everything will from the beginning start again! Oh! My Children! Among you are some that really disappointed Me; among you are those thatdeserve to go to the lake of fire, because you did not submit and obey My words; this route is unescapable.

Only My 144,000 compatriots, I recognized all of you; you will follow Me to enjoy prosperity, you will follow Me in the Garden of Eden to delight with Me for 1,000 years. I will authorize Shekinah as your Archangel, to replace the position of Satan, and let her controls everything; let David become her Military Adviser, to safeguard her wherever she goes.

Jose will also become, this time, an accomplished grand emissary minister; although, I didn't give him the authority to speak. However, he is very submissive. In subtle pride, his tail might be wagging, but I still want to use him; because no one is as steadfast as him; never leave and never give up, in paying allegiance to Me, paying allegiance to Shekinaih and David. At the same time, he walked it out, and I am very pleased with him. I will make him the head and not the tail, all the time lead My 144,000 compatriots, My children and My brides. I will let him escort My brides to My appointed place; I will marry them. At the same time, I will pick 6,000 warriors to guard My gate. I will appoint Jose to be in charge of these 6,000 warriors so that they can manage My garden".

This time, I again saw Shekinaih like a little child, holding the hand of ABBA FATHER and JESUS, and later like a little child bouncing and running. I also saw David playing something like a very long two string music instrument, also jumping and dancing.
Jose was still guarding the back garden of the house. I also saw myself dancing. Paul was leading some soldiers/warriors to guard the back of the garden. Jose was guarding the front of the garden.
I also saw David happily holding this Erxian piano; after he put it down, he and JESUS sat at the same table and David toasted a drink to JESUS.

At the same time, I saw David….many… in his younger days…..cried and cried and cried…he seemed to be pouring out in details to JESUS his past experiences. As he poured out, he cried with great sorrow and pain; and in instances, he laughed also while toasting a drink to JESUS. Beating his breast with his hand before The ABBA FATHER, he confessed and repented of his wrong. This is because David all the while, at times goes against Shekinaih and was reluctant to submit to Shekinaih.

Then, I saw ABBA FATHER nodded his head; ABBA FATHER said to David, "That's right! What I want is your submissiveness. This is because Shekinaih represents Me, as My highest authority. You just submit, then will I give you the Heaven's Key as a reward to you; to rule over all My lands".

ABOUT THE AUTHORS
SHEKINAIH

She is a humble woman whom I have crushed, powdered, burned and purified in the fire seven times over the last twenty years. Her name "Shekinaih" is given by Me as a sign to My people, and I will use her in the last days. Shekinaih is made up of the words "SHEKINAH, ADONAI and YAHWEH SABAOTH".

WE, THE TRINITY (THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE SON) appeared to her in person to convey Our decrees. She stands in our council and co-rule and reigns with us in the three realms. She shall release My decree on Earth to the churches to which I will send her with Aaron K David. They are to proclaim My Acceptable Year and The Day of My Vengeance and to comfort all that mourn in spiritual Zion.

AARON K DAVID

My churches are now entering into a new phase from the year 2013 onwards, the era of OUR Judgment. My grace period has come to an end. The severity of OUR End Times Judgment on the whole world has begun and judgment shall begin from My house.

Shekinaih is My eye; Aaron K David is My mouth. Shekinaih is My head; Aaron K David is My body. They are My wheel within the wheel. Together, they will deliver My letters to the Seven Churches as in the Book of Revelation.
